name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: "The most extraordinary attack..."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Sean Wilentz, a professor of American History at Princeton University, makes the stakes of the SAVE Act clear: “ It’s the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history .”
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it, but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in Congress start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080325_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080325_2&amount=25]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
PITCH IN $25 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080325_2&amount=25]
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080325_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080325_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080325_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080325_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080325_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080325_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080325_2&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080325_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080325_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: Former President Obama’s message to Democratic donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
"What’s being asked of us is make some effort to stand up for the things that you think are right. And be willing to be a little bit uncomfortable in defense of your values. And in defense of the country. And in defense of the world that you want to leave to your children and your grandchildren."
#
_Former President Obama is right, Peter:_
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93202?refcode=em20250803-9216&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9216%2E614464%2EDJpH-1)
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93202?refcode=em20250803-9216&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9216%2E614464%2EDJpH-1)**
**If we’re going to elect Democrats and defend our country from the toxic MAGA agenda in 2026, we have a lot of work ahead of us.**
Every threat to our country + freedoms by the GOP must be met with immediate action from engaged citizens like YOU, Peter.
**That action could look like making a donation, which is what we’re asking you to do today.** But it could also mean calling your elected leaders, volunteering for a candidate or an organization you care about, or even just staying involved in your community and keeping in touch with your neighbors.
We’re not powerless in this fight. We must meet this moment with the urgency it demands, in any way we can. **[So please, if you’re able to today, chip in $5 or more to support our work to elect Democrats in all 50 states »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93202?refcode=em20250803-9216&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9216%2E614464%2EDJpH-1)**

subject: Don’t be fooled by thinking 2026 will be easy:

body:

Peter ,
Donald Trump can't legally run for a third term, so why is he sitting on a $200 million super PAC war chest?
Because he's not done trying to control this country. He's just getting started, and he'll do whatever it takes to keep his iron grip on the House and Senate in the midterms.
🛑 That's why we need your help right now: Can you chip in $15 to help us fight back before Trump buys the next Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08032025&amount=25]
YES — I'LL DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08032025&amount=25]
Trump's super PAC is being flooded with billionaire cash from crypto execs and Trump cronies. They're donating to help Trump crush anyone who stands in his way.
🔻 He's already targeting Republican lawmakers who dared to question him.
🔻 Next, he'll come for Democrats defending democracy.
🔻 And he'll do it with almost twice the cash the Republican National Committee has on hand.
If we don't organize now, Trump's billionaires will hand him a MAGA-controlled Congress, no matter what voters want.
Every grassroots donation powers our efforts to organize, turn out voters, and expose the corruption behind Trump's political machine.
So Peter, will you stand with us today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08032025&amount=25]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

body:
| | | **** **** **** **** **** **With no evidence of wrongdoing, Trump calls for Obama to be indicted for treason!

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShuLHIwHpwcEWLg7hup-uSsx3z1CeKkmh9z2XE-7S4t6JkBqqnVzv6xJuB3oEJTW0Odi30btLNPAdeWEiA_H6ccaNI3dxtUn0VYsAf3ZcpDMHgfoaqhmD94eH5X7eIHmGRn9xfq9XMwQBr1_C_VW3-DOYfLRPAWZEwhYT5RaHLwr2rlWwltq9GjSXRSrwS5TApqelkjrKTcA6bESR85Btz-XEq2oVhsue_F7lDlrh3Q3a58l710CPO5k6plTI_dIEJuDiOEwWdhLQLbjjTJ5r3-ii07-BdzJyQxzPT0zaLPyUwZ3bXzbW_Yqmn_32Th_znIz5_KripE0UNNVmMEdeG85O9uUoNIQGHfO0nC6s1zAX/4ir/lbQ9U1voSEKkNX8Aeulctg/h0/h001.kmtIpGYSXH_DbUYAt6FDoEfTkf6xNil6PBvKX_sCiVQ)** __ [**The lunatic in the White House is unwell and UNFIT! Chip in to our billboard campaign to IMPEACH him!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShuLHIwHpwcEWLg7hup-uSsyByImcnGPzI9vnjaYPGNdFEqYQIsgzdY31wBJKpgvavCcu33TXMcS1rYmdOfn3yVUAOJMGXmj3QbgOsx1SduI0jUvE3fHdhYhIvpKRT4MC-PIFQ0sMn0ziLlHaotLzWY7gf-ZWdcO8QfHJjtko2nUqeQyZUbw2Bdx5Q8Z5Wv2xghKgJr9Q4h6QHiWLznv1RPrFQrKvV9FChgljPJT5DdW53nL2aKVdc_Ezv0G-BU0541gEwHqY-PytOEwxYYvF6b_BG2MRxCQ80uYL888VcB8eX1dGADpJ5fT45gcJxoycwHWT6G4J8shFk8_h1JQ9pGPVxfbxAK-rDydaVlkzhuqC/4ir/lbQ9U1voSEKkNX8Aeulctg/h1/h001.IXbwX2aaE3_RM7eR3MPdCr0CcfDINE6p4qx7STtlurk)
* * *
Convicted felon and longtime BFF of convicted sex traffickers Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell, dictator wannabe Donald Trump is trying to distract the nation by threatening his political opponents with prosecution. body:
My mission to SAVE our majority is in jeopardy...
| **_EMERGENCY NOTICE FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
Missing even a single fundraising benchmark could jeopardize our mission to PROTECT the President’s House majority and SAVE New York.
---
**So, with time running out, I made the last-minute decision to authorize an internal _24-HOUR EXTENSION_ until 11:59 P.M. tonight. **

_That means we have a few more hours to raise the vital funds we need to compete with the MILLIONS the Democrats will spend to drown us out on the airwaves!_

So, with time running out, I made the last-minute decision to authorize an internal 24-HOUR EXTENSION until 11:59 P.M. tonight. Greg Abbott is hijacking a disaster — and we need your help to stop him.
Before we explain how bad this is, here’s what we need from you:
👉 Chip in now to help stop Abbott’s blatant power grab and defend democracy in Texas >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=080325_4]
Texans are grieving. Families are still searching for the missing.
Floodwaters haven’t even receded — and Abbott just called a special session of the legislature.
Not for relief.
Not for recovery.
But to redraw congressional maps mid-cycle and give Trump a partisan edge in 2026.
This isn’t disaster response — it’s a calculated, authoritarian move to rig the next election while the public is focused on survival.
Texas Democrats are already mobilizing, but they can’t do this alone. They need legal firepower, organizing funds, and rapid-response communications to fight this from every angle.
This is the blueprint for MAGA power grabs nationwide — and if Abbott wins here, others will follow. Rush a donation now to help stop this scheme before it’s too late >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=080325_4]

Texas Democrats are already mobilizing, but they can’t do this alone. They need legal firepower, organizing funds, and rapid-response communications to fight this from every angle. _**“SHE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN”**_
Peter, in the critical upcoming special election for Florida’s U.S. Senate seat, I am honored to tell you that **I just received President Trump’s total and complete endorsement!**
**My name is Ashley Moody, and I’ve been serving in the U.S. Senate on a temporary basis since Marco Rubio became our top diplomat – _but now it’s time to win this seat outright. _**
I’m a fifth-generation Floridian, former judge and Attorney General, wife of a law enforcement officer, and mother to two wonderful boys.
W _e can win this seat, but to be honest, history is stacked against us._
**Typically, the president’s party averages a FOUR-SEAT LOSS in Senate midterm elections. If that happens, say hello to Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and goodbye to any forward movement on President Trump’s agenda.**
_I don’t need to tell you what a disaster that would be for this country._
**[President Trump put his faith in me to win this critical special election, and now I’d like to ask for yours. Our goal is 500 donations by 11:59pm tonight – will you pitch in now?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=15cb026cd274489a85b8a84534e7bc57&_e=2USdANooovMTUAVyinBJvltarAtZlw1OmndABRW2AA6L02Yn0bgPUtiLn2gYSg5Qgygkrf4nANm4x1YKZ4sv2jB3dgYem1Yuo1b6ZkLTvqsI7hzqtWcZMNzJ47pLoo-omNIeHZxdpMDc3PphghZXi2TJYsWxPjRKqH4eNmEWmS-1IfnynCPBDsh_J5DWvHiMrdhfGsheZy3u98P5Py0shOikz8ksoazKCDB_fpX6AnN1Om48LC1DRkoeijBIcl5K_hSRkfhpEfUupA_cfZVRmh_pVB6B762v943nT-g2jEIIu9cD7Xq6Y6p0F-9-w8kJ-2cu1TZv14KvcgB3nMQbQ3krJXCZNB0yzHimSM6TcR5CslF9F5tlMrtimPOjdSNHAmjAK2Xh7GdMW5rgWBK5lIaUS372DDKisaR5llrG2letBfgrTUNMi23jmInYoX9uIJ0g7aHlvhLSxWJ2l50lq8aSz7zCftj7nC9kbFrpeD0%3D)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 8/3/2025
body:
They built the budget bomb: Now Colorado Democrats say President Trump lit the fuse
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**August 3, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
Colorado’s budget crisis didn’t come out of nowhere—it was engineered.
This week at Rocky Mountain Voice, we broke down how [state Democrats built a fiscal time bomb](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over the last decade. Now, with a $1 billion shortfall and climbing, they’re pointing fingers at President Trump and the “Big Beautiful Bill”—instead of taking accountability for the mess they made.
Let’s be clear: Colorado’s current crisis isn’t the fault of a tax cut passed a few weeks ago. It’s the result of years of [reckless expansion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—ballooning Medicaid rolls, rising costs for government-run programs, and baseless economic projections that ignored common sense. As Mesa County Commissioner Bobbie Daniel put it: this wasn’t an accident. [It was a choice.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Here’s what the data tells us:
* Medicaid now eats up nearly [30% of the entire state budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). That’s up from 20% just ten years ago.
* Colorado has added more than [400,000 new Medicaid enrollees](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) since Obamacare, including tens of thousands of non-citizens.
* Half of Colorado’s budget now goes to just two things: K-12 education and healthcare. And still, students are underperforming, and hospitals are overwhelmed.

The kicker? Lawmakers knew this was unsustainable. But they did it anyway—and now they’re blaming a Trump-era tax relief bill for “gutting the state’s revenue.” In reality, that bill brought relief to working families—while the state wasted billions on bureaucracy, consultants, and carveouts.
Check out the stories below: **💣[They built the budget bomb: Now Colorado Democrats say President Trump lit the fuse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **💰[Colorado’s Medicaid growth is colliding with fiscal reality](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **⛑️[Gaines: Medicaid bloat is eating Colorado’s budget after a decade of federal expansion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**💸[Daniel: Colorado’s Budget Crisis Wasn’t an Accident — It Was a Choice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
At Rocky Mountain Voice, this is why we exist: to cut through the political spin and show you the truth. This is investigative journalism at its best—and we’re just getting started.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Daniel: Colorado’s Budget Crisis Wasn’t an Accident — It Was a Choice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado’s budget isn’t just strained — it’s revealing the true priorities of our state’s leadership. While seniors and disabled veterans wait to see if Colorado will uphold a constitutionally guaranteed property tax exemption, Governor Polis was busy polling Coloradans about spending $28 million on a pedestrian bridge in downtown Denver._ __
**[They built the budget bomb: Now Colorado Democrats say President Trump lit the fuse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) They built the budget bomb. Now they say Trump lit the fuse. Colorado Democrats want you to believe they’re victims of the Big Bad Federal Budget Bill. That the state’s $1.2 billion shortfall just... happened. Like a pothole after a snowstorm. Nothing to do with how they’ve governed.
**[What schools won’t say: The furry behavior Colorado families keep reporting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rumors about students dressing as animals and disrupting classrooms have circulated throughout Colorado for years, sparking political fights, school board blowback and media denials. Some say the “furries in schools” narrative is a hoax pushed by conservative figures. But school records, parent testimony and disciplinary documents tell a more complicated story.

|
---
**STATE**
**[Colorado’s Medicaid growth is colliding with fiscal reality](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A new report from the Common Sense Institute (CSI) warns that Colorado’s Medicaid program is on an unsustainable path—driven by rapid expansion at the state level and compounded by shrinking federal support. The warning comes as lawmakers prepare for a possible special session to address the state’s growing budget deficit.

**[CPW Confirmation of New Wolf Pups Raises Alarms in Colorado Ranch Country](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) State biologists shared a minimum count of pups for one of the newly-named packs in Colorado, marking the third pack to have confirmed pups after reintroduction.

**[‘Lawsuit inferno’: Tort reform advocate warns Colorado’s legal climate is driving out job creators](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The American Tort Reform Association has labeled Colorado a “lawsuit inferno” in its latest Legislative HeatCheck report, which ranks states based on the number of laws passed each year expanding liability.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Eleven stabbed at Michigan Walmart before two Marine veterans end the violence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) What started as a typical Saturday, July 26, at a northern Michigan Walmart in Traverse City ended in chaos, bloodshed, and unexpected heroism. Eleven shoppers were stabbed — several critically — before police could arrive. Deputies say two former Marines stepped in just in time, stopping the chaos before it turned deadly.
**[Garbo: Treason in Plain Sight—Obama’s Coup and the Democratic Betrayal of America](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _If Tulsi Gabbard’s revelations don’t make your blood boil, you haven’t been paying attention. The coordinated deception revealed by the Director of National Intelligence is not just a scandal – it is a full-blown betrayal of the American people, engineered at the highest levels of our government._

**[Colorado Joins California on 2025 List of Costliest States to Live](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX 40 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Despite President Trump’s social media declaration that “the USA is Rockin’, there is VERY LOW INFLATION,” the rising cost of living looms over many Americans, especially so in some states, according to a recent CNBC study.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Denver Spends $3 Million Urging Residents to Eat Less Meat](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) “Eat less meat.” “Eat more plant-based meals.” “Vote for climate-conscious leaders.” The tips come from a “do more” list that Mayor Mike Johnston’s administration posted as part of its $3 million marketing campaign that aims to persuade residents to help the city reach its climate goals.
**[Hundreds to Be Laid Off as Denver’s Progressive Agenda Faces $200M Deficit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Denver city and county employees will see layoff notifications during the week of Aug. 18, according to the mayor’s office, which cited budget woes. “These are not easy days, and these are not easy decisions,” wrote Mayor Mike Johnston to the city and county employees in a letter sent Tuesday.
**[Hunter: Fort Morgan ribbon cutting celebrates purpose and partnership at Leprino’s only string cheese facility](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _There’s something deeply satisfying about a slice of pizza. Maybe it’s the gooey mozzarella that stretches with every bite or the quiet delight of knowing where that cheese comes from, especially when it’s right in your backyard._
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Daniel: The state’s mandates, your money—and why counties are saying “Enough”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Imagine walking into a restaurant, and before you even look at the menu, someone else orders for the whole table. They choose the most expensive items, add dessert, and go for top-shelf drinks—and when the check comes, they quietly slide it over to you. That, in a nutshell, is what the State of Colorado is doing to counties._
**[Polk: Summer TDS cases are rising across the U.S. — Is it time for a shot?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _As Trump Derangement Syndrome cases begin to rise this summer, many may be wondering: What are my risks, and is it time to get another vaccine? As of July 15, TDS cases were growing or likely growing in 27 states including Texas, Illinois, Colorado, North/South Carolina, NY, AZ, Missouri, Wisconsin, NJ, ND/SD, Oregon, Washington, Utah, Kalifornia, Kentucky, Virginia and Ohio, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention._ __
**[Gaines: Instead of schools, state grants funded advocacy for equity, gay forestry—and ‘indigenizing’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In an earlier post (see the first link below), I mentioned a couple of state expenses to the environmental advocacy group Cultivando that had caught my eye in their TOPS expense report. The first was a line item for $500 labeled as “personal services — professional” charged to the Colorado Energy Office (CEO). The other was a grant for $24,700 to Cultivando charged to the Department of Natural Resources (DNR)._ __
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🐳 DID YOU KNOW?** **Blue whales consume nearly 500,000 calories in a single bite** —that’s enough to feed a human for over 7 months! These ocean giants devour up to 20 tons of krill daily, roughly 12% of their body weight.

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!

They choose the most expensive items, add dessert, and go for top-shelf drinks—and when the check comes, they quietly slide it over to you. That, in a nutshell, is what the State of Colorado is doing to counties. As Trump Derangement Syndrome cases begin to rise this summer, many may be wondering: What are my risks, and is it time to get another vaccine? As of July 15, TDS cases were growing or likely growing in 27 states including Texas, Illinois, Colorado, North/South Carolina, NY, AZ, Missouri, Wisconsin, NJ, ND/SD, Oregon, Washington, Utah, Kalifornia, Kentucky, Virginia and Ohio, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. In an earlier post (see the first link below), I mentioned a couple of state expenses to the environmental advocacy group Cultivando that had caught my eye in their TOPS expense report. The first was a line item for $500 labeled as “personal services — professional” charged to the Colorado Energy Office (CEO). The other was a grant for $24,700 to Cultivando charged to the Department of Natural Resources (DNR). __ | Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com or send us a message on social media to chat! | 🐳 DID YOU KNOW? Blue whales consume nearly 500,000 calories in a single bite —that’s enough to feed a human for over 7 months! These ocean giants devour up to 20 tons of krill daily, roughly 12% of their body weight. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | QUOTE OF THE DAY** "No people can be bound to acknowledge and adore the Invisible Hand which conducts the affairs of men more than those of the United States."– George Washington | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. name: Powered by People
subject: Texas Democrats took a stand. Now it’s our turn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Republican leaders in Texas just tried to redraw our congressional maps to hand Donald Trump five Democratic-held seats — not by winning more voters, but by manipulating the system to hold onto power.
It’s a blatant attempt to rig the midterm elections, hold on to the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives, silence millions of voices, and undermine our democracy.
**But Texas Democrats refused to stand by and watch it happen. Instead, they took bold action and just broke quorum to stop Republicans from holding a vote on the new map.**
They stood up when it counted most — putting everything on the line to defend fair representation and our democratic process. Now it’s our job to stand with them and show them they are _not_ alone.
At Powered by People, we’re mobilizing support to keep the pressure on—here in Texas and across the country—to stop this Trump power grab and ensure fair elections for all. But we can’t do it without you.
[**Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to power this movement and support these lawmakers in the fight for our democracy?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250803-2.xle6Iv&refcode=ema20250803-240272&t=2&akid=240272%2E444211%2ERqm9ue)

When we fight together, there’s nothing we can’t do. Let’s keep fighting — and let’s win.

# **['Incomparably rich' teaching program launches amid Catholic education revival](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The Augustine Institute’s new campus in St. Louis. / Credit: Photo courtesy of the Augustine Institute CNA Staff, Aug 3, 2025 / 06:00 am (CNA). Most people don’t go to graduate school for the rich liturgical life. But that’s exactly what Adelyn Phillips has found at “Teachers for Christ,” a nascent Catholic master’s program in St. Louis, where she is one of 12 students this summer. Phillips said she has found a vibrant community, structured daily prayer, and solid theological formation. “My time in this program has already been incomparably rich,” she said of the program.

## Flood, Smoke Blanket Eastern US
Huge swaths of the U.S. were under flood and air quality alerts Sunday as [drenching rain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGu2yAQRb8G74jwQGKzYFGp8u51U1VdWhMY4nnBkAJ5Uf6-cn-huytd6eqe8_tj_UBOnG8_cCfXY1kzvVqi3qke8ZNqozdh7dufJ95pf6bOjxUUnKWapTJrQE7v1QzBRSIgPZAbp7PRarTGDJszE2gPs71erPZRBTuZ2RNFGyJGa2Fgd6ypWZlRqbOBU8Dop7OfNeqrRnURRlHgXurps3DuG8X0Ll9UT77sQ3Jb748m9DcBi4AFr_4gON3KUQtYfv0UsMRUSuB8k5XbXfqSO-cnNdnKs2-ErctHQs5NeswYUL44hciVZNvLnQQsrZf6FnrhIPT3EYyGcbQwVBceL06J22USRt125PTvVv8vl18O_gYAAP__oAyKMA) hit the Southeast, and Canadian wildfires continued pushing smoke into the Midwest. Flood risks in the Southeast and the Plains were elevated throughout the day, as a massive rain system stalled over parts of Alabama, Georgia, and the Florida Panhandle, dropping three to five inches of rain in some areas. Meanwhile, air quality advisories blanketed the Midwest as smoke from over 700 wildfires in remote areas of Canada continued traveling south. In most affected areas, the advisories were aimed at people with heart or lung disease and asthma. In the Atlantic, experts are eyeing a tropical depression heading toward the Southeast that could become [Tropical Storm Dexter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL8GOjFCEmAKFWncOW1K5pAOc45ARDqM_fcZ8gvpdnZ2dnbf1224AQVa75-woOUpDiseOSAzplM-MGV8IySef3b4xmUPTNugpGqEvAhpBg8U3oMpvZ0QFeoSbd01Rsu6N6ac7Th2bS-99s6AHwF6g2PbaHS1VE7XTUn2bJMXaWopG6MqD5PrGnfRoEcNsi2MRE8cU_WItPKMU3jHJ6bKxaUMdmbecqE_CnUt1PU4jmqKr1qfP87E6SHwjKlQV1qfmFn0TRAu7sGLEV1cUHCKGzkIInNMi_D4Ykwix51nhMxiTOAwiynE6Gm9iwS0lsn67aAQKLddYeR9AQp_m_hfIJ9W_QYAAP__MuaL3g).
## Earthquake Delivers Loud Boom in NYC
A 3.0 magnitude [earthquake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9ugzAQxp_GbEbnf4EMHrqwpWtH5OAjODGY2iaIt69chj5Ap_vpTjp9v-_r1t-M8255fJoZdR5Dv-CePOaMseATY8IDTczT92ZeOG8-u7XnwBWFloLsrXH-6GVl9YjIUVSoWaOkAHaVspq0tKwdRwussYNSioEwKJkSCK25mgYqp8s3aEEyACV5bc04NGpohRF3YeBCJKB1OcT6GdySJxz9Ed4Y6yHMlddTzmsi4oPwjvBu3_d6uKdiUe6EdwvuR4ivk9I5aNnQAqcgXUNK7u6R_qlSsz22lGlJR3hXRW3X3Xnv0qUhEh6zcf43Qv5Xb2_NfwIAAP__-IKDtA) shook parts of New Jersey and New York Saturday night, with tremors felt from the epicenter in Bergen County, N.J., up to Upper Manhattan and Staten Island. No injuries or structural damage has been reported, but officials are asking residents to be alert for aftershocks, which can sometimes register higher magnitudes than the initial quake. Despite its relatively small magnitude, the earthquake delivered a [loud boom](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQQL_GbI6MbQIMHrqwpWtHZOAuXGIwtS-J-PuKdOgHdDmd9KSne_d16S-eAq3XT7-AY4z9Cq8cgBnSsd4gZdjBJ56_H_4OyyMwbb1WupKqkcr2k6ew97aYHAJoMAW4sq6sUWVrbTE7hVNlEMvpPCAgtr5qYbC19cqaemibgtxhU42ypVKV1afJ41hXY2O8GYxXZ2EVTMQxnW6RVp4Bwx6fkE5jXIrgZuYtC_MhdCd0t-5bzHwgobtDLHSnmmNoobtHlkef0N1fksyc6A5vIn97JSdYYsoSIbCkVW4-cZYR5bqPMiLSSD4cmiK5aXtRCJTPtbDqungK78P4X998Ov0TAAD__y-Biso), followed by a few seconds of swaying. _“I have experienced two earthquakes in New York and New Jersey, and this was the most violent—I never heard an earthquake before that sounded like a thud,”_ one resident stated. The quake follows six small tremors over the course of 17 hours last week in the area.
## World’s Top 50 Private Companies
The U.S. dominates the list of the world’s [50 most valuable private companies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFywyAQheHTSJ00aEGyXFCkcee0KTUrWMw6CBTA1vj2GecK6V7x5iv-r-tyRQ4cb5-4ka4uLZGOEqhWyu95p1zoRZir_3ngN22PUHlfQMDYibkTarHI4bWo1mpHBCRb0sNpVFIMZ6Var1G52QxmnM4GYXTWkYJ5gFWsaCVM0LJ-a2IWahBiVNBbdOY0mlmiXCWKqVGCLNeU-3viWD258EpPyr1JWxu0r3Uvjfxo4NLA5TiO3qwcC998Le9LA5dMhTAb3z0im5RjZ9K2Y2QqbdZ2PzgELtOpUeK2IYc_uP6rxlPDbwAAAP__a7J2Kg) in 2025, with 31 entries led by SpaceX ($350 billion) and OpenAI ($300 billion), according to new data. China follows with eight firms, including TikTok parent ByteDance ($300 billion). AI is the clear frontrunner in valuation growth, with Anthropic, xAI, and Safe Superintelligence joining OpenAI among the top ranks. The list highlights how private firms, especially in AI and fintech, drive innovation and attract billions before ever going public. See the [data visualization here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL8GOjFCEmAKFWnonDYlc5YOc45ARDpg_PcZ8gvpttjZffO-7uMdKND6_IQFLU9xXPHMAZkxXfGFKeMbIfH8s8M3Lntg2kYlVSPkTUgzeqDwHk3p7YSoUJdo664xWta9MeVspQbl-lZ2bW9qcNqZ1vvJN_2jb1qPsiR7rcmbNLWUjVGVh8l1jbtp0A8Nsi2MRE8cU_WKtPKMU3jHA1Pl4lIGOzNvudAfhRoKNZznWR2UdwgONmIIlPkqFmrgGcUZU_BZNFIsMbM4IOzwCCi2RAcwCheXDVbCLGgVF1ehhjJZv50UAuW2K4x8LkDh75z_Zeyw6jcAAP__Mm-Bug).

It's time for a major announcement. Today, we're offering you the chance to become more than a reader of The Flyover. We're giving you the chance to . If anyone deserves the opportunity to acquire a stake in our company's future, it's our loyal readers. You've been with us along the entire journey, and we're excited to partner even more closely with you. Keep an eye out for a special message later today from our Founder, Guy, with more details. He'll fill you in on what we're up to, and you can also read more about the . -Cole, CEO Today's sponsor is , a banking platform that helps you find the best savings rates so your money can actually work for you. | Flood, Smoke Blanket Eastern US Huge swaths of the U.S. were under flood and air quality alerts Sunday as hit the Southeast, and Canadian wildfires continued pushing smoke into the Midwest. Flood risks in the Southeast and the Plains were elevated throughout the day, as a massive rain system stalled over parts of Alabama, Georgia, and the Florida Panhandle, dropping three to five inches of rain in some areas. Meanwhile, air quality advisories blanketed the Midwest as smoke from over 700 wildfires in remote areas of Canada continued traveling south. In most affected areas, the advisories were aimed at people with heart or lung disease and asthma. In the Atlantic, experts are eyeing a tropical depression heading toward the Southeast that could become . Earthquake Delivers Loud Boom in NYC A 3.0 magnitude shook parts of New Jersey and New York Saturday night, with tremors felt from the epicenter in Bergen County, N.J., up to Upper Manhattan and Staten Island. No injuries or structural damage has been reported, but officials are asking residents to be alert for aftershocks, which can sometimes register higher magnitudes than the initial quake. Despite its relatively small magnitude, the earthquake delivered a , followed by a few seconds of swaying. “I have experienced two earthquakes in New York and New Jersey, and this was the most violent—I never heard an earthquake before that sounded like a thud,” one resident stated. The quake follows six small tremors over the course of 17 hours last week in the area. World’s Top 50 Private Companies The U.S. dominates the list of the world’s in 2025, with 31 entries led by SpaceX ($350 billion) and OpenAI ($300 billion), according to new data. China follows with eight firms, including TikTok parent ByteDance ($300 billion). AI is the clear frontrunner in valuation growth, with Anthropic, xAI, and Safe Superintelligence joining OpenAI among the top ranks. The list highlights how private firms, especially in AI and fintech, drive innovation and attract billions before ever going public. See the . name: The Maine Wire
subject: ICE Has Arrested Just Under 150,000 Illegals Since Trump Took Office: Report
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** ICE Has Arrested Just Under 150,000 Illegals Since Trump Took Office: Report (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=5d19c5dd09&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on Aug 04, 2025 06:57 am
Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (ICE) have made just under 150,000 arrests since the start of January, according to ICE data provided to the Washington Examiner this week, measuring arrests from late January through late July – marking a significant uptick over the same period last year. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: New Tallest Tower, Falling Bricks, and Noodles Comes Home
body:
The 74-story Waterline tower in Austin is now the tallest building in Texas after the final beam of the 1,025-foot skyscraper was installed last Friday. The 1,002-foot JPMorgan Chase Tower in Houston had been the tallest in the state since 1981.

## House Democrats Flee State
Texas House Democrats [fled the state yesterday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI7M2v4hhYtr6HLtlWjB62CdwcjeQPL2J_IK16xWmtGnmfnzGB8YU9yev3Elx--Qx43OmoiZyvUypkSVOZ9UAqbLOpU4ggIrVS-VGT3G9BlN492k_L1tyLWdNVpZo2yzuPs8e6_NZOmOwYdOK_tDOrSmN13Q0DfRXTDVK9O2SgPcdO81GISerMWgrTCKfORcbrwQ0xtrSJ98ULnNeW2SW5j3KvQvAYOAYfvsufIlCRgusoBB9dfRAoZXlVc_AcMXJD2teS7IVSbCg2RlZJKc5ZTy_FcemUnmTRbyBc9NLvlVSa64Cxia4vx-xpRi_emEUc8VY_pG4v8b8nDwLwAA__-qXYfg) in an effort to stop Republicans from passing a redistricting plan that would create five additional Republican-leaning districts ahead of the 2026 midterms. Currently, 25 of the state’s 38 seats in Congress are held by Republicans. Most of the chamber’s 62 Democrats [went to Chicago](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OqzAMQJ8mbCDnD8KQ4S5s313viEJiWkuhqYJV2re_Sl_hWywPR-fI_vez_gTK9Lj9DQd6fu9lfeB1ZmTG2lYOOePJXC6se8gN3SqtCpTtwfVg1hQof1bTJb9BmmWHXk7WaLAGbHf3Y5xGqaMcpcEtgo5zAjnH2WxWObdPHfkmAwdGStBKDdolrUxQDq0Nu7bCACbiUge-I-M7nHv-lBfWIZajy_7O_DyF_iPUItRyXdfwLJmYYmmAUEu7SKilZYRawLWhhVoSHiXWwGe_Z8T-q-4rJjq5UmR63HoAM0vjpq769LwoZzrHSRi4HYHyt8-_-9rLq_8BAAD__-tYf3k) to meet with Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker, one of several Democratic governors who have threatened to redraw maps in their states to add more seats favoring Democrats. In a statement for the Texas House Democratic Caucus, State Rep. Gene Wu of Houston said he and his colleagues "will not allow disaster relief to be held hostage to a Trump gerrymander," [declaring](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP3SAQhH8N7njCa7BxQZHG3aVNaa1h8UPhmRNs7Lt_H_lJ-QWpdqUZfZqZXx_rB6acjv0nvsjxVyzrQVfLxEz1fhlzpsZcLqoR823dalpBgZHKSqXXgCl_r7oLblNh7jty_WT0oIxWpns6Mw0RogfyfR-iwt4bGMDAbH3Q02y65G6Yskr3vRoAHoMNA2gES8ZgHIzQikLiUh_8JKYvbDF_l5Pqw5dXl92T-bOJ4YeARcByXdfj9_mHblHAgpWTzyRguXsJWHLxmAUsb9C_KwO9iq_ITfpn8rgXeRYm6cuxV2otlQOzrBRS45o8p2MXsICdJBmazDZaSXOYpB69kQjRyhjHeZyjwc1vXXXh80o5pzZOQqv9hSm_w_P_TX46-BsAAP__UsWWAA) that "this corrupt special session is over." Speaker Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) insisted that the House would convene at 3 p.m. today, saying that "all options will be on the table" if a quorum is not present. Attorney General Ken Paxton [said he supports](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFrwzAQBeBfI28Jp5PkyIOGLl5KSodCu5lzdUoEih2sa-z8--L-hW6Px-Mb3ud5OFMuebq80Y2DbGkeJl5rYRFe9ihUCleReeUlUdmn45IHBHQH8AewQ6RcnoNtYhghdrrhoE_OGnAWXHMNLRg0MY3daHDUKWnr0FPHhpO1yXRNDjsGHqzWYBCPxkeDltCzc5SMUxY4ZpmXo1xZeKOaynN-8HL8nm9NCVeRe1XmRWGvsN_2VmH_ytM7bTJPH18K-yokP1VhrzuHGr3TDk3rW0B_apYQ72suJdf2pCxcbpTLny3_e-QR8DcAAP__2E9yRA) the "immediate arrest of these rogue lawmakers who've fled their duties."
## South Texas Border Patrol Chief Removed
Gloria Chavez, the Rio Grande Valley (RGV) Border Patrol Sector Chief since October 2022, [has been replaced](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3OpDAQRE9jMiPjn4EJHGxCNptuiBrcBks2Rk1rmLn9it0jfFkFr6qk9-c1vSDltK-_oaDnT6zTjteZkRnpjgw548lcL6QI-UZnSpNW2kk1SGWnACl_J9sEP6vw7Br0Xe-sUc4q12zexf7ZaRyWpQOLJmI_G2We_aMzxsUHNMnfY2pQtuuU0bo1QzDagh7QOYjGCaswJK7U8oaMHzhj_tY3UrvU0mS_MR-nML-EHoUer-tq50oBifCoxDck9JhKSSsBp7oLPS4b7CvKGuVSS4E9yFhJ0vqW_6vyAKaa5YkLVxJ6bMiH40o5p_PRC6vWAin_--efWXt7_TcAAP__StWDrw) by Jason Schneider as acting chief patrol agent, according to a social media post from U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) last Friday. Chavez was reportedly escorted from the RGV Sector headquarters in Edinburg prior to the announcement. She is a [Brownsville native](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u7CAQx0-DOyw8wFu_giKNu02b0sIw2Ejsshom9m5OHznKDdLNSD_9vz6u89Xnku_ru7-h42eq8x2PVpAZ6TzZl4KNuR5IyZcTXSjPoMBKNUpl5uhzec2mi25R8f_QoRsu1mhljbLd5qy2Q8LBBx3TAgkDWoUICnQMqCN02Z1ialRmGJQG6PUYNRgPI1rrk7bCKIyZK_W8IePTt1RedUfqQ711xW3Mjyb0m4BJwHQcR7-foV8B70y-nJSA6awlYCo1-CJ_n1Y_KWCTtO6yYeBKcqkUkeTDM9Uiw5YxybVUyl6Gze_4JVMmjAKmjlx8HLmU3P5dhFHrzecfs47_NuTu4DsAAP__dtqLlw) and a 30-year veteran of the agency, having previously served as the chief patrol agent of the El Paso Sector, California's El Centro Sector, and Washington's Spokane Sector. In a statement, CBP Commissioner Rodney Scott characterized the removal as a "disciplinary action," affirming the agency's commitment to integrity. "_Misconduct—on or off duty—by a few distracts from the honorable service of the many_ ," [he said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULuupDAM_ZrQZZSY8NgixTZ0s-2WyAkGojVkFLzM8PdX3F-4jWXpHJ3X3-f4xMRpX_7gRl4-cx53eh9MIlTuV5CZDpH8pjIj39RQ0ggGGm16bdw4YeJrdNXkg5l-2Yq87RpXm8aZplp9tBZjG203h7kNETvXRrKWQucoGENV8reY6Y2z1tQAj7qfanAIPTUNznWjnKEpSS4PWUnog8fMVz6pPGLeKvaryOtQ9W8Fg4Jhu8py3oiCgXNE1nchBcPtomAw_X1AwRAZS5JLM8Z_aV902nVZTh1ymajouCaaD42h_H-JLrTlE1nBUBU_vd6JOR1tp5xZNkz8nUR-tt_p4SsAAP__lHSFFg).
## Austin Tower Is Tallest in Texas
The 74-story Waterline tower in Austin is [now the tallest building in Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0R4gBgXFNvQZdstLWKPYyQMFozj5O9Xjp7e-4DXjUZX9x6df7fh5kMM6fHXr2jpNech4VEjEmE5T_IxYiXKB5bZxzN6L2EAAZoLw4UaJh_ie1DNZO9i6tsGbdtpJYVWQjeLhU6D6Xzfmvk6eo1GS7z2rQFxH2dh-ibYs0wYodpWSICLNJME5cGg1n6WmimBU6BcLrQg4cvXOb7zE8tlzGsT7UK0VSb_MHAM3JjXdU-B3mHd_EhnhoHze6WQGLiad1r4iImKj_z7PeETY95WTMTAnUAMnOgYONkycIcnLDEk5J99nvDgX2b4Rw2nvFWed-Ih_bQ2xU7bEWIM9doxJR6rD_FDTb9z_bTwPwAA__-fGZUk) after the final beam of the 1,025-foot skyscraper was installed last Friday. The 1,002-foot JPMorgan Chase Tower in Houston had been the tallest in the state since 1981. Developed by Lincoln Property Co. and Kairoi Residential, the project includes 352 luxury apartments, 703,000 square feet of office space, a 252-room hotel, and 24,000 square feet of retail and restaurant space. It’s situated along a network of parks and trails around Lady Bird Lake. Andy Smith, Lincoln's senior vice president, said the company didn't plan for Waterline to be the tallest building in Texas. "_It just kind of grew into that_ ," [he said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u8zAMQE8jbzL0a-sbNHyLt3TtaDAVFQtQrEBiouT2hdPeoBtBPDzi8fO0niDltF8-4IqenrGsO_aWkQjrMRLkjI2odKwR8oGea1qVUJYLx4VZA6T8Ws0Q_FmEf3JAL2drtLBG2GHz1kVAM8nJgnSTBRWcnWMACEZOAHpI_pAJJ4yUQis1ahe0MqAcWgtRW2YEhkSljrQh4RNazK_ywDp-leuQ_UZ0a0z_Z2phaum9j7E8Z7g3SvuBMLUcTUwtPzu-l843aPy3jZ_vKYe0X_hbPlQfbj3lnNo0MyMuV0j5fYr-9qCHV98BAAD__wKmfGo). Work on the high-rise began in 2022 amid a spate of new development in downtown Austin. When it [opens next year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdTT4mycVLNKoe2lTCpS4tBZZkwa5tuzbBzJyg3QL7GBmvvn9vXxHJCzXX_EGgV-5LgWOTsAM7Tw5EkFnrge0HOmUrg0Xo4yXapTKLSkivRc3pLCqNOkBgv7yzirvlB_2oI2POpusp2nyk7LJZZvGdQSdp1WrbcBwmqlROa2VNeZix2SNi2YE72O2XjgFCbm2C-_A8Io907s-oV22ehso7Mz3LuxPYWZh5m3t8dEZy_kVZj5xhJmpbpGEmVfYsSTJO8i-QYEuqdY_MrLcauncHhtjLbIW-UmS__jl-kBKWK7yiAyNsMDQQrofSIT9x5dw6nqLSJ9K_H9DPoP5GwAA__9TpYsh), Waterline is expected to have a "transformational impact" on the area.

Attorney General Ken Paxton the "immediate arrest of these rogue lawmakers who've fled their duties." South Texas Border Patrol Chief Removed Gloria Chavez, the Rio Grande Valley (RGV) Border Patrol Sector Chief since October 2022, by Jason Schneider as acting chief patrol agent, according to a social media post from U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) last Friday. Chavez was reportedly escorted from the RGV Sector headquarters in Edinburg prior to the announcement. She is a and a 30-year veteran of the agency, having previously served as the chief patrol agent of the El Paso Sector, California's El Centro Sector, and Washington's Spokane Sector. In a statement, CBP Commissioner Rodney Scott characterized the removal as a "disciplinary action," affirming the agency's commitment to integrity. "Misconduct—on or off duty—by a few distracts from the honorable service of the many ," . Austin Tower Is Tallest in Texas The 74-story Waterline tower in Austin is after the final beam of the 1,025-foot skyscraper was installed last Friday. The 1,002-foot JPMorgan Chase Tower in Houston had been the tallest in the state since 1981. Developed by Lincoln Property Co. and Kairoi Residential, the project includes 352 luxury apartments, 703,000 square feet of office space, a 252-room hotel, and 24,000 square feet of retail and restaurant space. It’s situated along a network of parks and trails around Lady Bird Lake. Andy Smith, Lincoln's senior vice president, said the company didn't plan for Waterline to be the tallest building in Texas. "It just kind of grew into that ," . Work on the high-rise began in 2022 amid a spate of new development in downtown Austin. # **_Broad \+ Liberty_ Launches New Regional Bureau for Lancaster County**
---
| | | | | Visit the new _Lancaster County Independence_ website [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=926d9fb204&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
|
---
| Dear Readers,

Lancaster County is the place where the Delaware Valley’s brisk atmosphere has finally tapered off and the serenity of rural Pennsylvania begins. Vast farmlands drape across the landscape, religious adherence is strong, and life is often calm.

But that oversimplifies it.

Lancaster County is the sixth most populous county in the Keystone State, with a population comparable to Delaware County’s and greater than Chester County’s. It is home to well-reputed colleges like Elizabethtown, Franklin & Marshall, and Millersville. Lancaster City was the United States capital for one day, September 27, 1777, when the Continental Congress had to flee Revolutionary War hostilities in Philadelphia. The city was home to the great abolitionist Congressman Thaddeus Stevens. Today, the city boasts a charming downtown with galleries, museums, historic sites, and performance venues.

A place like this needs a local media that recognizes how special it is.

All the more so because of the county’s unique politics. A majority of Lancaster County voters have backed the Republican presidential candidate all but once (1964) in the past century, though Democrats dominate in elections in and around Lancaster City. And just this year, a Democrat captured the 36th Senate district for the first time since it migrated to the county in the early 1980s.

And, of course, beyond the largely evangelical conservative communities and lively urban enclaves are Amish settlements whose residents lead quiet, pious lives according to Anabaptist tradition born in the late 17th Century. How many places with under 1,000 square miles can boast such a variety of American subcultures?

A region this exceptional deserves a smart, robust news outlet that captures and illuminates the area’s most fundamental concerns. That is why _Broad + Liberty_ has founded [the _Lancaster County Independence_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3bb194c7db&e=b7b3eddce2), a new web-based journalism platform whose mission is to incisively cover the subjects and events that matter to Lancaster County residents from the Susquehanna River to the Texter Mountain Preserve to Octoraro Creek. Our editorial team possesses the decades of experience and accomplishment that such a project demands.

We are thrilled to launch that project today with our first edition. We hope that our efforts will earn your trust as a premier forum for presenting important news and sharp commentary to Lancaster County.
With regards, **Terry Tracy** — CEO | _Broad + Liberty_
**Brad Vasoli** — Senior Editor | _The Lancaster County Independence_
---

subject: The Job Market is Rolling Over
body:
Friday brought with it a staggeringly negative jobs report... This means that the last 3 months have been the weakest job creation period since COVID. Markets suffered.

| |
---|---|---

* * *
# [The Job Market is Rolling Over](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=169934003&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5OTM0MDAzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzMDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkwMTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fGWhuF2IVkA4H6_WNLJ9nMLlKEfUhggD4tYh4tdzjQA)
| | [Andrew Yang](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---
| Aug 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=169934003&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5OTM0MDAzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDMwOTI4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzU2OTAxMjgxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.bC-jGihk1j7mJI1pBdGdmRNjln9dqkyOn2JJDcXccmg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=169934003&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5OTM0MDAzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzMDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkwMTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fGWhuF2IVkA4H6_WNLJ9nMLlKEfUhggD4tYh4tdzjQA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=169934003&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5OTM0MDAzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzMDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkwMTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fGWhuF2IVkA4H6_WNLJ9nMLlKEfUhggD4tYh4tdzjQA)
---
| | [](https://substack..Bd4_6iDnU4k4LbY25ndXJDXA_2xyl0NySu8EexXls1U?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/the-job-market-is-rolling-over?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hello, I hope that your summer is going well.
Friday brought with it a staggeringly negative jobs [report](https://substack.com/redirect/ec788e28-638c-49bb-8e54-0eb9bd058764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). May and June job growth numbers were revised down by 258,000 and the most recent July report was very weak, with only 73,000 jobs created instead of the expected 104,000 and 75% of new jobs coming from one industry - health care. One analyst summed it up: "The labor market is deteriorating quickly."
This means that the last 3 months have been the weakest job creation period since COVID. Markets suffered. An angry President Trump fired the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics on Friday after the lousy job report. I don't think that's going to solve the problem.
There are a number of factors at work, including the Trump tariffs and AI. I'm going to dwell on the latter, particularly its impact on entry-level white collar workers, otherwise known as recent college graduates. I had dinner with the CEO of a tech company last week. He said, "We just cut almost 20% of our workers, and chances are we're going to be doing it again in the next year or two. There are a lot of efficiencies we are getting with AI. At the same time, my daughter is in college and she's looking for a job. She's trying to avoid tech because she sees what I'm doing. I'm not sure what her classmates are going to do for jobs in a few years."
A partner at a prominent law firm told me, "AI is now doing work that used to be done by 1st to 3rd year associates. AI can generate a motion in an hour that might take an associate a week. And the work is better. Someone should tell the folks applying to law school right now." I posted this quote on X and it went viral, getting 7 million views. Also this year, law school applications surged 21% - there's a flight to safety, though in this case it's not so safe. 3 years from now, how many lawyers are going to be getting hired?
A professor at a prestigious university shared, "For the first time I have alums calling me saying they're still without a job, and they're driving an Uber to make ends meet." Recent data from the Federal Reserve showed that the unemployment rate for men with a college degree has crept up and is now roughly the same as for those without a college degree. The college premium is evaporating.
Back when I ran for President, I talked about AI taking the jobs of truckers as well as customer service representatives. Both of those things are now happening, as robot trucks are now taking routes and AI is replacing customer service reps.
Microsoft came out with a [study](https://substack.com/redirect/3fe3e199-7437-43f6-81d7-4c5e44712242?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last week showing the jobs most and least subject to automation via AI. The top 4 by number were customer service representatives, sales representatives, marketing analysts and management analysts. In total, those 4 jobs comprise 5.6 million jobs, many of which are done by entry-level college graduates. You can easily see at least half of those jobs disappearing in the next several years.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45cd1c1a-3e4c-42e9-8df5-2c389f75803b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Microsoft also documented which jobs are least subject to AI automation. That list includes dredge operators, maids and housekeepers, hazardous material removers, roofers, housepainters, phlebotomists, and nursing assistants. Not a lot of office workers on this [list](https://substack.com/redirect/3fe3e199-7437-43f6-81d7-4c5e44712242?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7065ae3e-bc7c-4e10-9951-661e7994493b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In essence, what happened to manufacturing workers when robots started hitting the assembly lines 30 years ago is now happening to knowledge workers. Offices are going to be emptied out.
I always thought this day would come. I spent 5 months as an unhappy corporate attorney doing document review in my mid-20s. It was 100% the kind of work that AI could do faster and more effectively. I wasn't even very good at it, as I would lose focus after the third hour of reviewing leases for change of control provisions. This was a job that theoretically required a law degree - imagine all of the information review, synthesis and summary jobs out there in the bowels of insurance companies, banks, call centers, government and so on.
There's a reason that Dario Amodei [said](https://substack.com/redirect/51e4041d-9e0b-49f6-add2-0e69dd77b9cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that AI will automate half of entry-level white collar jobs. Anyone who has roamed the systems of a big company or talked recently to a CEO or founder can see it.
I get people telling me almost every day, "Well, you called it!" My book _[The War on Normal People](https://substack.com/redirect/d3209048-9bf5-4ddb-9022-4e546e2cda2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ projected many of these trends. It's cold comfort because my goal was always to galvanize energy around solutions. I believe our economy requires large scale overhauling if it's going to work for most Americans. I proposed Universal Basic Income. I'm distressed and angry that we are screwing over so many workers, particularly the next generation who will have the rug pulled out from under them or never even have a ladder to climb.
So what are the solutions for our young people?
First, we should acknowledge that a lot of knowledge work is going away. This is real. Just as we saw robots hit factories, we are seeing AI hit offices and corporations.
Second, to the extent it is possible, we should start channeling young people to resilient opportunities that will exist in the real world for years to come. My kids want to be YouTubers. I'm trying to talk them out of it. I know for most of the people reading this, you or your kid being an HVAC repairperson may not be realistic, but if there's something they have an interest in that's going to be needed in this era they should pursue it.
The recent job report indicates that health care jobs may continue to grow. An aging population and the difficulty of automating phlebotomy or home health care and an ongoing nursing shortage suggest that maybe if you head to this field your job will be safe. I certainly would feel more confident in someone pursuing a nursing degree than, say, a law degree. It's unclear to me though that the amount of resources to pay healthcare providers will continue to go up indefinitely as that money often comes from the government, which seems like it will be retrenching.
It's going to get hairy out there. August 1st, 2025 may go down as the date that AI started to show up in the jobs data. It will only speed up, as AI models are doubling in power every 7 months. Even I am shocked by the rate of change. Do all you can to prepare accordingly, and help others do the same. A lot of us may have to become more handy.
For the next no-phones Offline Party in New York City August 21st, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/7aaeef3f-8217-4b57-a467-2a72d724c5f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For my interview with Thomas Chatterton Williams on his new book _[The Summer of Our Discontent](https://substack.com/redirect/a3580e56-9386-45fc-b66a-38252c231dda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/08b81e22-4b39-40db-9453-ccd1b60b0961?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To see what Forward is doing in your area, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/645a0200-b232-436b-a6c4-f898ac6b90d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Remember to look up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c77b47a7-dab0-4d16-9272-eb06a785bc9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Michael Whatley
subject: This is Trump Country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whatley for Senate **Our mailing address is:**
body:
and I plan to keep it that way.

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aUXV/?__vbtrk=MzA4MDMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MDMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | Friend, The moment I announced my run for U.S. Senate, the Left went into full-blown meltdown.

They know I helped deliver North Carolina for President Trump,**THREE TIMES.**

They know I’ve fought to secure our elections, defend the Second Amendment, and stand up to the globalist elites.

And they know I won’t back down once I get to the Senate.
---
| | [ **STAND WITH MICHAEL** ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aUXV/?__vbtrk=MzA4MDMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA4MDMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | **That’s why they’re already dumping MILLIONS into this race to try to stop me. Biden’s allies. Hollywood liberals. Radical activists. They’re ALL coming for North Carolina.**

But here’s what they don’t get:

name: Mark, NRCC
subject: This news stung like a hornet. We’re out of options now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I can’t wait for another second to tell you about this crucial update.

Friend, it's Mark. I wish I were reaching out with better news.
There's no silver lining to this.
After yet ANOTHER House GOP resignation, we're searching for answers about how to move forward.
You see, we entered this year with a STRONG majority - but as time has passed, our House Majority has shrunk, little by little.
We're down to one of the thinnest majorities in modern history.
And that's cranking up the pressure on the mid-terms like never before.
There is NO margin for error this year, and the Democrats know it.
I'm not going to waste your time overwhelming you with fear tactics.
I'm just going to say this:
[If there's ever been a time for you to step up, it's right now, ahead of our critical JULY fundraising deadline.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zceiv2mnkb8j119ahjjvikbbipijnlhg0i9a88ho_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6coj4cdh2bs)

[You can donate $13 - one $ to help us take out EVERY Red-District Democrat in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7kg5umptfdl225hksceu8ba8j8fmer89ibd8v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6coj4cdh2bs)
[You can donate $26 - one $ for every vulnerable, battleground Republican we're defending from RUTHLESS Democrat lies and smears.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlnpj12u1v9qep4cq3mhrfn78n60m49vnbec24hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6coj4cdh2bs)
Or you can donate ANY amount - and I mean ANY amount - to show your support for the MASSIVE list of accomplishments we've already secured this year. [DONATE ANY AMOUNT NOW
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg4jbdrkkrkj8abbg53s73jtapjuebm1if8lo4u8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6coj4cdh2bs)Thank you in advance for your consideration and support, Friend.
Sincerely,
Mark @ House GOP| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z500447brvgf62cn7jmugjp046l66tc6phc6pc2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6coj4cdh2bs)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za617n5mr9dted7s076pdn6ss64a0l721cr0kf90_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zeq871mj3v9trum40vb78571b5mtge8mvmaau5k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb792k15gm26h72iqrinbtcnefedr7deeq7t0pco_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfgd7uhqj214c7v2pb54j6o86mlrv85050idscb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6io40rl7c019i8i346hmsijbdrun9effubsv83o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z39c0cbkfb14cb39n29r96d8at6j4hmir1224660_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpv807jlgaqtmmjmpa3n3p7hnm42dfoso4sv0rag_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb4319cf4g1eep337us8kq2t4737bkoibr5oa5lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z51cfd03antua0hjma1vpf20ma7b59sr5pfl7dho_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ao34c5h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zeavbuhq92aad06ce9as86d9qo7v42bakm29saro_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5c5j64pb0chgm49fg)

| | Hey Fellow Conservative, July is always a tough month for fundraising, and August is usually even tougher.

But here at Team Cruz, _we 're taking the summer slump as a challenge to tackle head on_...

We know our top liberty-loving patriot supporters understand that Ted is leading the charge in Washington to seize this moment and fix our broken federal government. If the radical-left Democrats prevail in the midterm elections they will do everything they can to OBSTRUCT and UNDERMINE our Trump-Republican agenda!
Today, we're asking every supporter to give Ted a boost and fuel our fight. [**PITCH IN NOW TO HELP US KICK OFF AUGUST STRONG >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-u-JxImXqk-UA) We won big last November, proving the pundits and the liberal media dead wrong, and now we have the opportunity to end woke nonsense for good and restore America's promise.

**The left is rallying like never before for a comeback.** We must be fully prepared.

Thank you in advance for any support you can send to help us get through the summertime slump and roll into the critical fall months strong!

\- Team Cruz

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Help Secure Our Elections—Before It’s Too Late
body:
Join the fight to ensure only citizens vote in our elections.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** ******************** ************************ Did you know that _non-citizens may be casting ballots_ in American elections? It's unacceptable--and it must be prevented. That's why August is Only Citizens Vote Month, and we're calling on grassroots patriots like you to take action. We're mobilizing thousands of concerned Americans to gather petition signatures in support of the SAVE Act, a vital bill that would require proof of citizenship to register to vote in federal elections. And we need _your_ help. Whether you wave signs, host an ice cream social, or simply ask your friends and neighbors to sign the petition, you'll get everything you need--training, tools, and support--to make a real difference in your community. And this month, we're going big. We're launching a 17-state **[Only Citizens Vote Bus Tour](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad049cd8/1edb9794acffb5c8 "Only Citizens Vote Bus Tour")** , traveling coast to coast--from California to Washington, DC--to shine a national spotlight on this issue and deliver the petitions directly to Congress. 👉 [**Sign up now to get involved and receive training**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad049cd8/1edb9794acffb5ca)
👉 **[Join a webinar to learn how you can help](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ad049cd8/1edb9794acffb5cc "https://events.zoom.us/eo/Ai3Kapz0NykpqnJmE0hfIfjgE5UTUyPDbAyLLOVb5P1TXYBltuSH~AggLXsr32QYFjq8BlYLZ5I06Dg")** You've already helped us achieve major wins this year--now it's time to finish strong. Join us in defending the integrity of our elections and ensuring that only U.S. citizens vote in U.S. elections. In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin
