name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znol3ld5vkqud9qr1cf2790d1rdqkhnp95a72ks8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4jifnjcns4ik8l6ljh97cr2v97ivf7d98kp28mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1b7hs21u7f26b695l9pkkrafnu5gtsrjs1pl5jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu40b5j8t3h667909dau9r64voqai8k6fapttnl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zocr28nt11i8jk6du3jh1ouebgkam1imdefii590_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zptrn052kchvortik1ql915lgiug9ifjinchp7qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7qbkjjjgn2u1khd0b8td6m61vv6obsudl7duo30_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3npnapb9k1v0ugqo74n95eeagqs31mkjlu50a50_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcu704q1umh34umdu0kip5f3ac196i4c9n5igcfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---

Just a few of our priorities in 2026 + beyond:
#
Peter — every day, Democrats are fighting to make our country better for EVERYONE... not just the billionaires + MAGA insiders supporting Donald Trump.
Here are just a few of Democrats’ priorities in 2026 + beyond:
🏥 **Affordable health care** — no matter your income or zip code
⚖️ **Reproductive freedom** — not government control over our bodies
📚 **Fully funded public schools** — not book bans + censorship
💵 **An economy that works for everyone** — not just the ultra-wealthy
🗳️ **Free and fair elections** — because our democracy is on the line
🌎 **Protecting our planet** — by taking action on climate + clean energy

### **Deep State** _**Fires A Warning Shot**_**At Your Vote** _**And**_**Your Future**
It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to _**put Trump behind bars**_.
To _**bankrupt him**_ through legal fees.
And to _**even assassinate him**_ ... twice!
But President Trump has prevailed each and every time. And despite having overcome these hits, one after another, the battle may still be far from over.
President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to _**"demolish the deep state, "**_ and claims this to be his _**" final battle"**_**** against these shadowy figures.
But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun.
Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always.
So, _**how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People**_ while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America?
_**[Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again?](https://substack.com/redirect/4c561951-5ea2-45a3-881a-050f08590b04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They _ARE NOT_ leaving things up to chance. They are helping to _**protect themselves**_ in case the Deep State has one more potential _ace up their sleeve._

subject: Social Security is on the line...

body:
Trump’s plans are almost complete...
| | **We’re trying not to freak out... but frankly, it’s hard not to.** **FIRST:** Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans made plans to get rid of Social Security for _millions of Americans._

**THEN:** Trump and DOGE fired Social Security workers to line the pockets of wealthy billionaires, including _Elon Musk!_

**NOW:** Democrats like Elizabeth Warren are _CALLING OUT_ Trump’s disastrous MAGA policies! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92656?t=6&akid=20785%2E878179%2EXvE8ZU) **If we don’t respond and stand up to Trump, we risk LOSING our Social Security FOR GOOD!**

[That’s why we’re calling on 204 Democrats from you state to join our Social Security Task Force TODAY. Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, and other Democrats are leading the charge to protect our benefits — but we need YOU to support our movement! Join the Social Security Task Force NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92656?t=7&akid=20785%2E878179%2EXvE8ZU) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92656?t=8&akid=20785%2E878179%2EXvE8ZU) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92657?t=9&akid=20785%2E878179%2EXvE8ZU)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdp649v7f03l9kgf55cjmnq6u5rllg33u9u3e0v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1dejbdr8mn86nkmo7c8i7b5goh0sqolj9kcpckg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmi1efo3qvmh0ch8j3p7or5lph8mq4o7uo2nl24g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0kit344kb2clp0ou3r27ej1ii1aat505gfv61n8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z71dgacg1o7g3chd16c2h1oosehvjcdlksirclk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zst4mo3kbevtmn4vi6gin7igkjn9bo3mflqvns80_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zevu1k6hfdq9vt03g3v1ajo0tchgn133omknbrlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjsk38bd9mtdcsv2l87uign5ftkldbfr75nlqr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv1mba6a4g520aedot8i6lt0hljhf3qk0vpu3cd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph6ap76cth2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

name: Powered by People
subject: Stop Trump and Abbott’s power grab
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Did you see
the news? Texas Democrats broke quorum to stop Donald Trump and Greg
Abbott’s scheme to redraw Texas’ congressional maps mid-decade and steal
five House seats.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250804-1.bNFNqM&refcode=ema20250804-240273&t=1002&akid=240273%2E444211%2EidH8VQ ]This is the moment when we all need to step up and fight back to save
our democracy. Can you donate $3 to Powered by People to
help us give everything we’ve got to stop Trump's power grab?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250804-1.bNFNqM&refcode=ema20250804-240273&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=240273%2E444211%2EidH8VQ ]DONATE $3

At Trump’s order, Greg Abbott called a special legislative session to
redraw Texas’ congressional districts—years before the next census. If
they succeed, they could steal up to five Democratic-held seats from blue
to red and hold on to the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.

Texas Democrats in the legislature are standing up for democracy and
working to stop Trump and Abbott from rigging the system in their favor.
They are breaking quorum in an attempt to deny Republicans the ability to
pass these new maps.

But everyone across the
country needs to be in this fight with them. We must meet
this moment to make sure millions of Texans keep their representation, and
Republicans aren’t able to cling to control after the midterms.

Powered by People is mobilizing people on the ground to stop this plan,
but we can’t do it without your grassroots support.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250804-1.bNFNqM&refcode=ema20250804-240273&t=1004&akid=240273%2E444211%2EidH8VQ ]Can you donate $3 to Powered by People today to fuel our
fight and protect our democracy?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250804-1.bNFNqM&refcode=ema20250804-240273&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=240273%2E444211%2EidH8VQ ]DONATE $3

This is a big fight, but our people-powered movement has the strength to
win.

Thank you,

– Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=240273%2E444211%2EidH8VQ

# [EPA lies about climate research in new report](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=170084732&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMDg0NzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzMTQyNTcsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkwNjI1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.lzQNdWXd5qxfJGUYWRQTMGmHnfmtxD_lqlip4C7rhFY)

I do this work because it's important and too many writers are afraid to speak with moral clarity. To support me and my work, please subscribe.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Ipn91NacijQfS6amnDuP8_K8-fJ4e9i3ZbA2SGpZM9Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170084732)
* * *
The U.S. Department of Energy[ released a report ](https://substack.com/redirect/bae044a0-25f5-4d6e-ae5c-1d5238ddd612?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)last week that, in theory, should help us better understand our rapidly changing world.
But instead of offering clarity, the report throws another wrench into the already grinding machinery of climate denial--at the very moment the planet needs the truth the most.
Billed as "a critical assessment of the conventional narrative on climate change," the document was introduced with fanfare on the same day the EPA announced it would seek to undo the 2009 _endangerment finding_ --the legal backbone that gives the agency authority to regulate greenhouse gases. That ruling, which once provided a bridge between science and public policy, now finds itself under siege by ideologues bent on severing that connection.
The new DOE report, cited as part of the EPA's justification for this rollback, leans heavily on a familiar playbook: cast doubt, inflate uncertainties, reframe fringe ideas as reasoned dissent. And while science demands questions, it does not abide misrepresentation. Nine researchers across a range of disciplines have already spoken out about how the DOE report distorted their findings, cherry-picked data, and omitted essential context.
"I'm a bit surprised the government put out something like this as an official publication," said Zeke Hausfather, a climate scientist with Berkeley Earth and Stripe. "It reads like a blog post--a somewhat scattershot collection of oft-debunked skeptic claims, studies taken out of context, or cherry-picked examples that are not representative of broader climate science research findings."
The authors behind the DOE report--four scientists and one economist--are well-known to the climate disinformation ecosystem. Three were hired by the Department in recent months, their arrival prompting alarm in the scientific community. Their resumes are dotted with contrarian takes that have long failed to survive scientific scrutiny, yet find eager audiences among political actors looking to delay or dismantle climate action.
The summary of the report confidently states that CO2-driven warming "appears to be less damaging economically than commonly believed," and that efforts to curb emissions may "be more harmful than beneficial." These are not new ideas--they are well-worn arguments that have been refuted, refined, and rendered irrelevant by decades of rigorous research. Still, here they are again, now with the imprimatur of the federal government.
DOE Secretary Chris Wright, flanked by EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin on Fox News, celebrated the report as part of[ "the largest deregulatory action in the history of the United States.](https://substack.com/redirect/37f5e285-fdf3-4e2f-bea6-a24136aa9051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" Wright lamented that science had been reduced to "Orwellian squelching," and insisted that "we need to restore some common sense around climate change and energy."
But this version of "common sense" resembles something closer to political theater than scientific deliberation.
The report's authors cite a 2019 paper by Hausfather, using a chart from its supplementary materials to suggest that climate models have overestimated CO2 concentrations. But Hausfather says the main finding of that paper was precisely the opposite: that historic climate models have been "remarkably accurate in predicting warming."
"They appear to have discarded the whole paper as not fitting their narrative," he said, "and instead picked a single figure... to cast doubt on models."
And he's not alone in this frustration. Joy Ward, provost at Case Western Reserve University, said the DOE misused her research to support the idea that more CO2 is a boon for plant growth. Her studies, she said, were conducted in "highly controlled growth conditions" and cannot be extrapolated to the chaotic, drought-prone, and heat-stricken ecosystems facing us now.
"With rising CO2 in natural ecosystems," Ward explained, "plants may experience higher heat loads, extreme weather events such as droughts and floods, and reduced pollinators--which can have severe net negative effects on plant growth and crop yields."
Meanwhile, ocean scientist Josh Krissansen-Totton of the University of Washington found his research--on ancient ocean acidification over billions of years--cited to downplay modern ocean chemistry changes. The DOE report claims that today's ocean pH decline is within "natural variability," ignoring the rapid shift in calcium carbonate saturation that is devastating to coral reefs and shell-building marine life.
"The much more gradual changes in ocean pH we observe on geologic timescales," he wrote, "were typically not accompanied by the rapid changes in carbonate saturation that human CO2 emissions are causing."
Even researchers whose work was accurately cited, such as Canadian marine ecologist Jeff Clements, expressed concern over how the report selectively framed the science. Clements, whose review questioned earlier studies on fish behavior, emphasized that his results "should not be interpreted to mean ocean acidification (or climate change more generally) is not a problem."
The problem, of course, is not that science doesn't evolve. It does. And scientists continue to ask hard questions and refine their understanding. But weaponizing ambiguity, as this report does, is not science--it's sabotage.
Ben Santer, one of the world's most respected climate researchers, saw his own work misrepresented in the DOE document. "These guys have a history of being wrong on important scientific issues," he said. "The notion that their views have been given short shrift by the scientific community is just plain wrong."
Santer clashed with some of the authors back in 2014, during a red-team/blue-team exercise convened by the American Physical Society. It was led by Steve Koonin, now a DOE report author and a former energy undersecretary, who later resigned from APS after it rejected his attempts to rewrite the society's climate stance. His efforts to replicate the debate format in the Trump White House also failed.
Richard Seager, a Columbia University climate researcher, echoed concerns over misrepresentation. A paper he coauthored on sea-surface temperature discrepancies was used to imply fundamental flaws in climate models. Seager noted that while model errors in the tropical Pacific are acknowledged, "what this means for the future... is very much an area of intense research."
That nuance, like so many others, is absent from the DOE's glossy report.
The Department of Energy is now seeking public comment. A spokesperson, Andrea Woods, said the agency could not respond thoroughly to _WIRED_ 's specific questions on short notice. She encouraged scientists to submit comments to the Federal Register instead.
"This report critically assesses many areas of ongoing scientific inquiry," Woods added, "that are frequently assigned high levels of confidence--not by the scientists themselves but by political bodies."
And yet, the true politicization of science is on full display in this report: five authors, four months, no peer review. Meanwhile, the congressionally mandated National Climate Assessment--assembled painstakingly by hundreds of experts--remains hidden from public view under the current administration.
"This has been released," said Hausfather, "at the same time that the government has hidden the actual... assessments that accurately reflect the science. It shows how much of a farce this is."
There is little comfort left in calling this sort of thing "disingenuous." It's worse than that. In a world fast approaching climate thresholds with real and irreversible consequences, turning away from hard-won scientific understanding is a choice--one with consequences measured in lives, lost ecosystems, and time we can't get back.

Aug 4 | | | | | | | | | | | I do this work because it's important and too many writers are afraid to speak with moral clarity. To support me and my work, please subscribe. The U.S. Department of Energy week that, in theory, should help us better understand our rapidly changing world. But instead of offering clarity, the report throws another wrench into the already grinding machinery of climate denial--at the very moment the planet needs the truth the most. Billed as "a critical assessment of the conventional narrative on climate change," the document was introduced with fanfare on the same day the EPA announced it would seek to undo the 2009 endangerment finding --the legal backbone that gives the agency authority to regulate greenhouse gases. That ruling, which once provided a bridge between science and public policy, now finds itself under siege by ideologues bent on severing that connection. The new DOE report, cited as part of the EPA's justification for this rollback, leans heavily on a familiar playbook: cast doubt, inflate uncertainties, reframe fringe ideas as reasoned dissent. And while science demands questions, it does not abide misrepresentation. Nine researchers across a range of disciplines have already spoken out about how the DOE report distorted their findings, cherry-picked data, and omitted essential context. "I'm a bit surprised the government put out something like this as an official publication," said Zeke Hausfather, a climate scientist with Berkeley Earth and Stripe. "It reads like a blog post--a somewhat scattershot collection of oft-debunked skeptic claims, studies taken out of context, or cherry-picked examples that are not representative of broader climate science research findings." The authors behind the DOE report--four scientists and one economist--are well-known to the climate disinformation ecosystem. Three were hired by the Department in recent months, their arrival prompting alarm in the scientific community. Their resumes are dotted with contrarian takes that have long failed to survive scientific scrutiny, yet find eager audiences among political actors looking to delay or dismantle climate action. The summary of the report confidently states that CO2-driven warming "appears to be less damaging economically than commonly believed," and that efforts to curb emissions may "be more harmful than beneficial." These are not new ideas--they are well-worn arguments that have been refuted, refined, and rendered irrelevant by decades of rigorous research. Still, here they are again, now with the imprimatur of the federal government. DOE Secretary Chris Wright, flanked by EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin on Fox News, celebrated the report as part of" Wright lamented that science had been reduced to "Orwellian squelching," and insisted that "we need to restore some common sense around climate change and energy." But this version of "common sense" resembles something closer to political theater than scientific deliberation. The report's authors cite a 2019 paper by Hausfather, using a chart from its supplementary materials to suggest that climate models have overestimated CO2 concentrations. But Hausfather says the main finding of that paper was precisely the opposite: that historic climate models have been "remarkably accurate in predicting warming." "They appear to have discarded the whole paper as not fitting their narrative," he said, "and instead picked a single figure... to cast doubt on models." And he's not alone in this frustration. Joy Ward, provost at Case Western Reserve University, said the DOE misused her research to support the idea that more CO2 is a boon for plant growth. Her studies, she said, were conducted in "highly controlled growth conditions" and cannot be extrapolated to the chaotic, drought-prone, and heat-stricken ecosystems facing us now. "With rising CO2 in natural ecosystems," Ward explained, "plants may experience higher heat loads, extreme weather events such as droughts and floods, and reduced pollinators--which can have severe net negative effects on plant growth and crop yields." Meanwhile, ocean scientist Josh Krissansen-Totton of the University of Washington found his research--on ancient ocean acidification over billions of years--cited to downplay modern ocean chemistry changes. The DOE report claims that today's ocean pH decline is within "natural variability," ignoring the rapid shift in calcium carbonate saturation that is devastating to coral reefs and shell-building marine life. "The much more gradual changes in ocean pH we observe on geologic timescales," he wrote, "were typically not accompanied by the rapid changes in carbonate saturation that human CO2 emissions are causing." Even researchers whose work was accurately cited, such as Canadian marine ecologist Jeff Clements, expressed concern over how the report selectively framed the science. Clements, whose review questioned earlier studies on fish behavior, emphasized that his results "should not be interpreted to mean ocean acidification (or climate change more generally) is not a problem." The problem, of course, is not that science doesn't evolve. It does. And scientists continue to ask hard questions and refine their understanding. But weaponizing ambiguity, as this report does, is not science--it's sabotage. Ben Santer, one of the world's most respected climate researchers, saw his own work misrepresented in the DOE document. "These guys have a history of being wrong on important scientific issues," he said. "The notion that their views have been given short shrift by the scientific community is just plain wrong." Santer clashed with some of the authors back in 2014, during a red-team/blue-team exercise convened by the American Physical Society. It was led by Steve Koonin, now a DOE report author and a former energy undersecretary, who later resigned from APS after it rejected his attempts to rewrite the society's climate stance. His efforts to replicate the debate format in the Trump White House also failed. Richard Seager, a Columbia University climate researcher, echoed concerns over misrepresentation. A paper he coauthored on sea-surface temperature discrepancies was used to imply fundamental flaws in climate models. Seager noted that while model errors in the tropical Pacific are acknowledged, "what this means for the future... is very much an area of intense research." That nuance, like so many others, is absent from the DOE's glossy report. The Department of Energy is now seeking public comment. A spokesperson, Andrea Woods, said the agency could not respond thoroughly to WIRED 's specific questions on short notice. She encouraged scientists to submit comments to the Federal Register instead. "This report critically assesses many areas of ongoing scientific inquiry," Woods added, "that are frequently assigned high levels of confidence--not by the scientists themselves but by political bodies." And yet, the true politicization of science is on full display in this report: five authors, four months, no peer review. Meanwhile, the congressionally mandated National Climate Assessment--assembled painstakingly by hundreds of experts--remains hidden from public view under the current administration. "This has been released," said Hausfather, "at the same time that the government has hidden the actual... assessments that accurately reflect the science. It shows how much of a farce this is." There is little comfort left in calling this sort of thing "disingenuous." It's worse than that. In a world fast approaching climate thresholds with real and irreversible consequences, turning away from hard-won scientific understanding is a choice--one with consequences measured in lives, lost ecosystems, and time we can't get back. name: Winsome Earle-Sears

body:

I hate to tell you this, but I got word that we fell short of our CRUCIAL End of Month Deadline last night. This is a crushing blow. But I'm not about to quit on our movement, Friend.
I've launched an internal extended deadline for the next ten minutes to give us one more shot at reaching this key Goal! Now, you have a choice. You can:

* Give up on our fight to keep Virginia red. The country will think conservatives aren't committed to building a better tomorrow for our nation and here in Virginia.

* [OR you can send in even just $16 to help me and my team reach our End of Month Extended Deadline Goal in the next ten minutes! We'll turn our virtually tied race into a HUGE win!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjgqc1uot8kfdp7keojmauvdt1a312mcd7bm6e3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cph69pb0cjh2bs)

Fellow activist,

We are only 3 months away from the November elections in PA, and to demonstrate just how critical the state Supreme Court retention elections are, we wanted to highlight some recent decisions made by the PA Supreme Court that impact our everyday lives.

**Take a look at a few examples:**
[****](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR-2F-2BsGqrbQ23aFzSDWcFvVwGKyx9QuJslIPj5jLKud7LKGG5-2BtNXJJLXPqatepk1Lb7h5QhUsC-2BSda2YEYBk9rs8-3D0-xz_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYTsstGvxly56nnCY2ebZjPiJdxVmAwAuJZ5JDsWA5KEj6n9Mb-2FwYrkMDrJ8diFZaNIbjOJHbCCwqq9ZW0wZFyCUnZ4jxMpjftdijB3fSJdIs4nkCRKhTV4VOGbqlZD7s2j1SG-2F1HBccgI2ZnvNO6YGvRELpYq06wTEptZzLV6XPQ8sttjZueqU34xJYHu7H3-2B)
---
* **Education (William Penn SD v. PA Dept. of Education):** A landmark decision ruling that PA’s school funding system is unconstitutional, alleging that the state failed to adequately and equitably fund public education.
* **Gerrymandering (League of Women Voters v. Commonwealth):** Congressional maps in PA were struck down as unconstitutional partisan gerrymander under the state constitution, and the state Supreme Court ordered the General Assembly to submit a new redistricting plan.
* **Voting Rights (Genser v. Butler County Board of Elections):** After two voters had their provisional ballots rejected during the 2024 PA primary election, the PA Supreme Court ruled that voters whose mail ballots are rejected may cast valid provisional ballots.
* **Abortion Rights (Allegheny Reproductive Health Ctr v. DHS):** The PA Supreme Court ruled that the state statute that bans abortion coverage through the Medicaid program violated the Equal Rights Amendment and equal protection provisions of the PA state Constitution.
* **Environmental Protection (Shirley v. Legislative Reference Bureau):** It was ruled that nonprofits can intervene to defend environmental regulations under the ERA.

**Here’s the deal:** Republicans are running an anti-retention campaign against three Democratically elected justices on the PA Supreme Court. They see these retention elections as their best chance to reverse the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court. If they are successful, we can expect to see very different judicial decisions.

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, We are only 3 months away from the November elections in PA, and to demonstrate just how critical the state Supreme Court retention elections are, we wanted to highlight some recent decisions made by the PA Supreme Court that impact our everyday lives. Take a look at a few examples: Education (William Penn SD v. PA Dept. of Education): A landmark decision ruling that PA’s school funding system is unconstitutional, alleging that the state failed to adequately and equitably fund public education. Gerrymandering (League of Women Voters v. Commonwealth): Congressional maps in PA were struck down as unconstitutional partisan gerrymander under the state constitution, and the state Supreme Court ordered the General Assembly to submit a new redistricting plan. Voting Rights (Genser v. Butler County Board of Elections): After two voters had their provisional ballots rejected during the 2024 PA primary election, the PA Supreme Court ruled that voters whose mail ballots are rejected may cast valid provisional ballots. Abortion Rights (Allegheny Reproductive Health Ctr v. DHS): The PA Supreme Court ruled that the state statute that bans abortion coverage through the Medicaid program violated the Equal Rights Amendment and equal protection provisions of the PA state Constitution. Environmental Protection (Shirley v. Legislative Reference Bureau): It was ruled that nonprofits can intervene to defend environmental regulations under the ERA. Here’s the deal: Republicans are running an anti-retention campaign against three Democratically elected justices on the PA Supreme Court. They see these retention elections as their best chance to reverse the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court. If they are successful, we can expect to see very different judicial decisions. Time is running out, and we need your help: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, New Pennsylvania Project Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information** New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

Hi Peter,

Last year, we were proud to support Debra Shigley’s candidacy for a highly competitive seat in the battleground state of Georgia. She ran against an extremist anti-choice opponent who helped push the state's cruel and deadly 6-week abortion ban. This law has already caused untold harm to women, including Adriana Smith, who was declared brain dead at 8 weeks pregnant and was subsequently placed on _life support_ for months so doctors could retrieve her baby via cesarean section.

The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male. Let that sink in.

The women of Georgia deserve so much more, and that starts with better representation in their government. That’s why we are thrilled to be supporting Debra Shigley once again as she runs for **a highly _flippable_ seat in the Georgia State Senate District 21. She needs our help to get across the finish line.**

# [Attorney General Tong Should Sue the Venture Capital Firms Who Ravaged Our Hospitals](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=170083026&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMDgzMDI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzMTY3NTcsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkwODc1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.X8hg8v0m5qUCiIb1w5i1XUzovZeBQsYgtsCi_2Bnveg)
### This Outrage Should Not Go Unchallenged
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)

August 4, 2025
Connecticut's Attorney General William Tong is suing the Trump administration for withholding funds from education, Planned Parenthood and disaster relief. He is also suing this adminstration for restricting health care to transgender youth. Whether these cases have merit remains to be seen.

But there is one group that Mr. Tong has so far given a pass: the venture capitalists who ravaged Connecticut hospitals while enriching themselves with hundreds of millions of dollars.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6fa766f0-1754-449a-98b2-0975c37381ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Attorney General William Tong
First some background. Prospect Medical Holding is a private equity group that purchases hospitals "with a core mission to provide quality, compassionate, and accessible healthcare."
In actuality, their goal is to buy hospitals, suck out the equity and pay investors and company executives gargantuan sums of money.
How did this happen? In 2010, a venture capital group, Leonard Green and Partners, bought a 60% stake in Prospect Medical Holdings for $363,000,000 and assumed their $158,000,000 debt. They then went on a rampage, buying hospitals across the country. In Connecticut, they purchased Manchester Memorial Hospital and Rockville Hospital for $105,000,000 and Waterbury Hospital for an undisclosed amount.
These hospitals owned the land on which they were housed. But Prospect Medical Holding sold this land along with the land of other hospitals across the country for $1.4 billion to a REIT (Real Estate Investment Trust) called Medical Properties Trust (MPT). Thus, the hospitals now had a huge expense they did not have before, monthly rent. Meanwhile, Leonard Green and Partners used Prospect Medical Holdings as the conduit to receive the money for these land purchases along with the cash flow from the hospital to borrow $1.1 billion. They paid off previous debts and then the executives of these companies took obscene salaries.
The Prospect Medical Holding CEO Sam Lee took home $128,000,000! Leonard Green and Partners, the majority owner of Prospect Medical Holdings, received [$658 million ](https://substack.com/redirect/df941d2b-5bcf-4520-aa37-d2ec8cfa26b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in dividends and management fees during its ownership of the hospital chain. While there are no public disclosures on how much the executives of Leonard Green and Partners pocketed, there are two managing partners, Jonothan Sokoloff and John G. Danhakl. [Sokoloff's net worth](https://substack.com/redirect/db913f9e-a269-46b4-a466-d97d1c84ca7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is estimated to be $150 million and [Danhakl is worth a cool $1.7 billion. ](https://substack.com/redirect/5c514f94-09f0-49aa-9ce0-dbd8df6ac9f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)It's safe to say these two each put at least $100,000,000 in their pockets.

Meanwhile, the once-thriving 102-bed Rockland Hospital that served the working-class Vernon community now only offers an emergency room, one-day surgical service and behavioral health services. And at Manchester Memorial doctors have not been paid, nurses are short-staffed and working like dogs while Prospect Medical Holding stopped funding their pensions.
And what happened when the staff tried to receive their compensation, if you said Prospect Medical Holdings [declared bankruptcy](https://substack.com/redirect/4e8f5cfe-0be2-4900-9231-7c32ea8451fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), go to the head of the class!

So now what happens to these hospitals? Either some other conglomerate buys them, or they must close. [Yale attempted](https://substack.com/redirect/9fb92589-43aa-4552-89e9-0edd43331271?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to do so but no agreement could be reached. Prospect Medical Holdings' bankruptcy caused two hospitals in the Philadelphia area to close and then patients had to pay $75 to get access to their records.
And it gets worse. For example, Waterbury Hospital owes the Town of Waterbury $29,000,000 in back taxes. But with Prospect Medical Holdings in bankruptcy, the taxpayers will get the bill.
And to add insult to injury, the bankruptcy judge approved an incentive program for six top executives, including undisclosed salary boosts, aimed at retaining key personnel during the hospital-sale process. Thus, the same people who raped the hospitals will generate huge fees by trying to sell the hospitals they destroyed. You can't make this up.

Mr. Tong simply cannot allow this without a fight. Leonard Green and Partners must be sued along with Sokoloff, Danhakl and Lee personally - preferably in the Waterbury Courthouse.

State governments are often reluctant to take on corporate America because these corporations have extensive political connections and access to brilliant lawyers. But Tong graduated from Phillips Academy, Brown University (with honors) and the University of Chicago Law School. Even if one does not agree with his politics, he must be a sharp guy. He can figure out how to make a strong case while showcasing the malfeasance of these executives.

And even if Tong does not win, he will become a hero to many voters outside of the Democratic bailiwick. This destruction of community hospitals by avaricious venture capitalists who game the system cannot go unchallenged.
Contact Dr. Bentivegna at [jfbentivegna@gmail.com](https://substack.com/redirect/12e59687-2507-4037-856e-8bac131651ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Your healthcare has been going to scammers and illegals – NOT IN MAGA AMERICA

| | | | **[BREAKING
HEALTHCARE ANNOUNCEMENT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu0hgvria85ce8paesnit4bb89bn69q0kkdnshco_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj60ob4cph2bs)**

RFK Jr. just dropped a **BOMBSHELL **on Democrats that will **TRANSFORM AMERICAN HEALTHCARE!**
The disastrous and out-dated “prior-authorization” process has just been **SCRAPPED.**
For decades, doctors in America have had to waste 12 hours to **AN ENTIRE WEEK** just to complete insurance paperwork for one patient.
That delay could mean **MONTHS** before a patient could even begin treatment!
**All while $14 BILLION in taxpayer dollars are being funneled to fraudulent Medicaid recipients — and our seniors are stuck waiting to be seen?!**
**_NOT ANYMORE._**

**[RFK Jr. just CUT through the bureaucracy to help hardworking Americans get the care they NEED and DESERVE.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8jcajdj9jc59kt515e6mqjet5uiq98vnjiluo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj60ob4cph2bs)**

And now? They’re circulating a petition to **BOOT RFK JR.** from President Trump’s cabinet, **UNDOING** this entire insurance-reform deal!
That’s why we’re launching the **“MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY AGAIN” COUNTER-PETITION**

We’re asking every proud conservative to **TAKE A STAND** and send Democrats a message:

**"[THE DAYS OF DEMOCRAT MISMANAGEMENT ARE OVER!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfbl1v1u4i5b8brgaog1frnvkdl2ue7vmljjk35o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj60ob4cph2bs)"**

We’re currently **LESS THAN 2,150 SIGNATURES** away from our **1 MILLION SIGNATURE** goal — and the **MIDNIGHT DEADLINE** is rapidly approaching.

**[Your signature could be the one that puts us OVER THE TOP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb5ldotcuqp4b4f6to729r91ejaeqroq4pk7nf7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj60ob4cph2bs) **

********
Time is critical. This reform is _**NOT**_ signed into law yet. If RFK Jr. is removed, **_EVERYTHING HE’S EVER ORDERED COULD BE ERASED_.**

[SIGN THE “MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY AGAIN” PETITION NOW!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr3h31mqk8kjhp35ieuc5a4ldfl6448q964p7li0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj60ob4cph2bs)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cb2551b1a0494b45a95a3c8b77ec2b3e&_e=6pTOGmmVi6LUMBKBwxStUQpDccP8VTwQS-XJbQ9fkYHdvWiC51gsCIdFwrpPBub8cyEqN_RBo5H0W7tjpbwdsx7u7MilRpqv9DvpvQoTYxJFtNvyesTlXfdkSCEzWbCBpE6l2nXVMLaUjL3VAh3mcJcWPCLvgj0khscdxYdcCg2Iguccz5ZOYc_mlV7mmPzuVj_8VUTn5C46NLXX5JZtAQTi6iBJTsvTLDFCwG3ZfuG7y32063Lj4JNMWOWZO7UG7TI2GLjqwNWqb28Pw9AbY0hv5q1dv969UjBuupZVY1gXQemUMmiiTv78t78qp8-MvNt9TIiACYdLt9NyTFyXJaBFMir1o2ee2MkQQxS0bH3thPp1q_2ncoC8qYnUieXPR7Yz1u0ll0FoN5rseM9VfHJoPx7luSM7dQkEajWOqIsnxYyinoFD68m9LOTqWnS3jycZiWeweH-Fe-t3vOVm1s0y6pSbbbjBU0hu1xPZE83zhNKJyFK6rYS8p3aZYhc9I7ICgWsV2hHqF-2wRHbO65q1ssglX1d3UASyXzQ2WNsjduhmryddZK3pLqKKKFatNdtbV6LRogaIUsMogIAVflsWYoWSpFq0lFUNzCogwKCs32lXjD7YFEGf5zfhIOEs9SPc8MRXwhtaTNMc08-6VJzZfKlLYGWfoflCcnTMW_spS13g4bT2Xh_8_Ny3H2PJnuamCyN43M__0-Ct04J_IQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: If you're with us, don't wait another day

body:
Here are three reasons why you should make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia.
Peter, if you've been waiting to make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia, now's the moment. Here are three reasons why:
✅ Our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power.
✅ Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far.
✅ And if we win big here, it will give a big boost to Democrats heading into 2026.
Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors.
_Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in._
**[If you're with us, don't wait another day! Split a contribution of $10 or even more between Abigail Spanberger's campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us build a winning campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92985?refcode=em20250804-9199&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9199%2E614464%2E94gT0y)**

clean_body: Here are three reasons why you should make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia. Peter, if you've been waiting to make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia, now's the moment. Here are three reasons why: ✅ Our race is the biggest election since Trump returned to power. ✅ Republicans have spent over $1 million on TV and digital ads so far. ✅ And if we win big here, it will give a big boost to Democrats heading into 2026. Here in Virginia, there is no limit to how much individuals can donate to candidates for office. For that reason, our opponent has been raking in money from far-right megadonors. Our average online donation is around $30, but what's more important is the number of people who pitch in. Those battles will be tough -- and flipping Republican-held seats will take bold and brilliant strategy. With so much on the line, we can't leave anything to chance. **This survey will only take a moment of your time, but your voice will make a real difference in how we fight back.

name: Maisy Deans, Evergreen
subject: What to do while Congress is out
body:
This is where you come in
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3843438/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

Starting TODAY, you have a **can’t-miss opportunity** for effective climate advocacy.

If I gave you _everything_ you need to fight back against Trump’s disastrous budget law and pressure Congress not to give up on our future, **would you do it?** |
---
[GET THE TOOLKIT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3843439/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| _“The first step is to do your part in a government of, by, and for the people by using your power, which is your voice.”_ – Rep. Jennifer McClellan

Last Friday, we talked to **Representatives Ro Khanna and Jennifer McClellan** about why YOU have unique power in this moment to make sure climate and clean energy action keep moving forward in the wake of the budget bill. ([You can catch the recording here.](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3843440/87SdQ4wZ))

And now, with help from Sierra Club and LCV, we’ve built a comprehensive toolkit that gives you everything you need to make a real difference.

This August recess, while your members of Congress are back in their home districts, is a one-of-a-kind opportunity to **hold Congress accountable for the budget bill and impact what comes next.** |
---

---

---
|
* Step-by-step instructions for connecting with your members of Congress, including specific tactics based on how they voted on the disastrous budget bill
* Detailed talking points you can pick and choose from to craft the message that means the most to you
* Ways to connect with local climate groups who are already planning recess advocacy
* Scripts, templates, and checklists to make it easy for you to get involved

|
---
| **Don’t let this critical moment pass.**[**Get the toolkit today!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3843442/87SdQ4wZ)

In solidarity, |

Derek — Virginia’s House of Delegates is within reach. Just a handful of seats in the House separate Republicans from taking back the majority from us, which would be disastrous if we hope to elect a Democratic trifecta in November. Thankfully, we have strong nominees in all 100 districts, including the most vulnerable seats held by Republicans. These Red-to-Blue seats are an amazing pickup opportunity to expand our majority — and we’re going all in to help them win. _**Here are some Red-to-Blue champions:**_
✔️ Elizabeth Guzman (HD-22)
✔️ Lily Franklin (HD-41)
✔️ May Nivar (HD-57)
✔️ Jessica Anderson (HD-71)
✔️ Leslie Mehta (HD-73)
✔️ Lindsey Dougherty (HD-75)
✔️ Kimberly Pope-Adams (HD-82)
✔️ Kacey Carnegie (HD-89) These races are winnable. But not without your support. | **************[Flip red to blue: Donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112714579/561380660/-515994349?refcode=E14451-20250804-RtB1-SB-DPVA-2025Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGNhNTAwYS00MTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JV-IIINMt0XnyYQClzSpbK6jXURE_4TIiECPw9XzATc=)**************

With MAGA Republicans pushing a dangerous agenda in Virginia and across the country, we cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. These candidates will protect public education, defend reproductive freedom, and fight for working families — but only if we give them the resources to win.
We’re organizing everywhere. Voter contact is underway. But our success depends on what we raise _right now._
**[Pitch in today and help flip the House of Delegates — and keep Virginia moving forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112714580/561380661/-515994349?refcode=E14451-20250804-RtB1-SL-DPVA-2025Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGNhNTAwYS00MTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JV-IIINMt0XnyYQClzSpbK6jXURE_4TIiECPw9XzATc=)**

name: Texas Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Trump wants rigged maps
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Democrats must prioritize building and securing more state legislative majorities across the map if we want to go toe-to-toe with the GOP on redistricting. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**FIRST:** At Trump’s direction, Texas Republicans used their state legislative majority to re-draw congressional maps with the goal of adding five new GOP seats ahead of the 2026 midterms. _They want to cement the Republican House majority for another two years._ **THEN:** Texas state Democrats left the state to stop Republicans from adopting these rigged maps, prompting far-right Gov. Abbott to threaten Democrats with expulsion. **NOW:** **Democrats must prioritize building and securing more state legislative majorities across the map if we want to go toe-to-toe with the GOP on redistricting.** [Will you chip in $7 to stand with the DLCC and state Democrats to help defeat MAGA Republicans in upcoming elections nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdgMwEgg_hyTxiyPlAvwmN-QMv1LaEzJ0-2iGcVtFBMcanva1lsQiAxSyqR5Lu0cF6K2RqBS72Nam6fmWwPWP5fmRv6lJO7DeV4cqtPpe-buyut39eP51ImjTc7A3r7ZIFmGnryTT51QPS6eH9xF8F0t0BMcAkV8apQ3uanwl45mwMyeCdv2JH8UeQS2r24ZxIXuF_28DyybsswWCehd2mkjoveqHyzow7hrcCDOl314jYYaQ6Y9VkZAr8LD7s4J9nL71FDDOvRHa3WYX5_KByUX4_NrAFlTKD1UiDIIpv6IubrRTjhHDW-YDK0NhTDzqH13vy1562byC1jcv1jbsDJJFVm_d3-YevBil2lDQunA-k44rL0DZpw4ZCRnL0-R-mgttRjsa_MZLH5QoV2_OjCZcfU1pvFRXc9ZAWVp4UtM9Zo7o2bQ_q-dtBeKGAbQWiuz8EB-9A4vH-l2w7gitn2MjgWUpSgtdtazh8NOwwgSog0EeIGrfh6iBh4yOIv9H059rh-quDYvVcJmxVLB1p9ICQgMpNTEzBQww1R-kchmU/4ir/s09grVdhRGC2ix7pmJnOrA/h0/h001.yjSV8FW6P0ssjQiaBYgG8EXdaUtAGoVC4n_kc4FfQJA) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

They want to cement the Republican House majority for another two years. THEN: Texas state Democrats left the state to stop Republicans from adopting these rigged maps, prompting far-right Gov. Abbott to threaten Democrats with expulsion. name: =?utf-8?b?QmV0byBP4oCZUm91cmtl?=
subject: Texas Democrats broke quorum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
It’s Beto O’Rourke here.
Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.
But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.**
And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders.
They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for.
Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up the fight.
**[Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can to Powered by People and Deb Haaland to support these brave lawmakers?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250804_1_split_ms-pxp-em-haaland?amount=5&refcode=em20250804-3596&refcode2=3596_400544_kseY_Y&akid=3596%2E400544%2EkseY_Y)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250804_1_split_ms-pxp-em-haaland?amount=5&refcode=em20250804-3596&refcode2=3596_400544_kseY_Y&akid=3596%2E400544%2EkseY_Y)**
Let’s make sure they know we’ve got their backs—and that they’re not in this fight alone.
With gratitude,
Beto
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=3596%2E400544%2EkseY_Y)

clean_body: ** THE DEMOCRAT LIES AND SMEARS ARE FLYING IN! Peter, this is Rep. Mike Collins. I'm trying to write you as calmly as I can. Democrat Jon Ossoff just blasted out an email to thousands of his leftist supporters, including YOUR neighbors, straight up lying about my record and disparaging my name. . .**** But here's the God-honest truth: I don't care about the name-calling. I don't care about being called a "MAGA extremist". And I certainly don't care if Jon Ossoff hates the fact that I want illegal aliens kicked off medicaid and DEPORTED from our country. But what I do care about is the MILLIONS of dollars he 's raking in by firing out defamatory texts, emails, and campaign letters just like this.**** . . It's a hard pill to swallow, Peter, but Republicans like you and me are being outraised and outspent right now. And it 's not hard to see why. The Democrats are swelling their campaign coffers off Trump Derangement Syndrome, and they're counting on you to be ASLEEP at the beach while they build a war chest big enough to buy this election. Frankly, they 're saying Ossoff has "unstoppable" momentum. And they know that if you WAIT until next summer to fight back, they'll have a lead so big that even Kirby Smart and the Georgia Bulldogs couldn't mount a comeback. A LOSS in this race could very well mean the Senate falls back to Democrat hands. I don't need to explain to you what comes next: . -> Wide open borders and b**lanket amnesty for illegal aliens ** . -> Massive t**ax hikes on small buseiness and working-class Americans ** . -> **ICE agents and police officers defunded, demonized, and punished ** . ->**Insane transgender ideologies forced on our kids and grandkids ** . -> **Big Tech Censors controlling our elections and silencing your voice . And that 's just scratching the surface, Peter. So I'm giving it my all to defeat Jon Ossoff, and I'm asking you to give your all too. But you can 't wait. I need to know if I can count on your support right now. . .** **.** The future of America is on the line and the America First promise LIVES or DIES on the outcome of this election. . My campaign can 't run on fumes when we get down to the final stretch. And as you can see, this race is already proving to be one of the most expensive and highest-stakes in the country. Without your support today, Peter, Republicans like you and me are asking for a repeat of 2020 and 2022. . This is battleground Georgia we 're talking about! It's time to fuel up and hammer down. Will you rush over $10 or more to my campaign? Yes, $10. That 's all I'm asking. . . . I don't need a million-dollar check to win this thing. And I definitely don't need celebrity endorsements from Hollywood or the big wigs in D.C. To kick my campaign into overdrive and steamroll Democrat Jon Ossoff, all I need is the support of red-blooded Americans like you. Now 's not the time to sit back and act like we've won it all. It's time to press on the gas and CEMENT the MAGA promise for YEARS to come. Will you chip in $10 or more to help me fight against the MILLIONS Jon Ossoff is using to attack my character and destroy my campaign? . . . You can bet he knows what's at stake. And you can bet every Democrat in America is standing behind him. But the real question is: Will you stand behind me? Thank you for any and all support. I owe you big time. . Godspeed, Rep. name: Chef Andrew Gruel
subject: A Chef’s Take: How we fix our food and our planet
body:
As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zghlsg4gja2cfes1n7iritppld749pt4ds56umc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36c9h2bs)
Friend,

>From the kitchen to the coastline, I’ve seen the power of sustainability firsthand.

As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

Because when we protect our environment, we’re not just saving trees or oceans. We’re preserving access to clean air, clean water, and real food packed with nutrients.

At my restaurants, I’ve built everything around sustainability, sourcing traceable seafood, supporting responsible aquaculture, and working directly with ranchers and fishermen who care about long-term health over short-term gain.

But no chef, no restaurant, and no individual can do this alone.

We need a national movement to fight for clean water, regenerative agriculture, and responsible stewardship.

That’s where the American Conservation Coalition (ACC) comes in.

**ACC is leading the charge for a cleaner, more sustainable America — _without_ the heavy hand of government mandates.**

They’re building a movement of young, pro-environment conservatives who believe we can protect both our health and our freedoms.

I’m so passionate about their approach that I told the American Conservation Coalition I would help them raise $10,000 before the end of the month to support their mission.

[Please join me today in supporting ACC by donating any amount you can generously afford to support a healthier, more beautiful America! Even $10 makes a difference. >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7qi3133c9rpaumb92g93uf88bvlt1cd9gb9a29g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36c9h2bs)

The American Conservation Coalition is building the conservative environmental movement. Their goals? To:

👩🏻🌾 **Restore regenerative farming practices** rooted in health and sustainability
🏞️ **Conserve America’s natural resources** for future generations
☣️ **Reduce toxins** in our food, water, and air
✅ **Promote real solutions** that create healthy communities and families

ACC empowers young conservatives to join the national discussion concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, regenerative agriculture, and more.

With over 80,000 members, ACC branches complete local clean-up projects, influence local, state, and national environmental policy, and drive change that embraces common-sense solutions to the health crises and environmental problems we face.

Friend, this isn’t about politics.

It’s about conserving the things that nourish us – our land, oceans, and our children’s future – _not through mandates or government overreach_ , but by protecting what makes this country beautiful.

**If you believe that thoughtful conservation can heal ecosystems and communities, then I urge you to support the American Conservation Coalition by donating today!**
[Donate Now >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zco1mmd33fe2ll2ru93h18umvtukg4hip85jep08_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36c9h2bs)
Thank you for standing up for health, freedom, and the future.

Chef Andrew Gruel

clean_body: As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities. | | | Friend, From the kitchen to the coastline, I’ve seen the power of sustainability firsthand. As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities. Because when we protect our environment, we’re not just saving trees or oceans. We’re preserving access to clean air, clean water, and real food packed with nutrients. At my restaurants, I’ve built everything around sustainability, sourcing traceable seafood, supporting responsible aquaculture, and working directly with ranchers and fishermen who care about long-term health over short-term gain. But no chef, no restaurant, and no individual can do this alone. We need a national movement to fight for clean water, regenerative agriculture, and responsible stewardship. That’s where the American Conservation Coalition (ACC) comes in. ACC is leading the charge for a cleaner, more sustainable America — without the heavy hand of government mandates. They’re building a movement of young, pro-environment conservatives who believe we can protect both our health and our freedoms. I’m so passionate about their approach that I told the American Conservation Coalition I would help them raise $10,000 before the end of the month to support their mission. The American Conservation Coalition is building the conservative environmental movement. Their goals? To: 👩🏻🌾 Restore regenerative farming practices rooted in health and sustainability 🏞️ Conserve America’s natural resources for future generations ☣️ Reduce toxins in our food, water, and air ✅ Promote real solutions that create healthy communities and families ACC empowers young conservatives to join the national discussion concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, regenerative agriculture, and more. With over 80,000 members, ACC branches complete local clean-up projects, influence local, state, and national environmental policy, and drive change that embraces common-sense solutions to the health crises and environmental problems we face. Friend, this isn’t about politics. It’s about conserving the things that nourish us – our land, oceans, and our children’s future – not through mandates or government overreach , but by protecting what makes this country beautiful. If you believe that thoughtful conservation can heal ecosystems and communities, then I urge you to support the American Conservation Coalition by donating today! Thank you for standing up for health, freedom, and the future. Chef Andrew Gruel The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition’s tax identification number is 82-3815628. Celebrating 15 years of fighting for election integrity
| | | | August 04, 2025 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.V3w8YMCG4nRbND5mzNN4kDMB-DsSVFFhDy-o1OwWzilyI3mIKr6K-jmvKZFQFdY7kbxU2MKPBElmebbVchshFmPBA1PELI4SSwUcXs-Or1-kKAz6IYvifKzIrM9Ja9OgjCn-RwERbXcBiAmO4NY3rUZ_W3dj7dth0WtoZplY5nfsDJOLAmt6YPFNE-O4jgZv_4i4Q7VMQ-p1H93SkBduHLYOLnsjcqIYHnvwi3WBAWVJUpvfckRiOwLt-aGC-iNp1PJHRYZiL-KPATnGRojSSUVrheKbTM6J7pWkwNYbtBdbR7VsUWewV7GdmSHMIfxci5LtSMMRY1FDbibBXGiNcvQD0Aozu8MzGQ3PbYmzu8szsLCRd4imYujzg7hxn7eVxuz3QbNQpS-BkpvPOEWZvxVLc3At7urTBFv24sybhKKBTzyQ-ZeNcQKb5VRfgTKW8Y3s19n46wrXOu4UeAl2YibhjS-Xr4DhtwfB0pE3bRwY7ow73GkYOC9ymz-x_fGaVW_Mn6etRfAWFLCOzj18c7YKwTV0Ej-GNXPb4QEuV14d67NxiiCokxxsYINdU6RyH7MpSnVrRxblwigk9zX-Jg5h_WIekMW0GZOIQ5zxOjHpyDo2YbTDH0sXAlY9bejGD-rNHJhqBSLSzuV61odzP392Ysgq57tZnOgcR26--Q1uaUWrheREAN5LXKdnO_uqZdg5GcZESX8i3Jqg1WoMt4xWzZ3bwEEFb76AjPVC0VKSstGXLxa_UUQrNTgjMbMfrE9AX-SRksUeaRpngRiym2gU0JPTQ-DkL3emuYoXK6Q/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h0/h001.2SSR0YDto-PAmLW481SJRfc3ojithbcUbqZkBlgku_0)
