| Hi Friend -
---
Fifteen years ago, in July of 2010, we stepped into the arena.
We chased truth. We challenged power. We fought to break through ceilings others said couldn’t be broken. We prayed that America would wake up — and inch by inch, she has.
Today, we see something extraordinary: people are rising. On their own. In their communities. For their country.
This is the legacy we’ve built together. Quietly. Steadily. Without seeking headlines. But with hearts on fire for liberty.
Over the past fifteen years, we’ve accomplished more than most thought possible:
* We brought national awareness to the need for clean voter rolls—and helped get them cleaned. (In fact, we filed and won the very first NVRA Section 8 lawsuits in our nation’s history)
* We trained thousands of election workers nationwide, building a national brigade of poll watchers in years when very few even knew the position existed.
* We fought the IRS in court — and won — helping to end the targeting of pro-liberty organizations and improving the nonprofit application process for groups across the country.
* We helped pass election integrity legislation in states from coast to coast.
* We supported and equipped hundreds of grassroots organizations and tens of thousands of citizens working to safeguard elections in their communities.
* We developed the first-ever citizen-led voter roll research database, now known as[ IV3](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.ZOvxkEhKDw9DETb6Ummm9zQuo-zt7v1AcpXkOLMbvNt6YrZM562R3uGahNjwIn7jkGt_IWnw-uSgtquK_mdpjjdISa-tLImUGCjFLnGJ8wiTGekRP4_8qsbR4gvrGXhvGUpRRahhMd56QXOS5Bdrvu3a7oiZIx-FoIuO-5PcpPPx2a4ha-s60LqgpemN7sBhtD-yu3kwn1psbRUoBkmBImXRjeM5bOu32RuV1RwTLsA/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h2/h001.6wZjgj6S1mT8-5rN2ewZaaK1n8lIYwMsaxZX5QDRvZs).
* We launched the first mobile app for election worker reporting, first as VoteStand, and after it was targeted and ultimately removed from the app stores, we relaunched as [VoteAlert](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.QaMHj7Qq1DDbDECCtYugmAHxKQRoU6lXtZdwF-D70_upyg-YyrOhoNbDuNYWjg-GsdjYNuPYfRtChfPsABiOhqkvIMAMKko4ujHsWpsgrLUsN4lnfdMvQl1fo9wqeMWHZ06VOC4gs0Ca5F3fOKqDtXvjOEcIftCbJST1N2qwAOe2DUNLc2gDqUWt-Z9A1PgRIdDcpg5BrqhPmHJM2maE0DnBJJSm7HoZZKBPG3-yenM/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h3/h001.2cF9CqdCk7XkQaNw2TcwzWklaIBnWkqNQgUT3m-BqxI).
* We stood firm in dozens of lawsuits, [fighting back](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6e_tt3v5FcyxfBAwX8eOipG1RfV2slKZYC8SGox98vd-RtZERLCCRH8AJu_RwpdOaKRNXrbCZhUJaCs9GQ6Up7XWm3o9W3GKU1SDxp-6qSfpHd2P0aNCgg1sRX_Dvt1bOHOQjc2tu_XGSexASj1utdVrsqKLBFZtSdzGBgvT1VRDPPSuk5VtDJCSYq4hgId5gx4to0u-P5nMw6t_wEzMJtuXd-JjtCF45OtAJckzVXLkq2V0x1z3GQ8UhjPU7uNtO313aVXc1O99zPj9rlTXOyWH_HX7R9A05tf8_-_auvYsMnEq5oNzpPuIq2BMCkB8Zu8dc-jO_L7ycjTzCvrdYP7LN8I6LlIkGC-H6AW7f9B2woM9_Zp8Kn7cLdWV8Dn71p-TSnFCSQWBnufWVMMQIwTL-AE05kWv8Z6njasAmjO1/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h4/h001.PnS4F9qlM4U0bT0uu1HFt79V77Bh5_zamN_QvRX-Wgo) against the likes of Marc Elias, Stacey Abrams, and the Biden and Obama DOJs - and winning. _(Interesting note: prior to starting True the Vote in 2010, I’d never been in court. Since starting True the Vote, I’ve never been out.)_
* We exposed [widespread ballot drop box abuse](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Qnzdaf1G_a1z2_KOIqFO6AuhcM65GRYWidoU0yP_01BAFJ0GHK8xaTx3apAuQEEHfBYu6Rcx9tBc2G5cuDAawkSxm8Cl1H6pMdCtjz-QUkkCo8jgX3ouTZtSL0FHmsP4DvoR8He1iY2oTF-iEIICMgLMFsci5CCvYC9gWdyFFzhxpqIdyLf8RHuKzSpIfps4Tguknwk1vFwOgF1q6jWXamz3uV0HnTHC0pLTuMpnK8-/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h5/h001._wdqvjgH-lhH_brxs1YQkHO5F2WWRIiA3ARxJSO-I0A) using geospatial (cell phone) data and stood firm against cowardice, cover-ups, and false claims that the work had been debunked, helping change the national debate on mail-in ballots and ballot drop boxes, and radically improving election integrity nationwide.
* We exposed [CCP-linked efforts to infiltrate U.S. election systems](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6aJ-qw2ZcytwUjOhb8IQ1tdMYc--7BNT2wG14M8MsfH8wMwy8n5DZYr-9A8fYyKIB5Dy16Ee4cqPsFT2VTlyBvST4OsHGBa49-QqYM7IhAIFKtCW9HuboDsH3KB90DUxz3-8L8Btm-UWp8Zgk3CWH8alnONnL1-Q5YM5X-n1_CvlJw1XtaGUS0tKbqX0TcHNbXKpnZJ5FwzYqKAX6CCNuU1cRsGO8XrsTXLA0aFe9uCZ/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h6/h001.gY0grot8DcM7cld9hl0n0c9OK4_xGJo8kqrXd3fjps4) (which led to a federal court judge sentencing Gregg Phillips and I to prison, only to be released by Emergency Order of the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals and recusal of the judge).
* And so much more: more stories we could tell, and certainly more to come.

For fun, we put a mash-up video together, featuring bits of our work from the past few years and kicked off by the very first video interview we ever did, with the amazingly wise David Horowitz. We could never have imagined the adventures that awaited us ...
[| | [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Ur26RXVGdHypG5WgXqOaBhpyRyqaGE0SeBtq1gF3flPveuKlmTKlb8Vl7Brn8QNYW1a32MhQ9bXm5ukNH9D9ZgcHVujPJtddxbVR6g8LHSLqb1YovFfmtmaed6GIKF4wjz5gGlpjok45ipaRCUXtATS_zUa3PcKpB2J1gk0ULm3DSymstc-hA3Lq9exnSiDv9XzU6XHbVPjTigYxAUV38gt7vgPoq5UItgMbGzNCKR-0E9sGdYMzvjerv7HjeZOv/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h8/h001.40EcEj7uqRR8mM0F5Sx5eeEYwnWZ4d6XeO3GBfIER6g)

TTV 2010 - 2025 ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Ur26RXVGdHypG5WgXqOaBhpyRyqaGE0SeBtq1gF3flPveuKlmTKlb8Vl7Brn8QNYW1a32MhQ9bXm5ukNH9D9ZgcHVujPJtddxbVR6g8LHSLqb1YovFfmtmaed6GIKF4wjz5gGlpjok45ipaRCUXtATS_zUa3PcKpB2J1gk0ULm1jjNMYPYh8yh50Zv1dPdD1utbTUBEKSiHOYZ96lbm6KFnJCzkSXADU2Cr3OnKyyqozmYxfUM6YpE59i0-5rjKE/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h7/h001.YfsGqhgkmGwUSsFhb-PowFuEEIqkLtfaSSayQy7PM3U)
Here is the danger we now face: we cannot forget the fundamentals. In a time when artificial intelligence and synthetic media threaten to blur reality itself, we must hold fast to what is real, our voices, our votes, our communities, and our faith.
Over the years, politicians have failed us more often than they’ve helped.
But the American people? You have never failed. You are awake. You are aware. You are powerful.
Take that power and apply it. Call your local board of elections. Ask how you can serve. Even if just 1% of those reading this email today take that next step into local election service you could help change the course of history.
Never underestimate what you can do.
Over these fifteen years, I’ve been accused of awful things. I’ve been tracked, threatened, poisoned, imprisoned, and sued — relentlessly. And I count it all as victory. Because we are still standing. Still fighting. Still growing.
True the Vote will not stop.
As we near what we’ve called “voter singularity”— when the same data used to support elections may be twisted into a digital control grid — we must hold the line. We must never give in, never give way, and never forget why we fight.
Because this has never been about politics. It has always been about liberty.
And as we look toward the future, it feels like the start of Act Two. If the first act was about standing against corrupt men, this next may be about standing against machines, to preserve our humanity and our freedom.
Thank you for coming along with us on this incredible journey. Though it’s rocky, steep, and full of twists and turns, the road less traveled still leads to liberty.
Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW!
Ever onward -
|
---
[P.S. The only way we can stay standing in this fight is with your help. If you’ve been around a while, you know we don’t often bang the drum for financial support, but today and in the days ahead, we will be. Our adversaries have strategically sought to drain our resources in court. Thank God, we are down to only two lawsuits, but we need to keep winning in court while still doing the work we do with initiatives like IV3, LegiTrack, Scan.Check.Protect, VoteAlert, and scores of training programs and supporting materials. We have our eyes trained on what’s coming in 2026. This entire paragraph is linked to our donation page. Please help us if you can. ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6UAj3E_p8cNGXIOwo9MdaP4uURHu2CF_xBMsTaXvArHujZCYcWDflXvAHZOdWogeY67YYVzOuRaIaHqb0EQF0i6ti96rrq3S5noXyuTduKaO69ZME2SS61KrIL1YzyUBhi7T_0PshyGKWHWHdcRUl0FK9lzcmn2V3LiTRcLUjQrd9B7fGP6VjunRahk0Oh6aZuuCvnqxzLBKiq6ndtRBL3XsIjn4A5_zk2FV6CT7Wn8h/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h9/h001.7X0wN0O2d-eBoYKBvUa3ydTv5oN_PVue7NjUouR1Vo0)
P.P.S. Please see below ...
| **We continue to offer the following to the Trump Administration** 👇. \- Evidence given by us to (and buried by) the FBI from 2020–2022, including geospatial proof of ballot dropbox abuse. \- Info on the non-citizen database first reported by Gregg Phillips in 2016 and buried under unfulfilled whistleblower protections. \- Approx 10k documents on Konnech, the CCP-affiliated election software company (docs currently on _[Truethevote.org](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.qojk3pX6LJWcd_-_1viMnM7tsmYUKR3yXt2MXIjiCn5S-3aAOBYE1aEPurZi9iVsH28tHDdrwWUtwfwTsLMH9c-7JEj5P4uz0M0-7KvYtFbmCR94qIRRys1s_XEdLP3zcnKcI61ZdOoOTPTQ_iIdvd88ZCtSZXP9BNMbNnyrHi5GQaDKk7ozf6CQg8TueXPT0M_XoWfmJ7C5K9Mj9_TzC3vSREomMFYkb8BmtNE64ag/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h10/h001.wWwb6epGxhm6gWJ9wRhJzNJTAxq6vjy7nDIg2pL9pfA)_ and _[Open.Ink](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.36LXK1Aga4GmHIZUU2ERAXGbZl1lnnIYiZvcmLa1UkdJ4_DAOpE7oS9DBj-YZgAVyfrf35vq1lHSPBOZHMghBCkRmfv_3rckUNTM5foTSdz2GKo1W3NCFsr2rlFwGRMgpASVTR43tkisragXvPhe7yURvFIUbkpI0wDyUshergvF_TPDI9uiYoF2qapkD7kultIhzOx0YCO_EusB3QjOXdcFzrPuMubX1aX0r-ozXBY/4ir/sp_ui2wqSBSEDE9B6B9xgw/h11/h001.yfqBE54z8VJ3LzvMPJMiqctXZAkcN3_gTf5GeFWmdZM)_) and our investigation timeline, including my and Gregg Phillips’ imprisonment—while the FBI, despite knowing the truth, watched us be taken away in chains to solitary confinement— and did nothing. \- Banking records tied to a suspected multi-state ballot trafficking ring—evidence we tried to give the FBI. They wouldn’t take it. It was about that time when we learned we were their targets. \- Subpoenas from Google and Apple, revealing the Biden DOJ’s demand for all my accounts and archives in a sealed, years-long Grand Jury probe by the Northern District of New York—part of a secretive effort to criminally indict Gregg Phillips and me. \- Full texts and emails with all FBI agents we dealt with—names, contacts, all of it.

clean_body: Celebrating 15 years of fighting for election integrity | | | | August 04, 2025 | | | Hi Friend - Fifteen years ago, in July of 2010, we stepped into the arena. We chased truth. We challenged power. We fought to break through ceilings others said couldn’t be broken. We prayed that America would wake up — and inch by inch, she has. Today, we see something extraordinary: people are rising. On their own. In their communities. For their country. This is the legacy we’ve built together. Quietly. Steadily. Without seeking headlines. But with hearts on fire for liberty. Over the past fifteen years, we’ve accomplished more than most thought possible: We brought national awareness to the need for clean voter rolls—and helped get them cleaned. (In fact, we filed and won the very first NVRA Section 8 lawsuits in our nation’s history) We trained thousands of election workers nationwide, building a national brigade of poll watchers in years when very few even knew the position existed. We fought the IRS in court — and won — helping to end the targeting of pro-liberty organizations and improving the nonprofit application process for groups across the country. We helped pass election integrity legislation in states from coast to coast. We supported and equipped hundreds of grassroots organizations and tens of thousands of citizens working to safeguard elections in their communities. We developed the first-ever citizen-led voter roll research database, now known as. We launched the first mobile app for election worker reporting, first as VoteStand, and after it was targeted and ultimately removed from the app stores, we relaunched as . We stood firm in dozens of lawsuits, against the likes of Marc Elias, Stacey Abrams, and the Biden and Obama DOJs - and winning. (Interesting note: prior to starting True the Vote in 2010, I’d never been in court. Since starting True the Vote, I’ve never been out.) We exposed using geospatial (cell phone) data and stood firm against cowardice, cover-ups, and false claims that the work had been debunked, helping change the national debate on mail-in ballots and ballot drop boxes, and radically improving election integrity nationwide. We exposed (which led to a federal court judge sentencing Gregg Phillips and I to prison, only to be released by Emergency Order of the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals and recusal of the judge). And so much more: more stories we could tell, and certainly more to come. For fun, we put a mash-up video together, featuring bits of our work from the past few years and kicked off by the very first video interview we ever did, with the amazingly wise David Horowitz. We could never have imagined the adventures that awaited us ... TTV 2010 - 2025 ]() Here is the danger we now face: we cannot forget the fundamentals. In a time when artificial intelligence and synthetic media threaten to blur reality itself, we must hold fast to what is real, our voices, our votes, our communities, and our faith. Over the years, politicians have failed us more often than they’ve helped. But the American people? You have never failed. You are awake. You are aware. You are powerful. Take that power and apply it. Call your local board of elections. Ask how you can serve. Even if just 1% of those reading this email today take that next step into local election service you could help change the course of history. Never underestimate what you can do. Over these fifteen years, I’ve been accused of awful things. I’ve been tracked, threatened, poisoned, imprisoned, and sued — relentlessly. And I count it all as victory. Because we are still standing. Still fighting. Still growing. True the Vote will not stop. As we near what we’ve called “voter singularity”— when the same data used to support elections may be twisted into a digital control grid — we must hold the line. We must never give in, never give way, and never forget why we fight. Because this has never been about politics. It has always been about liberty. And as we look toward the future, it feels like the start of Act Two. If the first act was about standing against corrupt men, this next may be about standing against machines, to preserve our humanity and our freedom. Thank you for coming along with us on this incredible journey. Though it’s rocky, steep, and full of twists and turns, the road less traveled still leads to liberty. Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward - | P.P.S. Please see below ... | We continue to offer the following to the Trump Administration** 👇. \- Evidence given by us to (and buried by) the FBI from 2020–2022, including geospatial proof of ballot dropbox abuse. \- Info on the non-citizen database first reported by Gregg Phillips in 2016 and buried under unfulfilled whistleblower protections. \- Approx 10k documents on Konnech, the CCP-affiliated election software company (docs currently on and ) and our investigation timeline, including my and Gregg Phillips’ imprisonment—while the FBI, despite knowing the truth, watched us be taken away in chains to solitary confinement— and did nothing. \- Banking records tied to a suspected multi-state ballot trafficking ring—evidence we tried to give the FBI. They wouldn’t take it. It was about that time when we learned we were their targets. \- Subpoenas from Google and Apple, revealing the Biden DOJ’s demand for all my accounts and archives in a sealed, years-long Grand Jury probe by the Northern District of New York—part of a secretive effort to criminally indict Gregg Phillips and me. \- Full texts and emails with all FBI agents we dealt with—names, contacts, all of it. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128 Houston, Texas 77098-4520, United States of America

name: Chef Andrew Gruel
subject: A Chef’s Take: How we fix our food and our planet
body:
As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6iursrk3pgdnpub7v78qrk4k1fb2srjt7kf8uvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)
Friend,

>From the kitchen to the coastline, I’ve seen the power of sustainability firsthand.

As a chef, I believe that what we put on our plates is deeply connected to the health of our environment and our communities.

Because when we protect our environment, we’re not just saving trees or oceans. We’re preserving access to clean air, clean water, and real food packed with nutrients.

At my restaurants, I’ve built everything around sustainability, sourcing traceable seafood, supporting responsible aquaculture, and working directly with ranchers and fishermen who care about long-term health over short-term gain.

But no chef, no restaurant, and no individual can do this alone.

We need a national movement to fight for clean water, regenerative agriculture, and responsible stewardship.

That’s where the American Conservation Coalition (ACC) comes in.

**ACC is leading the charge for a cleaner, more sustainable America — _without_ the heavy hand of government mandates.**

They’re building a movement of young, pro-environment conservatives who believe we can protect both our health and our freedoms.

I’m so passionate about their approach that I told the American Conservation Coalition I would help them raise $10,000 before the end of the month to support their mission.

[Please join me today in supporting ACC by donating any amount you can generously afford to support a healthier, more beautiful America! Even $10 makes a difference. >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9gkkferqncbt5d98pavlr6k8oup1oa2i7ah1n40_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvo5drmek2kq7o13aicj6nh6bkj2b5nfuo929no0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhgmsdhtl9pud7nh3ejbaagadcbp6d5rf0h6ljqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zln3p4j7pb5incfgeht0c6k418p4nul1adpim54g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdr106uouebvu26kmdm2pq0svnu6hqio88662u6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq0tck79jvp8u1lpci5kgvq92jetr6isnbfve19o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvbmgsvju3c0gnsiqcgmkqn359m0p7r7f0ph5398_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd2906okln80m2npkibrmefhbol4pqi5e8ejrloo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znmdljs05t89ecbseap5nqj5lvusctd6tt0h92no_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)
The American Conservation Coalition is building the conservative environmental movement. Their goals? To:

👩🏻🌾 **Restore regenerative farming practices** rooted in health and sustainability
🏞️ **Conserve America’s natural resources** for future generations
☣️ **Reduce toxins** in our food, water, and air
✅ **Promote real solutions** that create healthy communities and families

ACC empowers young conservatives to join the national discussion concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, regenerative agriculture, and more.

With over 80,000 members, ACC branches complete local clean-up projects, influence local, state, and national environmental policy, and drive change that embraces common-sense solutions to the health crises and environmental problems we face.

Friend, this isn’t about politics.

It’s about conserving the things that nourish us – our land, oceans, and our children’s future – _not through mandates or government overreach_ , but by protecting what makes this country beautiful.

**If you believe that thoughtful conservation can heal ecosystems and communities, then I urge you to support the American Conservation Coalition by donating today!**
[Donate Now >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrcnnmu1nf9mrfsj0orvk144ubh2dfjbkvbbgasg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpj62o36chh2bs)
Thank you for standing up for health, freedom, and the future.

Chef Andrew Gruel

_The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition’s tax identification number is 82-3815628._

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Please, before the Senate votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We can stop these terrible USPS Board of Governors nominees, but we have to drive as many letters as possible before these cynical partisans push these pro-privatization nominees through and make it clear that we oppose both their nominations and privatization of the Postal Service.
Click here to read these letters right now and sign on to tell your Senators how you feel about these nominees and Trump's efforts to privatize the USPS >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725uspsbog]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725uspsbog]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
We've reached the next stage in our fight to protect the U.S. Postal Service from privatization. Donald Trump has nominated Anthony Lomangino and John LaValle to the USPS Board of Governors, two very wealthy Wall Street types with deep ties to Trump, zero experience with the Postal Service, and clear records of political loyalty.
Lomangino is a Mar-a-Lago insider and Trump megadonor with deep business ties to the new Postmaster General. Lomangino’s company donated nearly $9 million to a pro-Trump super PAC, and he once gave $150,000 to defend Trump associates under federal investigation. John LaValle is a longtime GOP operative, a former GOP party boss and MAGA surrogate whose loyalty to Trump goes all the way back to 2016.
These men aren’t public servants, and they don’t know the first thing about running the post office. But they are part of a deliberate scheme to dismantle public oversight from the inside in order to fast-track USPS privatization, which has been Trump’s goal all along.
It's simple: A vote to confirm these men is a vote to gut the post office .
Demand your senators reject Trump’s USPS Board nominees and protect the Post Office from privatization now! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725uspsbog]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725uspsbog]
The USPS has long been a lifeline for millions , especially those in rural, Indigenous, and under-served communities. The postal board must remain independent and focused on public service, not privatization.
Confirming these men would shift the balance of power on the USPS Board and put the future of the postal service in the hands of Trump’s political allies. If they join the board, the makeup would be: 1 Independent, 2 Democrats, 4 Republicans, and 2 open seats.
This is the next step in Trump’s larger plan to dismantle the USPS and hand it over to corporate profiteers. But with your help, we can stop it.
Add your name today to let your Senators know you oppose these nominees and Trump's efforts to privatize the USPS >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/reject-trumps-usps-board-nominees?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725uspsbog]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=&amount=20]

Lomangino is a Mar-a-Lago insider and Trump megadonor with deep business ties to the new Postmaster General. Lomangino’s company donated nearly $9 million to a pro-Trump super PAC, and he once gave $150,000 to defend Trump associates under federal investigation. John LaValle is a longtime GOP operative, a former GOP party boss and MAGA surrogate whose loyalty to Trump goes all the way back to 2016. These men aren’t public servants, and they don’t know the first thing about running the post office. But they are part of a deliberate scheme to dismantle public oversight from the inside in order to fast-track USPS privatization, which has been Trump’s goal all along. Our Congressman Back in Town 🇺🇸

| Good Morning,
With August recess officially underway, Rob is back home and making the most of every moment to connect with the people he represents. This past week, Rob stopped by the Bear Creek Volunteer Fire Company picnic to thank our local heroes, teed off at the Northeast Leadership Fund’s annual golf tournament, and capped it all off at Commissioner Chris Chermak’s summer picnic in Lackawanna County. It’s these conversations and community events that help Rob stay grounded in what matters most to you.
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | We would like to invite you to our **Second Annual Bresnahan BBQ!** The BBQ will take place from **6:00 PM to 8:00 PM at the American Legion Post 644’s Pavillion (259 Shoemaker St, Swoyersville, PA 18704**. We are so excited to see everyone and enjoy food from across PA-08. You **MUST RSVP** to attend. You can RSVP to the BBQ [**here**.](mailto:mckayla@robforpa.com?subject=RSVP%20to%20BBQ&body=)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=d655e167cf&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Pizza Althea, in Pittston. Be sure to support local businesses!
---
|
---
| The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth.
**Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: NYT: White House Pushes Texas to Redistrict, Hoping to Blunt Democratic Gains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Don't mess with Texas
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teefb417f-24d7-4d5d-84c1-995dad840711/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Y’all, as if all the destruction Donald Trump has caused nationally isn’t enough, now he’s messing with Texas. The latest reports just revealed that he’s pressuring Texas Republicans to gerrymander new congressional districts that could DESTROY all the progress Democrats have made here over the past few years: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9796a14d-fa94-4a5a-8b12-ee07d7fa4727/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) NOT on my watch. I’ll fight to protect my home state from Trump’s schemes if it’s the last thing I do. But this ultimately isn’t just about Texas. This is about our democracy. Republicans know they can’t win an election without lying and cheating. So ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, they’re trying to rig the game in their favor by gerrymandering their way into another term in the majority. [I REFUSE to let that happen, but I need your help to fight back and stop them before it’s too late. Please, help me protect Texas and our democracy from these anti-democratic schemes before it’s too late by chipping in any amount right away. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta44b6a3b-d322-46ae-b2bb-4561a832bed7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73eadf60-5795-45b5-8efe-7d5f14aab1aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
We just passed my bipartisan stock trading ban legislation out of a key Senate committee.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112719336/561393683/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwODJkZi00NzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcD7L6_WBhFkPP7Mi6gLU_74BjmyiLKET-DkI7vujzQ=&emci=03a71c35-236f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fe1082df-4771-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)

| | **I just helped pass a bipartisan stock trading ban legislation out of a key Senate committee** , and it's a big step in the right direction to restore Americans' trust in our government. [**Show your support for this legislation by signing on to my petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112719337/561393684/1074939550?contactdata=EP02MsN1QIGzYx3viTBccuFbnzKfqANPWi54IDx+wU0S3PEjEnbU/kSXjNYatuvQvb8adXZx5MiGZUUvywwEXcvFtxZSF4AoFiyajFOzVSLYpf6WNG3tZ5jW4co5Y0X+KPQ2tIWZebIKsRJV0WWEHA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwODJkZi00NzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcD7L6_WBhFkPP7Mi6gLU_74BjmyiLKET-DkI7vujzQ=&emci=03a71c35-236f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fe1082df-4771-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389) Americans deserve to have complete faith in the people they elect to serve. That means knowing that their leaders are not profiting from their positions or chasing power at the expense of the people they represent. **From the day I decided to run for office in 2018, I've made it my mission to increase transparency and hold public officials accountable.** This bill is about shining a light on government and restoring integrity to a system that too often feels rigged for the wealthy and well-connected. Right now, corruption and greed are dominating our politics. Billionaires are bankrolling campaigns, corporations and PACs are cutting blank checks, and far too many members of Congress are using inside information to make a buck on the stock market. I know some say this is just how politics works, especially in a place like New Jersey, but I don't buy that. **I know we can do better.** This legislation is a huge step toward a government that works for you, not just the powerful few. **But we need your voice to get it over the finish line.** [**Now more than ever, we need leaders who are honest, hardworking, and focused on the common good – not their stock portfolios. Add your name now to support the bill to ban stock trading by members of Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112719338/561393685/1074939550?contactdata=EP02MsN1QIGzYx3viTBccuFbnzKfqANPWi54IDx+wU0S3PEjEnbU/kSXjNYatuvQvb8adXZx5MiGZUUvywwEXcvFtxZSF4AoFiyajFOzVSLYpf6WNG3tZ5jW4co5Y0X+KPQ2tIWZebIKsRJV0WWEHA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwODJkZi00NzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcD7L6_WBhFkPP7Mi6gLU_74BjmyiLKET-DkI7vujzQ=&emci=03a71c35-236f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fe1082df-4771-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112719339/561393686/1074939550?contactdata=EP02MsN1QIGzYx3viTBccuFbnzKfqANPWi54IDx+wU0S3PEjEnbU/kSXjNYatuvQvb8adXZx5MiGZUUvywwEXcvFtxZSF4AoFiyajFOzVSLYpf6WNG3tZ5jW4co5Y0X+KPQ2tIWZebIKsRJV0WWEHA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwODJkZi00NzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcD7L6_WBhFkPP7Mi6gLU_74BjmyiLKET-DkI7vujzQ=&emci=03a71c35-236f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=fe1082df-4771-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389) More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: We just passed my bipartisan stock trading ban legislation out of a key Senate committee. | | | | I just helped pass a bipartisan stock trading ban legislation out of a key Senate committee , and it's a big step in the right direction to restore Americans' trust in our government. Americans deserve to have complete faith in the people they elect to serve. That means knowing that their leaders are not profiting from their positions or chasing power at the expense of the people they represent. From the day I decided to run for office in 2018, I've made it my mission to increase transparency and hold public officials accountable. This bill is about shining a light on government and restoring integrity to a system that too often feels rigged for the wealthy and well-connected. Right now, corruption and greed are dominating our politics. Billionaires are bankrolling campaigns, corporations and PACs are cutting blank checks, and far too many members of Congress are using inside information to make a buck on the stock market. I know some say this is just how politics works, especially in a place like New Jersey, but I don't buy that. I know we can do better. This legislation is a huge step toward a government that works for you, not just the powerful few. But we need your voice to get it over the finish line. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Republicans are not Nazi’s and Trump is not Hitler

body:
As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. |

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself.

I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork.

After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards.**

In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a **Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command.** Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions.

Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate.

**The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous.**

I'm running against **Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor** , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit _**against**_ the Minneapolis Police Department.

Governor Walz wants America to believe **Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo.** His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.”

So ask yourself: _**If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda?**_

**Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis.**

Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots.

But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.**It's common sense**. It's about **protecting Americans**.

Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then **[I’m asking you to pitch in $1, $5, or even $15 today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fe3407d272304855b2c349d120bb15f3&_e=gG0yKZBKIi9KiEH9f1f1qv2jLOViL7WVHsvlLj_3eNN7ly-l5QX7UY5JyFnjx5al_duqBtx0BS5Ox07_8BoTQ-AOvodDIKTPj87c5aWpBtQCwmQveYA7xX1Wsik8fMyPOqomfQxQlgUpRz7W7TXxsPdkpPTDjT-aTQOpj4QRpmPQ0dMxq0R5CMcHi613dxbIOLrJ8uH-g2We5OQeLEj7HLxuNCVR6hhCeZUHEIjaOS-sxSgAP4wdMHqFMC0vuNkUct698yPBg1wyAV1zd3u5-h8CjkD5FSaPfPIdLCfYUtDlhkO2UmHneIMSJHrhWm_56Qlj33JzSnzlxvGOJyOk94gbsqdTgUiM18-UZMA0oJPXlZTbEp1McfGkHDIJN7wBNEvwv8CA3nJnD3NrukI-kuiR9rtsKzn-JQCduUXxcjGxJVjsf1RvGT_bysqEIAIud-VGJ_ZbR98FF8PBZ4OBMLrQPypuSZc7_zr3OdoBy0fsnLiR_0bQ43pKEFP4BYkvoiVYNfgQ-B3QVkcfrAXJ8wEoqDDizZunzUMMU2SNj51C1Cnlz639AiuA67kFYpAoMMng-LyJer3z55a3QfstymXUiNTbwxuU7paWl3xWRvr7dkJyJ9jCowcZXVGQnJ6y9MGpqbnYmq5Cc4sTqlO25Ry0-C35A1xJapusONqg9Vh9nGomlaum-m2t4kW3rzf8N2D7cf2aUgh8D3Qr2kYVRxuz6dOcxrAqkmhWcQ3Red0%3D)**

**Here's What I Believe:** I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens.

I believe in a **strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law** —no exceptions, no apologies.

I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities.

**I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point.**

Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it.

While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault.

Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either.

Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: **[Could you donate $10, $25, or even $50 to help me launch this campaign the right way?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fe3407d272304855b2c349d120bb15f3&_e=gG0yKZBKIi9KiEH9f1f1qv2jLOViL7WVHsvlLj_3eNN7ly-l5QX7UY5JyFnjx5al_duqBtx0BS5Ox07_8BoTQ-AOvodDIKTPj87c5aWpBtQCwmQveYA7xX1Wsik8fMyPOqomfQxQlgUpRz7W7TXxsPdkpPTDjT-aTQOpj4QRpmPQ0dMxq0R5CMcHi613dxbIOLrJ8uH-g2We5OQeLEj7HLxuNCVR6hhCeZUHEIjaOS-sxSgAP4wdMHqFMC0vuNkUA9odddoXNMrgHBfYG_Ptn1EDEOK0o-JOHfV4ocNDimiKSTcR6hb3J9dzlcMQzTUEnk-tefrREpbb35H_75SMRM1voJ1NRHHkkPxaAxHJyJik10cxGQUVKTDPrE8OBuwzulmJ-eRD46mT93yZyD8cBXocz-51dK-RrARANocd9UDHmJ1tenY5pMZ16bxx4kU4TZ__JnAEO73rzwmxJ91obzIFYRG3iOtth6xoMUBAMqQ_n2KsbD-GZPgHgSZO4Kz84iKjaVlUNF97ZoccUNeKYSHJw3hqQPs6NoKXdp1ZKl_bcS9hDc-hYgVpfcGl1rODWaUfKiFJWNgpE7ao82_psgkhd9-wOvc3MH5_6G7Mfp2Taa8vxmbTuq7vhsvhBofbJeeYFByXF1DEgbl1tRwIsbo31ofSIpRM1I64of4d1zY1aWv7dkveCF49vcqUNfHfnVKEU1Dgkqv6o9rwnxNtiJe2kwn_Jal9t0oRPN8ef0I%3D)**

Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet.

With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative.

**I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp.**

What I have is grit, **a record of service** , and hopefully, the support of **patriots like you** who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on...

And if you believe we deserve **leaders who've fought for this country—** Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today.

clean_body: As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself. I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork. After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards. In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command. Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions. Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate. The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous. I'm running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department. Governor Walz wants America to believe Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo. His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.” So ask yourself: If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda? Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis. Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots. But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.It's common sense. It's about protecting Americans. Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then Here's What I Believe: I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens. I believe in a strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law —no exceptions, no apologies. I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities. I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point. Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it. While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault. Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either. Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet. With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative. I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp. What I have is grit, a record of service , and hopefully, the support of patriots like you who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on... And if you believe we deserve leaders who've fought for this country— Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today. Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Sources: Top Illinois GOP Donors Sit Out Upcoming Primary (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/sources-top-illinois-gop-donors-sit-out-upcoming-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3702c6ea4f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/sources-top-illinois-gop-donors-sit-out-upcoming-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3702c6ea4f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Former GOP Chair Don Tracy, who is considering a bid for governor, giving opening remarks during Republican Day at the Illinois State Fair on the Director’s Lawn at the Illinois State Fairgrounds in Springfield, Ill., Thursday, August 19, 2021. (Justin L. Fowler/The State Journal-Register)
By Illinois Review

For Illinois Republicans, the upcoming primary was expected to be a moment of renewal. Instead, it’s devolved into a bitter clash between establishment insiders and grassroots challengers – compounded by a state party in disarray, lacking clear leadership, functional infrastructure and a coherent strategy.

Meanwhile, Democrats are poised to maintain control of every statewide office and preserve their supermajority in the legislature. For Republicans, this election season underscores a hard truth: they’re not just losing elections – they’re losing structure. There’s no head coach, no assistant coaches – just a political free-for-all.

And that, according to multiple sources, is exactly why many of the state’s top GOP donors are choosing to sit this one out.

Amid a vacuum of leadership, direction, infrastructure, and fundraising capacity, major donors increasingly view Illinois Republican candidates as a risky – and ultimately unrewarding – investment.

Democrats, meanwhile, are charging ahead at full speed. As the race to replace retiring U.S. Senator Dick Durbin intensifies, Democratic contenders are already flexing their fundraising muscle – leaving Republicans far behind. U.S. Rep. Robin Kelly has $2 million on hand and added another $565,775 last quarter. Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton has raised over $1 million since April. But the largest war chest belongs to U.S. Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi, who boasts a staggering $21 million in campaign funds – bolstered by a $3 million haul just in the most recent quarter.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Sources: Top Illinois GOP Donors Sit Out Upcoming Primary () Former GOP Chair Don Tracy, who is considering a bid for governor, giving opening remarks during Republican Day at the Illinois State Fair on the Director’s Lawn at the Illinois State Fairgrounds in Springfield, Ill., Thursday, August 19, 2021. (Justin L. Fowler/The State Journal-Register) By Illinois Review For Illinois Republicans, the upcoming primary was expected to be a moment of renewal. Instead, it’s devolved into a bitter clash between establishment insiders and grassroots challengers – compounded by a state party in disarray, lacking clear leadership, functional infrastructure and a coherent strategy. Meanwhile, Democrats are poised to maintain control of every statewide office and preserve their supermajority in the legislature. For Republicans, this election season underscores a hard truth: they’re not just losing elections – they’re losing structure. There’s no head coach, no assistant coaches – just a political free-for-all. And that, according to multiple sources, is exactly why many of the state’s top GOP donors are choosing to sit this one out. Amid a vacuum of leadership, direction, infrastructure, and fundraising capacity, major donors increasingly view Illinois Republican candidates as a risky – and ultimately unrewarding – investment. Democrats, meanwhile, are charging ahead at full speed. As the race to replace retiring U.S. Senator Dick Durbin intensifies, Democratic contenders are already flexing their fundraising muscle – leaving Republicans far behind. U.S. Rep. Robin Kelly has $2 million on hand and added another $565,775 last quarter. Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton has raised over $1 million since April. But the largest war chest belongs to U.S. Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi, who boasts a staggering $21 million in campaign funds – bolstered by a $3 million haul just in the most recent quarter. name: GIFFORDS.org
subject: A new level of corruption from the Trump admin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This isn’t a coincidence.
#

**New: Donald Trump Jr. is backing a company that’s pitching itself as “the Amazon of guns.”**
This will make it even easier for dangerous criminals to get their hands on weapons like AR-15s and other firearms. We must speak out.
[**Rush in a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC now.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250804-1-b&t=1&akid=10748%2E3935704%2ELsGhU_)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250804-1-b&t=2&akid=10748%2E3935704%2ELsGhU_)**
Team,
We are seeing a new level of shady financial dealings surrounding the Trump administration.
GrabAGun, a company backed by Donald Trump Jr., just released a new plan where virtually anybody can buy a weapon online with almost no money down.
This comes just weeks after the Trump administration effectively legalized machine guns and passed tax breaks on dangerous gun silencers.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250804-1-b&t=3&akid=10748%2E3935704%2ELsGhU_)
This isn’t a coincidence. Donald Trump doesn’t care about making our communities safer. **The only thing Trump cares about is making himself, his family, and the gun industry richer.**
We cannot let this be the new reality.
GIFFORDS is fighting every day to hold the Trump administration accountable and elect gun safety leaders up and down the ballot. Our work is powered by grassroots donations from emails like this one, which is why we have to reach out.
[**Will you contribute $3 or another amount to help GIFFORDS PAC hold the Trump administration accountable? Your donations will allow us to reach more voters ahead of the upcoming elections.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250804-1-b&t=4&akid=10748%2E3935704%2ELsGhU_)

name: Michigan COV
subject: We’re Live! Petition Circulation Has Begun — Join the Movement
body:
We have upcoming trainings to help you get the job done right

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/081d4f55f622/breaking-news-citizens-only-voting-amendment-submitted-to-board-of-canvassers-8370948?e=ecf60db114)
---
[|
---](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=f80f9f272d&e=ecf60db114)
| | | | | [DONATE TODAY](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=d004a1af86&e=ecf60db114)
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
We’re excited to announce that **petition circulation is well underway** for the **Michigan Citizens Only Voting Amendment** — and we’ve hit the ground running!
This commonsense constitutional amendment will ensure that **only U.S. citizens can vote in Michigan elections and require photo ID to vote** —nothing more, nothing less.
But to get it on the 2026 ballot, **we need your help** gathering nearly half a million signatures across the state.
📋 **Want to get involved?**
We’re hosting **upcoming volunteer training sessions** to equip you with everything you need to collect signatures legally, confidently, and effectively.
👉 **Training Dates:**
Monday, August 4, 2025 at 7:00 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/luku-urs-was](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=f4287c738c&e=ecf60db114)Wednesday, August 6, 2025 at 8:00 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/itei-pku-bha](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=7f1ce39a60&e=ecf60db114)Thursday, August 7, 2025 at 7:30 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/bnlv-sow-iti](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=04ae7b2efe&e=ecf60db114)Friday, August 8, 2025 at 1:00 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/cxba-iek-xmj](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=dd27fabcef&e=ecf60db114)Monday, August 11, 2025 at 5:30 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/uqjf-kpb-hwz](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=9afe2c1b35&e=ecf60db114)Wednesday, August 13, 2025 at 6:00 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/ohbl-wwv-sme](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=078351110b&e=ecf60db114)Sunday, August 17, 2025 at 6:00 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/rqzm-wwx-wme](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=a3907c853d&e=ecf60db114)Wednesday, August 20, 2025 at 6:30 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/dgck-wwz-vlu](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=9818176a0d&e=ecf60db114)Friday, August 22, 2025 at 1:00 pm: [https://meet.zoho.com/shxg-guz-eam](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=d039029893&e=ecf60db114)
Whether you’re new to petitioning or a seasoned pro, we’ll walk you through the process and get you ready to make a difference.
This campaign is **grassroots-powered and citizen-driven.** With your help, we’ll secure the right to vote exclusively for U.S. citizens—and protect the integrity of Michigan’s elections for generations to come.
🔗 Learn more or get involved at: www.MICHCOV.com
Let’s go win this!
**— The Michigan Citizens Only Voting Team**
📩 Questions? Reach us at [info@onlycitizens.vote]()
---
|
---
| We are going to need our entire grassroots nation to get out and support this effort. Go to our website to sign up for updates, like and follow us on social media and help us spread the word. This issue will be critical to 2026 and we need you!

clean_body: Friends, Socialist City Councilman and Failed NYC Comptroller wannabe Justin Brannan told WPIX that he’s thinking about running against me. Help me fight back and defeat any Democrat the left runs. | Friends, Socialist City Councilman and Failed NYC Comptroller wannabe Justin Brannan told WPIX that he’s thinking about running against me. | | Brannan even said that I’ve failed to deliver for my constituents on Staten Island and in Southern Brooklyn. Maybe he should check my record first... ✅ I just Quadrupled the SALT deduction to allow over 95% of my constituents to fully deduct their state and local taxes. (BTW, those are the same sky-high local taxes that Brannan has raised as Finance Chair of the City Council.) | ✅ I led the effort to eliminate taxes on Social Security benefits for 88% of seniors. | ✅ I helped President Trump fulfill his promise to cut taxes on tips and overtime. | ✅ I increased the Standard Deduction and the Child Tax Credit. Oh, and I just passed the largest investment in history to secure the southern border and combat illegal immigration. And that’s all in the last few weeks! Now let’s take a quick look at Justin Brannan’s record: X As Finance Chair, Brannan is literally in charge of New York City’s horrific budget increasing the property tax levy year after year. X Brannan also voted to Defund the Police and co-sponsored the city’s non-citizen voting law. I successfully challenged in court and stopped from taking effect. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Nicole | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

name: Kevin Ford Jr for State Senate
subject: This week in District 24
body:
🎒🚗 DRIVE-THRU BACKPACK GIVEAWAY + NATIONAL NIGHT OUT 🚨🎉 | | |
---
| | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6890db0a3c9fa807b0eef69f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kfordjr.com%2Fevents%2Fpainthoodorange&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6890c3137736f6757255095a&l=en-US&s=U6qjQInyHMiuGUI_nq6zwFeTvXc%3D)
---
#### **BACK TO SCHOOL BACKPACK GIVEAWAY**
#### _**“Celebrating a Safe Return to School”**_
####
Join us for an exciting giveaway where families can pull up, pop their trunks, and get loaded up with FREE backpacks for the kids — no need to leave your car! 💥 First come, first served!📍 Friday, August 8, 2025📌 Glenarden Community Center🕡 6:30 PM – 8:30 PM📍 8615 McLain Ave, Glenarden, MD 20706📍 Saturday, August 9, 2025📌 Peppermill Community Center🕙 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM📍 610 Hill Rd, Landover, MD 20785🎤 Hosted by Kevin Ford Jr. & Ariel Deney of Hustle Mommies
📧 Contact: info@hustlemommies.org for more info!

– **VOLUNTEERS AND DONATIONS ARE WELCOME –**
If you would like to donate backpacks or supplies, you can do so through our Amazon registry using the button below:
---
[_ _**DONATE BACKPACKS AND/OR SUPPLIES** _ _](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6890db0a3c9fa807b0eef69f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.amazon.com%2Fregistries%2Fgl%2Fguest-view%2F1YHB5WXS91YZJ%3Flanguage%3Den-US%26ref_%3Dcm_sw_r_apin_ggr-subnav-share_FD6S9KAK2BDH7BKN373M&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6890c3137736f6757255095a&l=en-US&s=zCMSFLkB5g5bBQFEVaCxTOritv8%3D)
---
PAINT THE HOOD ORANGE is a nationally recognized gun violence awareness program by Hustle Mommies that supports both urban and rural communities impacted by gun violence. Through advocacy, healing, and cultural outreach, this movement empowers families, amplifies unheard voices, and fosters safer futures across the country. This back-to-school celebration is not just about supplies — it’s about safety, healing, and unity.
---

**National Night Out is an annual community-building campaign that promotes police-community partnerships to foster safer, more caring places to live and work. This is a great opportunity to meet your neighbors and local officers, learn about crime prevention, enjoy good food and family-friendly activities.****Here's the list of District 24 locations for this year's National Night Out on Tuesday August 5, 2025.****1\. Beechfield Manor**
📍 Tradition Blvd/Sugarberry Ln., Lanham
🕒 4:30–6:30 PM**2\. Fairmount Heights**
📍 5395 Sheriff Road, Fairmount Heights
🕒 5:00–8:00 PM**3\. Seat Pleasant**
📍 6600 Greig St., Seat Pleasant
🕒 6:00–9:00 PM**4\. Capitol Heights**
📍 6093 Old Central Ave, Capitol Heights
🕒 5:00–8:00 PM**5\. Oakcrest Towers**
📍 2100 Brooks Dr., Capitol Heights
🕒 6:00–8:00 PM**6\. Village at Towne Square (VTS)**
📍 2901 Toles Park Dr., Suitland
🕒 6:00–9:00 PM**7\. Concord Civic Association**
📍 2004 Concord Ln., District Heights
🕒 6:00–8:00 PM**8\. Lincoln Vista Civic Association**
📍 9800 Ridge St., Lanham
🕒 6:00–8:00 PM**9\. Glenn Estates Community**
📍 5901 Forbes Blvd., Lanham
🕒 6:00–8:00 PM**10\. Glenarden**
📍 8600 Glenarden Pkwy, Glenarden
🕒 6:00–9:00 PM**11\. Fairwood Community**
📍 12600 Fairwood Pkwy., Bowie
🕒 7:00–9:00 PM
**We hope to see you there!
**

If you cannot join us this week, I’m asking for your support as we build this movement together:
1. **Share and Follow** – Help us grow the movement by sharing the campaign with your network and following @kfordjr on all platforms. Word of mouth and social engagement are powerful tools.
👉 [kfordjr.com/links](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6890db0a3c9fa807b0eef69f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Flinks&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6890c3137736f6757255095a&l=en-US&s=es7FHn8ZMjmsr-1OEU933vOlN6Y%3D)
2. **Donate** – No amount is too small to make an impact. Every dollar helps us connect with more voters and bring our message directly to the community.
👉 [kfordjr.com/donate](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6890db0a3c9fa807b0eef69f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fdonate&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6890c3137736f6757255095a&l=en-US&s=kx2saw9fZ76rfv_izPnLo0Oku6g%3D)
3. **Volunteer** – Whether you’ve got five hours a week or five minutes a day, we need your help to knock doors, make calls, and show up strong.
👉 [kfordjr.com/volunteer](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6890db0a3c9fa807b0eef69f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kfordjr.com%2Fvolunteer&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6890c3137736f6757255095a&l=en-US&s=gYKU5rsbp29_JMkb8SmBeMlOhfo%3D)
4. **Vote** – Together, we can make history — but it starts at the ballot box. Spread the word, make a plan to vote, and let’s get it done in the 2026 primary.
👉 [kfordjr.com/vote](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6890db0a3c9fa807b0eef69f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fvote&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6890c3137736f6757255095a&l=en-US&s=kYV1_MSmvE-6jM82p3CsN9ZUEsw%3D)

clean_body: 🎒🚗 DRIVE-THRU BACKPACK GIVEAWAY + NATIONAL NIGHT OUT 🚨🎉 | | | | | BACK TO SCHOOL BACKPACK GIVEAWAY “Celebrating a Safe Return to School” Join us for an exciting giveaway where families can pull up, pop their trunks, and get loaded up with FREE backpacks for the kids — no need to leave your car! 💥 First come, first served!📍 Friday, August 8, 2025📌 Glenarden Community Center🕡 6:30 PM – 8:30 PM📍 8615 McLain Ave, Glenarden, MD 20706📍 Saturday, August 9, 2025📌 Peppermill Community Center🕙 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM📍 610 Hill Rd, Landover, MD 20785🎤 Hosted by Kevin Ford Jr. & Ariel Deney of Hustle Mommies 📧 Contact: info@hustlemommies.org for more info! – VOLUNTEERS AND DONATIONS ARE WELCOME – If you would like to donate backpacks or supplies, you can do so through our Amazon registry using the button below: PAINT THE HOOD ORANGE is a nationally recognized gun violence awareness program by Hustle Mommies that supports both urban and rural communities impacted by gun violence. Through advocacy, healing, and cultural outreach, this movement empowers families, amplifies unheard voices, and fosters safer futures across the country. This back-to-school celebration is not just about supplies — it’s about safety, healing, and unity. | National Night Out is an annual community-building campaign that promotes police-community partnerships to foster safer, more caring places to live and work. This is a great opportunity to meet your neighbors and local officers, learn about crime prevention, enjoy good food and family-friendly activities.Here's the list of District 24 locations for this year's National Night Out on Tuesday August 5, 2025.1\. Concord Civic Association 📍 2004 Concord Ln., District Heights 🕒 6:00–8:00 PM8\. Lincoln Vista Civic Association 📍 9800 Ridge St., Lanham 🕒 6:00–8:00 PM9\. Glenn Estates Community 📍 5901 Forbes Blvd., Lanham 🕒 6:00–8:00 PM10\. Glenarden 📍 8600 Glenarden Pkwy, Glenarden 🕒 6:00–9:00 PM11\. Fairwood Community 📍 12600 Fairwood Pkwy., Bowie 🕒 7:00–9:00 PM We hope to see you there! | If you cannot join us this week, I’m asking for your support as we build this movement together: 1. Share and Follow – Help us grow the movement by sharing the campaign with your network and following @kfordjr on all platforms. Word of mouth and social engagement are powerful tools. 👉 2. Donate – No amount is too small to make an impact. Every dollar helps us connect with more voters and bring our message directly to the community. 👉 3. name: Team Ossoff
subject: yikes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
Yet **_another_** Republican has jumped into the Georgia Senate race. Check it out:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250804-1-f&t=1&akid=611%2E5691347%2EI-Ir2d)
Failed and fired former University of Tennessee football coach Derek Dooley is running to try and unseat Jon, despite having no public service experience and regularly failing to vote...
_Yikes._
Dooley’s announcement has reinforced what we already know about this race: Jon is the GOP’s #1 target in 2026 and Republicans are lining up to challenge him.
**This will be the most competitive and expensive Senate race in the country.** _Far-right groups are already flooding the airwaves with ads to misrepresent Jon’s record and they show no signs of stopping._
That means we need to start building the resources to fight back against GOP attacks — _whether they’re coming from Dooley or our other MAGA opponents._ But, we can’t do that without grassroots donors like you stepping up and pitching in what you can, when you can.
**[So, Peter, can you rush a donation of $5 — or whatever you can afford — to help us defend Jon's seat?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250804-1-f&t=2&akid=611%2E5691347%2EI-Ir2d)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250804-1-f&t=3&akid=611%2E5691347%2EI-Ir2d)**
Thank you for your support — we couldn't do it without you.
\- Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=611%2E5691347%2EI-Ir2d) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=611%2E5691347%2EI-Ir2d) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

subject: Texas Democrats broke quorum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-pxp-em-cp-20250804_1?refcode=em20250804-1704&amount=5&refcode2=1704_582294_EHMkC7&akid=1704%2E582294%2EEHMkC7)
It’s Beto O’Rourke here.
Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.
But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.**
And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders.
They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for.
Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up the fight.
[**Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can to Powered by People and Chris Pappas to support these brave lawmakers?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-pxp-em-cp-20250804_1?refcode=em20250804-1704&amount=5&refcode2=1704_582294_EHMkC7&akid=1704%2E582294%2EEHMkC7)

Let’s make sure they know we’ve got their backs—and that they’re not in this fight alone.
With gratitude,
Beto

---
[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b52e3af2a43f4d9b8829512f17ee27ef&_e=SeGTBfqdwcdJM5l6whgCirhLubZwwoXPOFlaB891n2vWR0VcEBa5Xz2_a5JW7iIRXxvgKIlmw776PCUhRP5PRqcjIHftyB2lmSoG7n7yJtbr96dVhLdn-T2T_r-DNOzfjZin33G4bLPYRivLIp9UjyvTPjfI3rgajoHcp1HfP2jgW0Hp39XpK2uWoB3o-sdi7GYicDXhiv0X22sBEBxLOu0gwFN8ks5x_SERz4weJsyzzSgPBfEijRMXYDOHiprrWQAU5mANyXiiSPseYCzIpPmtR0nrmzO0G8-MgfgoOiExEfds6v8vmhwL6C7LG_fYUQ-sRyZDRqt78Ziqd2UbCpnx7k0hcWecah03Ff7Y8Xx9GEuP4fQhLdKbIsehK6a8wYXmDmkmCHxaUyGRCErG2hteu_O-Har7icoGQjR93hK1Yyzv1CrPPM-Lhcz3wr0wZdQgwuPt06ZsYSrnUmYzqeznnpNKXqlaE-9CUpM2atnCL5HzZzv_bXYevCl5f71ooKTJdPGeXS19XhdrXUJLffEKKJ-kNwsOyQr11nxRFVjRmDCY5Y688x9k_a44CMUjojD0AQxCa_GwPU_boSC9IMetykjP_x9qLdltgdRNgajJc2v0S5JNaeYbvhdPww6NKLY68wwswMgl_r5A8T3sjI_TvAT1AZ3CHshWVBPPFsS3Un1Pqli7jY60pG7s6-quLFQNNlxX1_ntCAi2dUvDkg%3D%3D)
Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you.
