| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=170100270&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTAwMjcwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzMjUzMzAsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkxNzMzMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.s4MqqEUIfrm2g4EC5sNczpZRb2u62nTUsbRPgZH89N8)
---
| | [](https://substack..IRt4qritGbM-kCWXaVuspCfGVKpFrNQqG_mCVisch40?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/you-cant-gaslight-the-american-people?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Every time I do an interview or podcast, someone inevitably asks: _What mistakes did Democrats make in 2024 that cost us the election?_
And it's always a little ironic--because while I could talk about that all day (and often do), what I'm watching now is the Republican Party making the exact same mistake.
It's the mistake of thinking you can spin people out of their own lived experience. That you can gaslight the country into believing the economy is strong... when it's clearly, tangibly not.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TBR_vwsnbfR5JweXpTBtuvZusMLAGvNOnrcPnW24CqM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170100270)
I called this out on Fox News a couple weeks ago. The host and guest laughed--thought it was a gotcha that I pointed out how expensive everything still is under Trump. But a few days later? Fox released a poll showing Trump with a -30% rating on inflation.
Why? Because people aren't stupid. Prices are still high and they're getting more expensive, not less--largely because of Trump's own tariffs. Americans aren't buying the spin. They're living the struggle.
And now, Trump has fired the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics--not because the numbers were wrong, but because they didn't flatter him. He wants a "single source of truth," and that source is him. His "truth" is whatever serves his ego. Even when it's a lie.
This is more than authoritarian fluff. It's economic gaslighting. Just like claiming there have been "zero border crossings" in the last three months. It's not even a good lie. It's just lazy.
Same guy who spent a year ranting about a fake landslide win. Yes, he won the popular vote--but it wasn't Obama '08\. It wasn't Reagan '84\. It wasn't close.
You can get away with gaslighting people on stuff they don't track. But you can't tell them they've "beaten inflation" while their rent's going up, their groceries cost more, and their credit card balance is rising. And it's not just working-class families feeling the squeeze. A recent report from VantageScore found that even people making $150,000 a year are falling behind on their bills.
And yet, the GOP and their media echo chamber keep pushing this fantasy that Trump fixed the economy. Two weeks ago, he said it from the White House lawn. It's nonsense--and it's not going to work.
And that brings me to Texas.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TBR_vwsnbfR5JweXpTBtuvZusMLAGvNOnrcPnW24CqM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170100270)
Because when gaslighting stops working, Republicans reach for their favorite tool: rigging the rules.
This week, Texas Republicans introduced a radically gerrymandered congressional map designed to hand them five more House seats in 2026. It's not subtle. It's not legal (yet). But it is strategic.
Why? Because Donald Trump asked for it.
And today's GOP doesn't resist Trump--they obey him.
Let's be clear: this map isn't about governing or fairness. It's about fear. Fear of a changing electorate. Fear of suburban voters, young people, and Black and brown Texans. Fear of competition. And above all--fear of losing.
So instead of trying to win votes, they're trying to erase them. They're cracking and packing districts, slicing up communities of color, and drawing lines so surgically partisan it would make a corrupt Tammany Hall boss blush.
This isn't confidence. It's cowardice.
Just like Trump tries to fire statisticians when the numbers don't fit the narrative, Texas Republicans are trying to redraw reality to protect themselves from accountability. Because they know they're losing--and instead of improving, they're cheating.
And if that weren't authoritarian enough? When Democratic legislators fled the state to block the vote, Republicans didn't stop to reflect on what they were doing to our democracy. They threatened legal action. Floated arrests. Anything to force a vote on a map that serves Trump--not Texans.
That's not democracy. That's hostage politics.
And while Republicans used to preach federalism and local control, this map is being dictated straight from Mar-a-Lago. It's a national redistricting scheme orchestrated by a man who couldn't name a Texas county if his life depended on it.
This isn't conservatism. It's autocracy with a Southern accent.
And it's not just Texas. Republicans are trying this in Missouri, Georgia, Florida--anywhere they can. Because they know the only way they hold power is by rigging the system.
When you can't win the argument, you redraw the map.
But here's the thing: none of it will save them.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TBR_vwsnbfR5JweXpTBtuvZusMLAGvNOnrcPnW24CqM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170100270)
You can't gerrymander your way out of a grocery bill. You can't redraw a map big enough to make people forget that their paycheck disappears by the 15th of the month. You can't convince a teacher in Houston or a single mom in El Paso that things are fine when their rent keeps climbing and their kids can't get proper meals at school.
You can't tell the American people you care--while kicking 20 million off health care and cutting food assistance for 18 million kids thanks to the Republican budget, just to give billionaires another tax cut.
That's not leadership. That's theft.
Let's be clear: Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security and other government programs aren't a handout. We all pay into it. We work our whole lives, contribute to our economy, pay our taxes--and the government pays us back. That's the deal. But Republicans are breaking it. And they're digging their own political graves.
The GOP isn't governing. They're not planning. They're not solving.
They're lying, cheating, and redrawing the board.
But reality has a way of crashing through. And when it does, no Trump speech, no Fox News segment, no rigged district will be enough to cover it up.
This November, people won't vote based on GDP or manipulated maps. They'll vote based on whether they can afford a home, care for their families, and live with dignity.
And when that happens, Republicans aren't going to get pummeled.
They're going to get smacked with reality.
Not from their donors. Not from their consultants. But from the voters they've spent years trying to silence.
This is where Republicans are making the same mistake Democrats did: thinking outdated economic stats will convince people the economy is great.
Sure, GDP is back at 3%. That's nice on paper. It was strong under Biden, too--quarter after quarter. But that doesn't reflect the lived reality of most Americans: stagnant wages, rising costs, and 80% of the country falling further behind.
When I was on Fox, they wanted to talk GDP. I wanted to talk about real life. Because Americans don't experience the economy in data points. They experience it in questions like:
* Can I buy a house?
* Can I raise a family?
* Can I retire with dignity?
* Can I afford college for my kids?
* Can I take a vacation and be a normal human being?

Right now, for a lot of people, the answer is no. That was true under Biden. It's true under Trump. And last week's Navigator poll made it crystal clear: most Americans say their lives are _worse_ than they were six months ago.
This isn't just a temporary dip. Tariffs are wrecking the economy. Trump has no plan to fix prices, bring back jobs, or do... anything. Except enrich himself and his inner circle.
The Democrats--flawed as we are--_do_ have an economic vision. Slow? Yes. Imperfect? Absolutely. But it's real and it is focused on improving YOUR life. And we have to get better at explaining why it's better and then helping people feel that impact in their day-to-day lives.
Republicans don't have that. What they have is a media machine built to gaslight, so they can enrich the uber-wealthy. But that machine can't change the price of beef. It can't lower your rent. And it sure as hell can't convince you that things are good when they're not.
That's why they're rigging maps in Texas, Missouri, Georgia. But it won't be enough.
Because the American people still believe in the idea of a fair shot. A real democracy. A government that works for them--not just for the wealthy.
And when they show up this November, Republicans won't just lose.
They'll crash face-first into reality.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TBR_vwsnbfR5JweXpTBtuvZusMLAGvNOnrcPnW24CqM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170100270)

This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

name: Nancy Mace for Congress
subject: Nancy Mace Announces Run for Governor
body:
Mace Unveils Her Vision For South Carolina. The Path to Prosperity | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-announces-run-for-governor?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| **Did You See The News?** _Mace Unveils Her Vision For South Carolina_ _The Path To Prosperity to Put South Carolina First_
---
| Today, Congresswoman Nancy Mace officially launched her campaign for Governor of South Carolina with a promise to restore law and order, reduce the state income tax to zero, protect women and kids and send woke ideology out of the state of South Carolina.
---
| | [We Need Your Help](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=8b061f0995&e=ddc57b5ede "We Need Your Help")
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=a250b85266&e=ddc57b5ede)
---
**Nancy Mace For Governor**
| [Click to Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=bf33df11a6&e=ddc57b5ede "Click to Donate")
---
| In her announcement, Mace outlined a clear, conservative, common sense roadmap to rebuild South Carolina from the ground up: **1\. Restore Law and Order**

Mace promised a zero-tolerance approach to crime, pledging to crack down on soft prosecutors, and back the blue. “If you break the law, you pay the price. You will be prosecuted. You will go to jail. Period.”

**2\. End the State Income Tax** Mace will unveil a 5 year plan to eliminate the state income tax, keeping more money in the pockets of hard working South Carolinians and attracting new jobs and investment. “If Florida, Tennessee and Texas can do it, we can too,” said Mace.
**3\. Protect Women and Children** Mace vowed to defend biological reality and stop the radical gender agenda. “No child is born in the wrong body. No boy belongs in a girls’ locker room. And no teenage girl should lose her scholarship to a boy in a skirt. I’ve already started shutting down this woke ideology at South Carolina schools, and will do significantly more to gut this abusive ideology and ship it out of state.”
**5\. Fix the Judicial System** Mace is calling for a complete overhaul of South Carolina’s broken judicial system, including taking the power to appoint judges away from lawyer-legislators. “We don’t need politicians protecting their friends in the court room. We also need to clean up the mess of Solicitors whose campaigns are funded by the very attorneys they have cases against. There’s a reason why criminals don’t get prosecuted any more.”
**6\. Solve the Energy Crisis** Mace plans to streamline energy permitting, expand nuclear and natural gas, and protect families from California-style blackouts. “South Carolina has a serious energy crisis on the horizon. Energy policy should serve the people and have a serious plan for the next 5 years to avoid problems other states are facing.”
**7\. Expand School Choice** Mace will champion the continued expansion of school choice and education savings accounts so that every child - not just the rich or well-connected can access the best education possible.
**8\. Bring Back Vocational Education** Mace proposed allowing vocational high school diplomas for students pursuing skilled trades. “Not every kid needs a four-year degree. Let’s stop shaming the trades and start training the next generation of welders, builders, and mechanics. They make good money and those trades are desperately needed throughout the state.”
**9\. A Message for the Machine** Mace ended her announcement with a message to the establishment: “I didn’t come to join the club. I came to shut it down. I don’t play by their rules - and I never will. I’m not running to make friends. I’m running to make a difference and deliver real results for the great people of South Carolina.”
Her campaign will be led by a vision, “The Path to Prosperity” means law and order, no state income taxes, better educational outcomes, strong families, strong values, and an even stronger South Carolina.
---
| [Click to Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=303e08645c&e=ddc57b5ede "Click to Donate")
---
|
---
| “This isn’t just a campaign - it’s a calling. A call for common sense. A call for courage. And a call to put South Carolina first,” said Rep. Mace. “You and me. This is where our mission begins. God’s not done with South Carolina - and neither am I. I’m Nancy Mace. I’m running for Governor of South Carolina. I will hold the line - I will fight for you. I will put South Carolina first!”
---
| [Click to Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=cd36aa4b08&e=ddc57b5ede "Click to Donate")
---
| –Team Mace campaign@nancymace.org
---

Rep Nancy Mace for Congress295 Seven Farms Dr Ste C-186Daniel Island, SC 29492-8001

You can [update your preferences](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&e=ddc57b5ede&c=9f36f63f2a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&t=b&e=ddc57b5ede&c=9f36f63f2a).

Restore Law and Order Mace promised a zero-tolerance approach to crime, pledging to crack down on soft prosecutors, and back the blue. “If you break the law, you pay the price. You will be prosecuted. You will go to jail. Period.” 2\. End the State Income Tax Mace will unveil a 5 year plan to eliminate the state income tax, keeping more money in the pockets of hard working South Carolinians and attracting new jobs and investment. “If Florida, Tennessee and Texas can do it, we can too,” said Mace. 3\. Protect Women and Children Mace vowed to defend biological reality and stop the radical gender agenda. “No child is born in the wrong body. No boy belongs in a girls’ locker room. And no teenage girl should lose her scholarship to a boy in a skirt. I’ve already started shutting down this woke ideology at South Carolina schools, and will do significantly more to gut this abusive ideology and ship it out of state.” 5\. Fix the Judicial System Mace is calling for a complete overhaul of South Carolina’s broken judicial system, including taking the power to appoint judges away from lawyer-legislators. “We don’t need politicians protecting their friends in the court room. We also need to clean up the mess of Solicitors whose campaigns are funded by the very attorneys they have cases against. There’s a reason why criminals don’t get prosecuted any more.” 6\. Solve the Energy Crisis Mace plans to streamline energy permitting, expand nuclear and natural gas, and protect families from California-style blackouts. “South Carolina has a serious energy crisis on the horizon. Energy policy should serve the people and have a serious plan for the next 5 years to avoid problems other states are facing.” 7\. Expand School Choice Mace will champion the continued expansion of school choice and education savings accounts so that every child - not just the rich or well-connected can access the best education possible. 8\. Bring Back Vocational Education Mace proposed allowing vocational high school diplomas for students pursuing skilled trades. “Not every kid needs a four-year degree. Let’s stop shaming the trades and start training the next generation of welders, builders, and mechanics. They make good money and those trades are desperately needed throughout the state.” 9\. A Message for the Machine Mace ended her announcement with a message to the establishment: “I didn’t come to join the club. I came to shut it down. I don’t play by their rules - and I never will. I’m not running to make friends. I’m running to make a difference and deliver real results for the great people of South Carolina.” Her campaign will be led by a vision, “The Path to Prosperity” means law and order, no state income taxes, better educational outcomes, strong families, strong values, and an even stronger South Carolina. | "Click to Donate" | | “This isn’t just a campaign - it’s a calling. A call for common sense. A call for courage. And a call to put South Carolina first,” said Rep. Mace. “You and me. This is where our mission begins. God’s not done with South Carolina - and neither am I. I’m Nancy Mace. I’m running for Governor of South Carolina. I will hold the line - I will fight for you. I will put South Carolina first!” | "Click to Donate" | –Team Mace campaign@nancymace.org | | Copyright © 2025 Rep Nancy Mace for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Wes Moore
subject: A little bit about me
body:
I met with the team to answer some of your questions.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=410%2E1086043%2EoPeqec)
Hey Peter, we’ve got something special for today’s email. Recently, I met with the team to answer a ton of questions so you can get to know me better.
**[Before we dive in, would you chip in $5 today to help power our mission to make this Maryland’s decade?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250804-1?refcode=em-20250804-1&refcode2=410_1086043_oPeqec&akid=410%2E1086043%2EoPeqec)**
_Onto the good stuff._
**🎵 What’s your go-to hype song?**
I’ve got two: “What We Do” by Freeway, Beanie Sigel, and Jay-Z, and “Optimistic” by Sounds of Blackness.
**📕 What’s your favorite book of all time?**
“Long Walk to Freedom” by Nelson Mandela.
**👏🏽 What’s your favorite emoji?**
It’s got to be this one: 🫡
**🤔 Or, are you more of a GIF guy?**
I’m kinda a GIF guy, but I’m always rocking the salute.
**⚾ Do you have a favorite Orioles or Ravens player?**
Why not both? It’s got to be Adley Rutschman on the Orioles and Lamar Jackson on the Ravens.
**🏈 How about in the past?**
Easy. Cal Ripken for the Orioles and Ray Lewis for the Ravens.
**👨🏽🍳 What’s your favorite thing to cook?**
I love cooking Jamaican food, _especially_ oxtails. There is no recipe, I know what I like.
**🦀 What’s the best way to use Old Bay?**
Is there a bad way to use Old Bay? You can put it on eggs, crabs, burgers — I’ve even put it on ice cream. Convince me there’s a bad way to use Old Bay!
**🧒🏽 What do you do that embarrasses your kids the most?**
Using Gen Z slang does the trick. Things like “rizz” or “that face card” will get them to beg me to stop.
**🦴 What is Tucker’s favorite treat?**
He loves whatever we’re having. Dawn always says not to feed him human food, don’t tell her...
**🤝🏽 What would you say to our supporters asking why they should pitch in?**
This campaign has always been fueled by people like you. It’s a grassroots army that got me elected the first time around, and they’ll do it again.
**[By pitching in $5 or $10 when you are able to, you are helping us build our resources to power this campaign. Will you donate today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250804-1?refcode=em-20250804-1&refcode2=410_1086043_oPeqec&akid=410%2E1086043%2EoPeqec)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250804-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250804-1&refcode2=410_1086043_oPeqec&akid=410%2E1086043%2EoPeqec)**
Thanks for reading.
Elevate,
Wes

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please - for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please - for the sake of all our families - take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue 's Clues_...
---

name: Andrew Ollis, Kash Foundation
subject: Russia Hoax finally EXPOSED
body:
With Tulsi releasing this report and the individual’s full account, she sent a powerful message. The American people deserve the truth.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm5i5jbr10dugkgp3imjd2oc0cm63m51o1muee98_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)
Friend,

Tulsi Gabbard recently declassified a report detailing irrefutable evidence that President Obama, former Director of the CIA John Brennan, and others fabricated the Russia hoax.

Despite being completely fake, a person familiar with the situation revealed that they were **threatened** by a supervisor to go along with the Obama-directed Russia hoax “intelligence” assessment.

With Tulsi releasing this report and the individual’s full account, she sent a powerful message.

**_The American people deserve the truth_.**

At the Kash Foundation, we couldn’t agree more.

We were born from the aftermath of Russiagate — when brave individuals who dared to speak the truth were smeared by the media, attacked in public, and dragged through legal hell.

We stood our ground. We stood for truth. And we built this organization to continue that fight.

Now, leaders like Tulsi are giving the American people what we’ve always fought for: full transparency.

Because when the government hides information from its citizens, trust collapses.

**But when the truth is revealed, accountability is possible.**

The Kash Foundation's mission is to support educational and legal efforts needed to facilitate government transparency with the goal of creating a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to support our fight for transparency and accountability.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi624fedac4h6vaqlolv87e84as6pq6dm7430oag_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)
[DONATE $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb25kt7js9q9vrs57riavch7g18u0o3tnq4eu4u0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)

[DONATE $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkr6f6v3t9upedg6sdrhedo33u9inr5jg1l54ub0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)

[DONATE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdnjohl6q7580m1nto45vgoch1jkub4sg8i5ftpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)

[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkl4p3setcr2oab4hk47mmftvjhicpq3gh836q50_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)

[DONATE $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z46qoko0buscpn0hdv99m6nicjb7usel5brot880_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsp7l8js94g92la2k6fi54a9eak18nr17b5oapp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp7peartchl5leuhr3d3hug1bf54ieql1gugi60o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)
Now that the Government Gangsters have been exposed, it’s time to rebuild trust and support in our institutions, particularly our law enforcement.

**In short, BACK THE BRAVE, BUILD THE FUTURE.**

The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need.

The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to:
* Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.

* Provide scholarships to children of those on the front lines, including veterans, law enforcement, and first responders, and award scholarships to students who sign our oath to honor service members, uphold constitutional liberties, and take responsibility for their education.

* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

This is just the beginning.

We still have a long way to go to bring trust back to our institutions.

But we can’t do it without you.

[That’s why we’re asking you to give a gift of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 to support the Kash Foundation. Please click below to donate today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn42fo7cnkk1nndcqlafed1bcd47e4hr6njhrg28_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)
[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znqsis82281ndgn361sc51et33s4lqnl7cvl13k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cpgm8oj6c9h2bs)
Thank you,

Andrew Ollis
The Kash Foundation

When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm. This is just the beginning. We still have a long way to go to bring trust back to our institutions. But we can’t do it without you. Thank you, Andrew Ollis The Kash Foundation Disclaimer: Kash Patel founded the Kash Foundation but is no longer affiliated in any capacity. The Kash Foundation is an independent nonprofit not endorsed by, associated with, or influenced by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, the Department of Justice, or any government agency. The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to The Kash Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive unlimited calls and recurring SMS/MMS messages, including artificial, pre-recorded, auto-dialed, and automated calls and texts to that number from The Kash Foundation. Msg&data rates may apply. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

* * *
_**2,000 DEMOCRATIC RESPONSES NEEDED from your area!**_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/colbert-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250804_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK) | [YES, I WOULD »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/colbert-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250804_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK)

**ICYMI:** Late night host STEPHEN COLBERT just found out his show got canceled, and Trump is _EXCITED!_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/colbert-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250804_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK)
Because of Trump’s lawsuit against CBS, Stephen Colbert will no longer get to report on this administration’s cruel policies. **This is a HUGE BLOW to our free press, and Colbert’s firing should SCARE US ALL!**

Night after night, Colbert’s reporting on MAGA’s far-right agenda gave MILLIONS access to the TRUTH about Donald Trump. **But as a result, Colbert is facing ATTACKS from Trump and extremist Republicans.** _They’re determined to defame and plummet his ratings even further before he goes off the air._

**But if Stephen Colbert moves to MSNBC,** he can continue his reporting and EXPOSE Trump’s dangerous lies — _this would INFURIATE TRUMP!_

We need to hear feedback from Top Democrats in your area:
[**Respond by Midnight: Would you watch Stephen Colbert if he moved to MSNBC?! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/colbert-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250804_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK)

| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20803%2E878179%2Ex0b4yK)

subject: Sign: 90% of Americans want the Epstein files released. Why the hell is Mike Johnson blocking it?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [ Nearly 90% of all Americans -- including Republicans -- want the Epstein files released. Congress needs to make this happen NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4b530a5-1b77-48a6-8523-e9179a651ed0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Nearly 90% of Americans want the Epstein files released. This includes 83% of Republicans, and even 82% of those who describe themselves as "MAGA Republicans." ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb73b63d0-7127-4485-924d-745194a959db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) **This may the one single thing right now in our nation that has bipartisan support.** But Republican speaker Mike Johnson is blocking a vote. Congress can make this happen. It can force the release, if the Justice Department continues to hold it up. And if Johnson gets out of the way of the will of the people. Americans across the political spectrum know this needs to happen. Congress needs to act. [**Add your name, and tell Congress needs to get back to work, and make it happen NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97de7a2f-4965-4b84-aec1-074926186cf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Re: Enter OLCV’s 2025 Environmental Photo Contest!
body:
Hi Peter,
OLCV’s 2025 Environmental Photo Contest started a couple weeks ago, so I wanted to check if you’ve gotten your photos in! We’d love to include your photos of wildlife, climate, or you and your loved ones (pets included) on public lands in our upcoming Environmental Scorecard. As a reminder, please submit your photos by September 1st.
To enter:
* Send up to 3 photos in an email to respond@olcv.org with ‘Photo Contest’ in the subject line
* Include your name, where the photo was taken, and a short description of why it’s meaningful to you
Our favorite photo will be on the front cover of the Scorecard! Don’t miss this opportunity to have your photos included.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B44466345777536584973617A43452B6D75575A564550592B493559386465584F5637353668682F4A7953546F6F422F4C444842335674703769487356784C4D/editor_images/72225%202025%20Photo%20Contest%20-%20email%20header.png]
Photo from OLCV's 2023 Photo Contest, by Victoria Hawkins
Dear Peter,
It’s that time again... OLCV’s Environmental Photo Contest is here! We’re already working on our Environmental Scorecard for the Oregon Legislature and we need your help. Enter this year’s photo contest for a chance to have your photo included — you might even end up on the cover!
Our Environmental Scorecard is our number one tool for holding our elected leaders accountable and educating Oregonians on how their legislators voted on the environment and climate this session. This is where we need your help: We want your photos to feature in the Scorecard and remind us all why we’re doing this important work.
One of our favorite parts of the Scorecard is all of the photos we get to see from you! We want to see your photos that relate to any or all of these three categories:
1. You, your family, friends and pets on our public lands (we love photos with people in them!)
2. Wildlife
3. Climate
Here are some photos from our last photo contest!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B44466345777536584973617A43452B6D75575A564550592B493559386465584F5637353668682F4A7953546F6F422F4C444842335674703769487356784C4D/editor_images/2025%20Photo%20Contest%20-%20photos.png]
Be a part of this tradition by submitting your photos by September 1st. How to enter:
* Send up to 3 photos in an email to respond@olcv.org [respond@olcv.org] with ‘Photo Contest’ in the subject line
* Include your name, where the photo was taken, and a short description of why it’s meaningful to you
Our favorites will be featured in OLCV’s 2025 Environmental Scorecard, and one lucky winner will have their photo on the cover! We’ll also share all the photos on Facebook after the Scorecard is released in the fall, so find and tag yours.
We’re looking forward to seeing your photos!
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=O4AHJggLHvgKhrzKRNgs6p7qlMbfuMhLlR%2BKTOVjJWURKo9bFqxxIhRZmTcJ122yockDIg2GPaa9qq4xRZ9vnEPbDnAQj%2BIzyo22eW32qZIpm4%2F%2FfaUhyTMf4ESVt1OKLjWAx8F6TM7QuvkLVwreug4HTX2CnhYauwWXVmg9ulX3Hf0mFkj7E96W%2BckmTDkXsR5%2BfQzIgkmME902wkOO%2F03RBWgJykpX%2FTtdyCBpKfo5pH6VX1dSvGjQOQZaqQVZphk4ComLqP3D8WCoqVBwC50av2EC%2FrOTrqbniSCa13d9ljxgOIiAHX5OLkve%2B8G%2BqlDl2UHzCQjpKiHy%2BCyOiqHCQeAfVgMvdjqYirfj4qU115IS7vHDaulLKl%2F6QG0ZwUmiTcQ5sQ9QolGTth9Nj8bd7emPVrWmocEfCFOetas%3D .

body:
It is time to unite behind the conservative we can trust to win | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6b4269820652/welcome-to-team-flippo-10339339?e=273c9a71fb)

| | Friend, The **Esmeralda County Republican Party** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **Nevada’s Fourth District.**
Chairwoman Theresa Moller made it clear. “In the last election, **two Republicans spent nearly two million dollars** attacking each other in the primary. That was two million dollars that could have been used to** defeat Democrat Steve Horsford. We cannot afford to make that mistake again.**
---
|
---
| “David Flippo is **a conservative we can trust** and **a candidate who can win,** **a decorated Air Force veteran,** **a small business owner,** and **a fighter for rural Nevada. Someone who stands with President Trump** and **stands with the people** of this district.” She is absolutely right. I have spent my life **serving our country and our communities,** and I am ready to take that same **mission mindset to Washington** to fight for the **America First agenda** and deliver **real results for Nevada.**

This race is too important to waste on division.**We must unite behind one strong conservative who can win.** I am that candidate, and** __I NEED YOUR SUPPORT!__**
---
| **For Nevada, for freedom, and for America,** David Flippo
_Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=6f552ef0ff&e=273c9a71fb)**_

name: Cole - Flyover CEO
subject: You’re already a reader. Become an owner.
body:
An opportunity to invest in The Flyover

| | |
---
| | |
# MONDAY, AUGUST 4, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Our Founder, Guy Short, has a [huge announcement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskTuLIzEMxz-Np0vwa16Fi4NhulzgOLjSOLac-PAjeDQJ-fbLZBO22XIbFfpJP_hL_w76YEIM-fzbJFDoi3bggjUITme4LxEQoepHWSuYWMG4h9kq1BPYkkBzytsdHXZUauv9GuPXPmuc8gAcRAOK9a0UvB9a0VyU8a0UdmSOnmw3CHPiZpS0N7wbR-E72gS1eelAJetZL9h-ZINzvu1oD4zblhNJwQUsdf-_hIwX8PFRblD3tqQmqgvidSHiF-Ez4XPIN1jwm8kNi3nFpJeyVgtETMd7Brc7gAuG8G5DCVxYExHT9E72AtakqwnnTMQ0fzrfoGSEjERMf56nWl59hLp5_s7HSQ9U8rapyl3vIcawdD2R9JxMiM8I-OO_uCn-EQAA__-Pp6g9) for you below. Today, we're doing something unprecedented for a major media company. We've always depended on your support, and now we're ready to partner even closer with you. I hope you'll take a few minutes to find out how you can own _The Flyover_. -- Cole, _CEO_
* * *
**Dear Flyover Reader,** Every morning, you open your inbox looking for something you can trust. And every morning, _The Flyover_ is there--delivering honest, fact-based news without spin or hidden agendas. But what if you could do more than just read the news you believe in? Today, we're launching an [opportunity for you to invest in it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskTuLIzEMxz-Np0vwa16Fi4NhulzgOLjSOLac-PAjeDQJ-fbLZBO22XIbFfpJP_hL_w76YEIM-fzbJFDoi3bggjUITme4LxEQoepHWSuYWMG4h9kq1BPYkkBzytsdHXZUauv9GuPXPmuc8gAcRAOK9a0UvB9a0VyU8a0UdmSOnmw3CHPiZpS0N7wbR-E72gS1eelAJetZL9h-ZINzvu1oD4zblhNJwQUsdf-_hIwX8PFRblD3tqQmqgvidSHiF-Ez4XPIN1jwm8kNi3nFpJeyVgtETMd7Brc7gAuG8G5DCVxYExHT9E72AtakqwnnTMQ0fzrfoGSEjERMf56nWl59hLp5_s7HSQ9U8rapyl3vIcawdD2R9JxMiM8I-OO_uCn-EQAA__-Pp6g9). In the past, this kind of opportunity would have been reserved for venture capitalists on Wall Street. But we're opening it up to our 2.5 million loyal readers. More than 70 million readers are looking for more honest news. This is your chance to invest as we prepare to reach them. We've already shown we have what it takes. Our media platform is growing 611% year-over-year, driving industry-leading engagement, and proving that Americans are hungry for a new kind of news. Now, we're inviting you to take the next step in this journey with us. For the first time, you can own a piece of the news you trust. By becoming an investor in _The Flyover_ , you'll help ensure this platform stays independent and focused on what matters most: serving you, not advertisers or social media algorithms. name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: Winsome Earle-Sears is floundering, but the GOP is ready to bail her out
body:
When Republicans know they're in trouble, they double down. Here's what that means for us: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112728080/561419554/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE803_20250804_WESDisaster_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ3NDJiMC01NzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ek6gulQbACwJdwO6HNfP8IOj7dStcNTK_eMIl_mDCBI=) Peter — We've got some revealing insight into the Virginia governor's race.

According to _The Hill_ , top Republicans are privately calling GOP nominee Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign a "disaster." They say she's struggling to raise money, failing to connect with voters, and falling behind in the polls. There's even talk that they regret backing her in the first place. But let me be crystal clear:**This race for governor is nowhere near over.** Republicans will rally around their candidate, even after admitting she's completely unfit to lead. ****[**The other side is doing everything they can to keep the governor's seat in Republican control. Let's not give them the chance. Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women like Abigail Spanberger WIN in November:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112728081/561419555/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE803_20250804_WESDisaster_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ3NDJiMC01NzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ek6gulQbACwJdwO6HNfP8IOj7dStcNTK_eMIl_mDCBI=)**** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112728082/561419556/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE803_20250804_WESDisaster_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ3NDJiMC01NzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ek6gulQbACwJdwO6HNfP8IOj7dStcNTK_eMIl_mDCBI=)
---
Republicans are already working hard behind the scenes to clean up the mess of the Earle-Sears campaign. They've got the money. They've got the infrastructure. And they've got a sitting Republican governor who's popular with the GOP base — and deeply invested in keeping Virginia red.
They're going to spend whatever it takes to pull Earle-Sears across the finish line.
So while they deal with internal chaos, we're staying laser-focused. Because we can't just sit back and wait for our opponent's campaign to fall apart. This is our biggest pickup opportunity in 2025, AND one of the most critical governor's races in the country for reproductive rights — and right now, _it's ours to lose_.
Abigail Spanberger is exactly the kind of leader Virginians are ready for — a proven public servant, a champion for reproductive freedom, and someone who puts people ahead of politics.

But here's the truth: **Virginia is still a battleground, and this race _will still_ be close. **

Virginia Republicans are now on defense, which means they'll flood the airwaves with lies. They'll try to rewrite their record. And if we're not ready, they could absolutely flip this narrative and win.
****[**A lot can change in a couple of months, and we need to keep our foot on the gas for the next 92 days to get candidates like Abigail safely across the finish line. clean_body: When Republicans know they're in trouble, they double down. Here's what that means for us: | = Peter — We've got some revealing insight into the Virginia governor's race. According to The Hill , top Republicans are privately calling GOP nominee Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign a "disaster." They say she's struggling to raise money, failing to connect with voters, and falling behind in the polls. There's even talk that they regret backing her in the first place. But let me be crystal clear:This race for governor is nowhere near over. Republicans will rally around their candidate, even after admitting she's completely unfit to lead. **= | = Republicans are already working hard behind the scenes to clean up the mess of the Earle-Sears campaign. They've got the money. They've got the infrastructure. And they've got a sitting Republican governor who's popular with the GOP base — and deeply invested in keeping Virginia red. They're going to spend whatever it takes to pull Earle-Sears across the finish line. So while they deal with internal chaos, we're staying laser-focused. Because we can't just sit back and wait for our opponent's campaign to fall apart. This is our biggest pickup opportunity in 2025, AND one of the most critical governor's races in the country for reproductive rights — and right now, it's ours to lose. Abigail Spanberger is exactly the kind of leader Virginians are ready for — a proven public servant, a champion for reproductive freedom, and someone who puts people ahead of politics. But here's the truth: Virginia is still a battleground, and this race will still be close. Virginia Republicans are now on defense, which means they'll flood the airwaves with lies. They'll try to rewrite their record. And if we're not ready, they could absolutely flip this narrative and win. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being in it with us, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: The Ohio Dems
subject: Trump’s Medicaid cuts are devastating rural Ohio hospitals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
no thanks to the Ohio GOP
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112728543/561421061/-46464775?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_RuralHospitals_250804_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzhiMTBlMy01ODcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGx91r0ralCnhy7h_bIUhF3lMFIfHpfys1dZNVlWdno=) Team,

Trump’s Medicaid cuts are pushing rural hospitals to the brink, and Ohioans are going to pay the price.

[**_While we can't turn back time and stop Trump's Big, Beautiful Bill, we can defeat the Ohio Republicans who voted for it in next year's elections and flip control of Congress. Can we count on you to chip in so we can hold the GOP accountable at the ballot box?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112728545/561421063/-46464775?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_RuralHospitals_250804_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzhiMTBlMy01ODcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGx91r0ralCnhy7h_bIUhF3lMFIfHpfys1dZNVlWdno=)

Mothers and newborns are at the frontline of this healthcare crisis. Medicaid covers 40% of births nationwide and nearly half in rural areas. As rural hospitals lose maternity wards, Medicaid cuts will force families to travel farther, face risky emergency deliveries, and face worse outcomes.

Hospitals aren’t just places to get care, too – they’re major employers. When they have to cut services or close, families lose not only their healthcare, but also the jobs that keep our rural communities afloat.

And the worst part? The Republicans who voted for it knew _exactly_ this would happen. They had the data in front of them and they **chose to ignore it**. They dumped healthcare for Ohioans so their billionaire megadonors could get even bigger tax breaks.

[**_If you’re tired of watching this cruelty pass for leadership, chip in now to help us elect Ohio Democrats who will protect, defend, and expand Ohioans’ healthcare >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112728547/561421065/-46464775?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_RuralHospitals_250804_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzhiMTBlMy01ODcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGx91r0ralCnhy7h_bIUhF3lMFIfHpfys1dZNVlWdno=)

Thank you,

Ohio Dems **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112728548/561421067/-46464775?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_RuralHospitals_250804_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzhiMTBlMy01ODcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGx91r0ralCnhy7h_bIUhF3lMFIfHpfys1dZNVlWdno=)**

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: We Must Defend the Voice of TX-18
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://www.edwardsforhouston.com/ [https://www.edwardsforhouston.com/]
Friend,
I stand in support of the Texas House members who have left the state to prevent a dangerous redistricting plan from moving forward. The proposed mid-decade Redistricting was wrong on multiple levels. The process did not allow enough public comment opportunities or time to modify the maps.
Under the proposed redistricting plan the 18th Congressional District would be severely weakened. It now lacks historic areas like Acres Homes and key assets like IAH airport.
Simply put: these proposed lines are not designed to serve people.
https://www.politico.com/news/2025/08/03/democrats-flee-texas-redistricting-00491487 [https://www.politico.com/news/2025/08/03/democrats-flee-texas-redistricting-00491487]
This redistricting effort threatens to erase the legacy of TX-18. From Barbara Jordan to Mickey Leland to Sheila Jackson Lee, it would silence communities that have worked tirelessly to ensure representation, fairness, and opportunity for all.
I applaud the lawmakers who have taken this stand for communities across Texas whose representation is under attack.
Onwards,
Amanda K. Edwards
Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. name: Team Abdul
subject: We can’t build a better future with cowardice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250804-627&t=1001&akid=649%2E251025%2EHvgzYh ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250804-627&t=1002&akid=649%2E251025%2EHvgzYh ]Abdul for US Senate

For nearly two years, we’ve watched a genocide unfold in Gaza that should
shake every conscience.

Entire neighborhoods flattened, countless lives lost, and still, our tax
dollars keep funding it.

Other candidates in this race won’t even say the word “genocide,” let
alone try to stop it. They’re scared of losing the big checks that come
with silence.

Peter, we
can’t build a better future with cowardice.

Abdul is the only candidate in this race with the courage to speak up —
even if AIPAC and MAGA billionaires come after him for doing so.

He’s calling out our government for sending billions in blank checks for
Netanyahu’s regime, demanding that we invest that money here at home to
better our schools, healthcare, and communities.

But this kind of honesty comes with a price. Those who profit from endless
war, like AIPAC, are going to come after us.

That’s why we’re counting on support from folks like you to fight back.
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250804-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250804-627&refcode2=649_251025_HvgzYh&akid=649%2E251025%2EHvgzYh ]Can you donate $10 today to help us build a government
that puts working people first?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250804-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250804-627&refcode2=649_251025_HvgzYh&akid=649%2E251025%2EHvgzYh ]Donate $10 ››

If we want elected officials who will actually do something in moments of
moral crisis, we have to elect them ourselves — and Abdul is the leader we
need right now.

Thank you for sticking with us,

Team Abdul

Entire neighborhoods flattened, countless lives lost, and still, our tax dollars keep funding it. Other candidates in this race won’t even say the word “genocide,” let alone try to stop it. They’re scared of losing the big checks that come with silence. Peter, we can’t build a better future with cowardice. Abdul is the only candidate in this race with the courage to speak up — even if AIPAC and MAGA billionaires come after him for doing so. He’s calling out our government for sending billions in blank checks for Netanyahu’s regime, demanding that we invest that money here at home to better our schools, healthcare, and communities. But this kind of honesty comes with a price. Those who profit from endless war, like AIPAC, are going to come after us. That’s why we’re counting on support from folks like you to fight back. [ ]Can you donate $10 today to help us build a government that puts working people first? [ ]Donate $10 ›› If we want elected officials who will actually do something in moments of moral crisis, we have to elect them ourselves — and Abdul is the leader we need right now. Thank you for sticking with us, Team Abdul

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Tell Harrisburg: Do Your Job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
Harrisburg must do its job and deliver the budget Pennsylvania families need. | | | Peter, On Thursday, workers and union leaders gathered at the AFL-CIO office in Philadelphia to send a clear message: Harrisburg must do its job and deliver the budget Pennsylvania families need. **[Read more here »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMb5WRSP9wPnRCZ_8xeA56O6CKK2Hr64nVh4ZVxBisfA7rV7Qi3IwCquCxDzOC1lNtQsAMHf-NOtyDmjxSCxbrnUsWwvctwnKgHxd4xwjVIvF4xQI9YGcmcFn25YumGNA7B_r0xt3qeyK_-j5SxwYu0WgO3l7tZ8N65_6NDAiEWHRhLwdjRPpG_xnjjxygE6zpFB_MwUbxZgL4Op9yAxJqBg0_-bQDak2a09z5KPu23KDGogRcSaMhrNFhgV6I5yeX9nLbGhHConrxtMUXS3Tooqgglw8PaWNF3MrQ23pj-cca06kugiM7clFRPm4N9oYOQgeNt3KKigPKRhnEXTveRAK4ghSp6XD9nAZvmlKjiO4/4ir/ciZeOAnlRWeIdij1OMAyhg/h0/h001.vZicGDe30vNhBuYKpF6CtxzCY_M91j1CvLQqo3xn3h4) ** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMb5WRSP9wPnRCZ_8xeA56O6CKK2Hr64nVh4ZVxBisfA7rV7Qi3IwCquCxDzOC1lNtQsAMHf-NOtyDmjxSCxbrnUsWwvctwnKgHxd4xwjVIvFiLI0VPNuJwOvwqtOoxR5zVi5lYK3Z_xv8z3fcxGbRO4gQvl-e6g6Ei86cUdR7S79KM6uL9mlDJN3RlB90Mw6zQ0kVmTkkVh_IJD4m65ftHQ7FQXO8uAE9YzkwG5egfEc3Df7xz3rWArlVLxHKoyzl2OxG02_nsCqfjarZ-6m5_kgbc2n6j6a_yNOKcRhBt4Nx9JeyLH06RR2Uf9QE23igyLChK89Dc1GV3avibhCPXeSTgJ95nUdXDzxOksKQIOe/4ir/ciZeOAnlRWeIdij1OMAyhg/h1/h001.lRX0br4_jmwR5hXrRjv3r-Egt2i4RW84EV68RaeFKlA) The state budget was due June 30th. It’s now AUGUST, **and every day without a budget is another day of harm to the people who keep our Commonwealth running.** Here’s just a subset of what’s at stake:
* SEPTA will start draconian cuts on August 24th. That means longer waits, higher fares, and _more traffic._
* Funding for Pre-K Counts and Head Start has expired — childcare centers are already struggling to stay open.
* $1.4 billion for K–12 schools and $255 million for special education won’t be delivered.
* Community colleges are set to lose $98 million, limiting access to affordable higher education.
* Another day that tens of thousands of workers make $7.25

**And with Trump’s federal Medicaid cuts looming, over 310,000 Pennsylvanians could lose their health coverage — unless the state steps up.** Instead of doing their jobs, Senate Republicans are wasting time on political distractions and siding with Trump’s cruel agenda. Meanwhile, our teachers, transit workers, nurses, and public employees are being forced to do more with less — _again._ The Pennsylvania Working Families Party stands in full solidarity with Philly labor and working people across the state. We need a budget that reflects our values, not Trump’s. _**👉 Peter, call Republican Senate Leadership today and demand a budget that funds public education, protects our healthcare, and invests in working people, not political games:**_ _Senator Joe Pittman, Majority Leader:__(724) 357-0151_ _Senator Kim Ward, President Pro Tempore: (724) 600-7002_ _Senator Scott Martin, Appropriations Chair: (717) 397-1309_ Let’s show Harrisburg we won’t stay silent while our communities are defunded and disrespected. clean_body: Harrisburg must do its job and deliver the budget Pennsylvania families need. | | | Peter, On Thursday, workers and union leaders gathered at the AFL-CIO office in Philadelphia to send a clear message: Harrisburg must do its job and deliver the budget Pennsylvania families need. The state budget was due June 30th. It’s now AUGUST, and every day without a budget is another day of harm to the people who keep our Commonwealth running. Here’s just a subset of what’s at stake: SEPTA will start draconian cuts on August 24th. That means longer waits, higher fares, and more traffic. Funding for Pre-K Counts and Head Start has expired — childcare centers are already struggling to stay open. $1.4 billion for K–12 schools and $255 million for special education won’t be delivered. Community colleges are set to lose $98 million, limiting access to affordable higher education. Another day that tens of thousands of workers make $7.25 And with Trump’s federal Medicaid cuts looming, over 310,000 Pennsylvanians could lose their health coverage — unless the state steps up. Instead of doing their jobs, Senate Republicans are wasting time on political distractions and siding with Trump’s cruel agenda. Meanwhile, our teachers, transit workers, nurses, and public employees are being forced to do more with less — again. The Pennsylvania Working Families Party stands in full solidarity with Philly labor and working people across the state. We need a budget that reflects our values, not Trump’s. 👉 Peter, call Republican Senate Leadership today and demand a budget that funds public education, protects our healthcare, and invests in working people, not political games: Senator Joe Pittman, Majority Leader:(724) 357-0151 Senator Kim Ward, President Pro Tempore: (724) 600-7002 Senator Scott Martin, Appropriations Chair: (717) 397-1309 Let’s show Harrisburg we won’t stay silent while our communities are defunded and disrespected. In solidarity, The Pennsylvania Working Families Party Become a Working Families Party Member!** Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party | | Sent via . name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I held a town hall in Darrell Issa’s district and more than 500 people showed up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Quick update from San Diego:
Like so many House Republicans in recent months, Darrell Issa has refused to face his constituents. So... I did!
Last weekend, I joined local Indivisible groups for an “Empty Chair Town Hall” in Escondido (Rep. Issa’s district!). Hundreds of people showed up to make their voices heard, and I listened.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5439576741614F344F4C5643326C49344F4271345243734B30335871744A543854644C517276377A7461364E494F68626B4668554E6D4C716C7750712B633339/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-08-04%20at%201.05.36%E2%80%AFPM.png]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5439576741614F344F4C5643326C49344F4271345243734B30335871744A543854644C517276377A7461364E494F68626B4668554E6D4C716C7750712B633339/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-08-04%20at%201.05.44%E2%80%AFPM.png]
We talked about everything from the cost of housing and child care to how we restore trust in government. People are frustrated – and I get that. Rebuilding trust in both the government and the Democratic Party starts with showing up, listening, and delivering real results.
I heard a lot of the same concerns and questions when I joined a DNC town hall in Utah a few weeks ago – where GOP Rep. Burgess Owens is similarly avoiding his constituents – and I’ll keep answering tough questions wherever and whenever I can, because that’s a non-negotiable part of being an elected official.
This work isn’t just about standing up and speaking out – it’s about sitting down and hearing people out. And if the Democratic Party is going to offer voters a bold, affirmative vision for the future, we need to do a lot of that! It’s not enough to resist, we need to rebuild.
If you were there in Escondido, thank you so much for being part of this. And if you couldn’t make it, I hope I’ll see you next time.
More soon,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

In Congress, I will fight for smart clean energy incentives – because investing in clean energy is better for our grid, our economy, and for the future of our environment.

| Peter,

Recently, I spoke with Roll Call about how Ryan Mackenzie is raising energy costs for Pennsylvania families.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112730805/561429438/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI2ZDk3ZDMtNWQ3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nnvf_hL44X-cEMzG43QBoLLJUPpA1ZauanbpBn5Zglk=)
By cutting clean energy tax credits, Republicans are **increasing utility bills and cutting jobs in the clean energy sector.**

**As an energy systems engineer, I know firsthand that these cuts will hurt not only the environment, but also your pocketbook.** Ryan Mackenzie cares more about lining billionaires’ pockets than making life more affordable for Pennsylvanians. That pisses me off.

In Congress, I will fight for smart clean energy incentives – because investing in clean energy is better for our grid, our economy, and for the future of our environment. I’ll make sure we’re not held back by people like Ryan Mackenzie who put corporate interests ahead of working families.

[_**If you’re with me, will you help us fight back against Ryan Mackenzie? Anything you can give today makes a difference in creating a better future for Pennsylvania.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112730807/561429440/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI2ZDk3ZDMtNWQ3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nnvf_hL44X-cEMzG43QBoLLJUPpA1ZauanbpBn5Zglk=)

clean_body: In Congress, I will fight for smart clean energy incentives – because investing in clean energy is better for our grid, our economy, and for the future of our environment. | = | Peter, Recently, I spoke with Roll Call about how Ryan Mackenzie is raising energy costs for Pennsylvania families. = By cutting clean energy tax credits, Republicans are increasing utility bills and cutting jobs in the clean energy sector. As an energy systems engineer, I know firsthand that these cuts will hurt not only the environment, but also your pocketbook. Ryan Mackenzie cares more about lining billionaires’ pockets than making life more affordable for Pennsylvanians. That pisses me off. In Congress, I will fight for smart clean energy incentives – because investing in clean energy is better for our grid, our economy, and for the future of our environment. I’ll make sure we’re not held back by people like Ryan Mackenzie who put corporate interests ahead of working families. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Carol Obando-Derstine * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Joe Jaworski
subject: Abbott chose politics over protecting lives
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
Governor Greg Abbott and Texas government, by Executive Order and with other laws already in place, can today fund new early flood warning systems. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/redistricting-texas-gop?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=6bf55bf236&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Governor Greg Abbott and Texas government, by Executive Order and with other laws already in place, can today fund new early flood warning systems along flash flood alley, a portion of the Texas Hill Country whose climate and terrain make it uniquely susceptible to sudden and catastrophic flooding. Governor Abbott, the Texas Division of Emergency Management and the Texas Water Development Board all can purpose tens of millions of dollars to make change happen now. But instead of using a special session to prioritize public safety, Governor Abbott caved to pressure from Donald Trump and called lawmakers back to Austin for one reason: _to force a mid-decade redistricting of congressional maps that are only four years old_. **Let’s be clear. This isn’t about policy, it’s about power.** Abbott hijacked a moment of urgent need for Texas families and turned it into a political stunt, all to protect the GOP’s hold on Congress. And when Democrats refused to play along, they were accused of obstruction. But here’s the truth: **💥 The funding for flood safety already exists.
💥 The special session was never about saving lives.
💥 Democrats used the only tool they had—quorum rules—to stand against political corruption.** We cannot let the people of Texas suffer because of one man’s weakness and another’s ego. **Joe Jaworski is running to be the kind of Attorney General who prioritizes public safety over partisan games.** Someone who believes government should serve _people_ , not power. [🌊 **If you believe Texas deserves better, chip in today to help us fight back.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=0ceedec58c&e=5d8d80652b) Let’s bring honesty, courage, and public service back to the state of Texas. Onward,

Joe Jaworski

Most importantly, we’re going to show the American people that Donald Trump is a failure and a fraud, and shed light on all the darkness that he’s casting over our country.
But first, we need to actually win back power and kick these spineless MAGA Republicans out of the majority.

name: Scott Brown
subject: Chris Pappas wants to tax tips
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
In case you missed it, Chris Pappas voted AGAINST NO TAX ON TIPS.

That means he thinks the IRS should be able to keep taking money from
restaurant workers – from servers, bartenders, and hourly staff who earn their
living one shift at a time.

Let’s be clear: Tips belong to the workers who earn them.

But Chris Pappas doesn’t see it that way. He chose the D.C. political class
over the people who make our economy work. Why? Because he’s a partisan liberal
who never misses a chance to grow government – no matter who gets hurt.

That’s why I’m in this race, Patriot .
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/defeat-pappas-no-tax-on-tips-acs/?recuring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aafc_acs&utm_campaign=20250804_defeat-pappas_sb>

I’m running for Senate to stand up for workers, fight back against nonsense
like this, and send a message that America is tired of being taken for granted.

You shouldn’t be punished for working hard. You shouldn’t owe taxes on the
tips you earn through hustle and grit. And you sure as heck shouldn’t be
represented by someone who thinks otherwise.
If you agree, I’m asking you to get in this fight with me today. Chip in to
help us take on Chris Pappas and protect workers across New Hampshire.
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/defeat-pappas-no-tax-on-tips-acs/?recuring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aafc_acs&utm_campaign=20250804_defeat-pappas_sb>
DONATE TODAY
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/defeat-pappas-no-tax-on-tips-acs/?recuring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aafc_acs&utm_campaign=20250804_defeat-pappas_sb>
This campaign is about respect – for work, for workers, and for the people who
still believe in earning their way.

- Scott Brown

Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc.

Scott Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank,
job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Army
or the Department of Defense.

Rye, NH 03870

name: Saikat for Congress
subject: Here's how to keep the momentum going
body:
Let's follow our amazing office opening with an amazing first day of volunteer canvassing

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=61832aa721&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | |
# Let’s keep up the momentum!
500+ people showing up for our office opening party — almost a year before the primary — sent a shockwave through the San Francisco political establishment. (Didn’t make it? Check out the video below!)_**Let’s follow that with hundreds showing up to knock doors this Saturday!**_
---
| [Sign up for a Saturday canvassing shift](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=5d501ec1ff&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| Dear null
You’ve probably heard that Zohran’s campaign knocked on more than one million doors, holding more than a quarter million conversations with voters — a crucial factor in his success.
Guess what? On a per-voter basis, we need to do that TIMES FIVE. That’s because voter turnout is so much higher in San Francisco primaries than in New York. The good news: We’ve got time! Ten months ‘till the primary, and then another five until the general election.
No one ever said changing something as entrenched as our national Democratic Party leadership was going to be easy. But without you all it’s impossible! If you want change, we’re going to need at least a couple hours each month from **all** of you. (And we know some of you will jump in with even more!)
---
[|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=1780dd5795&e=bf17056ae8)
| Here’s more good news: Canvassing in San Francisco is fun! As someone who’s knocked doors on campaigns in at least two dozen cities, I can tell you that SF is the best. It’s dense, a lot of people are home, and people are actually happy to greet you. I can honestly say, I’ve never gotten a bad vibe on an SF door!
Plus, when you come down to the office this Saturday — or any Saturday between now and the election — you’re going to meet some really cool people, campaign staff, and, at least this Saturday, Saikat!
I promise you: door knocking isn’t a gimmick. It’s not for show. We’ve done our research, and we know that Saikat will win if we can do these two things:
1) Convince new voters (young people, recently registered, and recent citizens) to vote in the primary.
2) Tell “automatic” Pelosi voters that there is a serious candidate on the ballot this cycle — with impressive experience in both Congress (as AOC’s first Chief of Staff) _and_ business (as the first product engineer at Stripe) — and that they don’t need to give Nancy Pelosi a 41st and 42nd year in Congress just out of habit!
We’ve been on the doors for a few weeks already, and we’ve found that tons of people are truly ready for change — and genuinely excited to hear about Saikat. Now we just need to scale up: canvassing, tabling at farmers markets, attending neighborhood fairs and festivals — being everywhere we can reach voters. If we do that, we will win.
Please join us this Saturday at 11:00AM, 800 Irving St!
Zack ExleyCampaign ManagerSaikat for Congress
PS: Yes, our emails have a new look! We’re sending from Mailchimp now and have given Substack the heave-ho. But the person signing the emails is still the one actually writing them. Promise! No consultants, no “email program”, and definitely no AI.

---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=85c7fef753&e=bf17056ae8)
---
[](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=5394da1aa9&e=bf17056ae8)
---

---

---

---

---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Peter,

**I 'm looking for some Patriots to join me in packing up Ilhan Omar's bags and sending her back to where she came from: Somalia.** Are you with me?

She has a storied history of outwardly hating America as a U.S. Congresswoman, and her recent comments are the straw that broke the camel's back. Here's just a couple of examples of what I'm talking about:

_"[America is] now turned into one of the worst countries." \- Ilhan Omar, June 2025

"While I am in Congress, no one will take Somalia's sea." - Ilhan Omar, January 2024_
**Congresswoman Omar, if you hate America so much, you are more than welcome to leave.**

If you think America is one of the worst countries in the world, and if your priority as a Representative for Americans is to protect Somalia's seas, then it's time for you to head back to Somalia, where you apparently belong.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6942599cbc984b7da3f2350e1e5938d4&_e=Wc7Ne6jNO4Vq2FmukGjjBYZBkv6GRge4yoZYLbn6tE9b-4u2UmT1IT6U0mmAClxJM8sCOVcjniXm1vRBwpiRQ28HrTTgde6rC70pfmd6xcMv1HKXQ5Ak_w1017zKUZ2Suk2R8doXDffre1ysZOtcCeSz956EKjIOsRr7LEAfKuwg9Rv3oF5nItJ0NnMOGb-wCkmEYCsrL6iV_geeL9nwARO-c7Bk81iecaKMd7_OeL9MVbGpX9JY1GonBUkYgll4oCCw2Yb6Qe_o8NNT_D5AFQsJw1sinGWPiBYZDkX0oOHWqhZkJXxLy5KSp8EsTT9di4EBVnlRUOg_EQPJqZmgX7H73GYun7CtrBdMVxFtPgUB-QcwsF-BW5o-ew5EQ7Tpuk-hX9LvyVdCjdQwRZsVHxl-TagGHDbLY3CRn5LNPAeEHJykS1hCGEYuOSExEP25cCYrN8I64UPCpJmKsKpZEXN3XHwD9lVNfJjZ2QMN2f1uiivStp_D5UFTeokoVeq42g163oGOh_z57_9OB1NM7LbEeTzM2QQCEfTNeu44s8v35-9Ga5RDWRSvwMChuJlt)

Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: the stories I hear
