body:
what matters to you matters to me

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4368?t=2&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv)
---
Hi {{ user.first_name|default:"friend" }}, it’s Haley – writing to you from Traverse City, Michigan!

It’s Day 4 of my _Made in Michigan_ tour, and I’ve been talking with incredible Michiganders all across the state – each one sharing what matters most to their families and communities right now.
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4384?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv)
I’m listening to every story. And I’m more fired up than ever to fight for working people in the U.S. Senate. **[But I can’t do it alone, I need you to stand with me: Will you take a moment to endorse my campaign before midnight tonight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4384?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4384?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv)
---
This race is personal. I grew up the Michigan way – surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. I helped lead the auto rescue during the Great Recession, helping save over 200,000 jobs right here in Michigan. Then I flipped a red seat blue in 2018 and have delivered real results in Congress for working families.
Now I’m running for Senate because **I believe every Michigander deserves a fighter who shows up, listens, and gets things done.**
But Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, and a GOP super PAC just raised $5 million for him. Polls show I’m the best Democrat to defeat Rogers – and even Republican insiders say I’m the toughest general election opponent they could face.
**We can win this race.** We can keep this seat blue. And we can flip the Senate for Democrats. But it will take all of us.

[**We set a goal of 10,000 grassroots endorsements by midnight – and I’m personally asking you to be one of them:**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4384?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv)

---
Thank you for standing with me.

With gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** {{ user.first_name|default:"Friend" }}, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4384?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250email%3Ddpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4368?t=9&akid=508%2E49239%2Er8lLrv)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

subject: A hospital right here in our district
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112732493/561435748/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JmY2U5MC02MjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ivGb00_D3Oo5btYf-Rm9yoy_hIsv8juF3ODU4ihpa0=)

Peter,

This week, Christina visited a rural hospital right here in our district — and what she heard from hospital leaders should concern everyone.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112732494/561435749/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250804_Medica_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250804_Medica_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=33bfce90-6271-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JmY2U5MC02MjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ivGb00_D3Oo5btYf-Rm9yoy_hIsv8juF3ODU4ihpa0=)
This hospital, like many across rural America, is facing massive cuts to Medicaid subsidies due to the tax bill Mariannette Miller-Meeks gleefully approved. While their doors remain open _for now,_ the future is uncertain. Here’s the reality:

When Medicaid subsidies disappear, hospitals don’t shut down overnight. But piece by piece, they begin to lose the things that keep them running. That’s how closures happen.

And it doesn’t just affect patients on Medicaid. These subsidies help cover the costs of care for _everyone_. Thanks to this funding, our hospitals can keep the lights on, pay nurses, doctors, and support staff, buy new machines, and ensure the hospital can treat all patients, not just the ones with perfect insurance.

This hospital is bracing for an influx of patients as nearby facilities close. But without help, they may not be able to handle the surge. Rural hospitals are lifelines. And without them, families are left with fewer options and longer drives during their most vulnerable moments.

**Christina is running to be a present, accountable, and effective representative for Iowa’s 1st District.** She’s already standing up to these cuts — and she’ll do everything in her power to reverse them when elected to Congress.

But first, we need to get her there.

**[Make a donation today to help Christina win this race and protect Iowa’s hospitals>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112732495/561435750/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250804_Medica_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250804_Medica_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=33bfce90-6271-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2JmY2U5MC02MjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ivGb00_D3Oo5btYf-Rm9yoy_hIsv8juF3ODU4ihpa0=)**

— Team Bohannan

name: Don Jr.
subject: My father loves you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I wanted to take a moment to say THANK YOU, Fellow American. |
Fellow American,

I wanted to say THANK YOU.

_**[Because of patriots like you, we retook the Senate, defended the House, and helped put President Trump back in the White House in 2024.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=183a67d301ed43e3b93c38c4e2cc3a01&_e=aCZtTWhcy2liedJ-L5B9XH-bLTYZaIozqPG7t9wgXRkm4DusiYqeBeTFth7zFRK0nhEVHIIvfZGOeGY2cCLw88f4qR-VNrb3LqjbsB0LSsMKXI6ar2fZCIiJeavvgDdQCYXWMhTtg0EMCWNVOeNJOeFRbisNS6wa8yo5mojTBQ0JtZd1CeCLg7AbIWXuH3K_CMdwagndMDEfx-8geyb6U4VkuDkY5i_vfuz1XLHxnmQGKKAlpcBsP5MIL5Dq_My4l0M44OarI7cMQqBzQOK1T8yL1s3JXRhm-qUE-ThlRKez6ZeV6d3PGStRT-cPLiVCighmvWs1sPkcU5wN3e6GhstR0bk8jbwmv-O50KO_dJevE9NeqIwVd8OWZYNtF1Vt5Z4Tfp1AK6kIOBj3MYb37cetlFjneyXD7GfADxA2EmrY2QE3JgfltwUx0hpngBGkrTAFnUxdPQTaC9ZN0HoloNsN-rSU6l000ycUw5H1sk8kfcI7J0H1v2iRbiN1Fnti4EetAq0xzbJM1XZ_chZQTs4Mcbc9GeRHKhqxoQN4y3MwkK9W5fnmXymFv7nd4kI9GO_MZd8LETcHXubpwU2UTII4MdhgjvEkhqHFLhjHUYu0clRXfcfX05w66DVT4hVUghoCTvtOJScL-SuDzVItqLo6BRFVg4kaPex3xCcCdi0IQal7cLzV0pLdtccQ1UlJaBetlB8wKssOHv7EyFV3zBW_iFCT177uLo3tSMoTz5Wi7XzPAymuXhTSMe3M9cJcRMFZiuTY8asfjelphJEWeacoMAa0ucpAnOT5wBv9MmkoCxFH_oUqxm0SeieU54iciE5BQtGfiaugPZrxemoGy2Emh4WEUN6kWSHhShb12woniCHl64By6aHII522EhTLJVcDfbSa1kKpXgvAi4-ZkMiBMPBCEdG9qsnIMMO2RjF-0qh13uAsndYxZUK5d-uv)**_

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: What’s happening in Texas should scare the hell out of you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DllTLrsaJwJ8czhs4DQPhuB6c4u-kYQzmGu47O8Z7RSjPo1OYRJMHbmTueCExZFDOe1saa27Ukz9M5enS2hh8wc-Oi5ACfu5Dzvb_0rLqX1WI3xP7CafkOr4ex6_XqjUrjfxwt2i6RW3i3wssbqBflNHVsq1GCjfY-GpOuhUQqwGJ3lQpIFxYyixDWhXkiA-tM1n7mOHexuTgE6XPQ5nhHBSReDI47foKK0IwdJmPS_yBL88ExAqm_3-4UDdhhcaoEi9mlDP7Xx8gdwqlaiUDLFUVgGOVVujAxeIWYQwW_ruHvW01pFl5FT1ofqCmGpS8nTMV5z93bluoRa14momPxrmAgQKbsal57yW7tMBMlav9m8F2CKYbV8NLkCUVORJUC4g83KI5CbKScZVJgdPnWFTJqXcUX-H3mgsF5TF9IP8/4ir/jt2HiRZNQyi-XGwLrCWSuA/h0/h001.BI7Mks4xHqxQu6YxVrr3ppYfpGJFAdwuy1e5K9b5W24)
---
Friends, **What 's happening in Texas right now should scare the hell out of anyone who cares about democracy.** Trump's allies in Texas are forcing through a brutal, corrupt redistricting plan that would hand them almost every congressional seat in the state, even in districts where they _**lose**_ elections. They're not even pretending to play fair. This isn't about representation. It's about raw power. It's about silencing millions of voters by slicing up their districts until their votes don't count. **_And because Democrats don 't have the votes to stop it, they made the only move they had left: they walked out. Left the Capitol. Denied the GOP the quorum it needs to force this through._** **Now, those lawmakers are under active threat from Governor Greg Abbott, who 's made it clear he's willing to punish them for standing up. He's already threatened to treat their absence as a forfeiture of elected office.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DllTLrsaJwJ8czhs4DQPhuB6c4u-kYQzmGu47O8Z7RSgVX59x1TMRiFLtkhvUDR6cPqZmXBE0n7otRFYRYE07UioXrtrdW6KyxhepmETdfPEE7GFSg2gHOXigAxMyvxENY-EK62ziwN43PDjqkYsdbDMe0QUgu_bl9_tiYtehRxHkUHCgiL2HVx5hE5Cc9gZt1l3qj97iqYito2yAwtJFI13UX2W9Z2QoOk9HjwfRKLby1cIBHn0fdHZd2Y6PRsBQpUlRjMVQeZW6iLeTYu7pqJDzcxG03dXfLsGRoUZuEIvdKI_8vY-LOfqYmVHZedI5FgKXUURHWSWr61xRuk5qcb30JwZNPM1tcgd4hw9Jbp0LhQBypxT8-WJzfVIfb-lNYH3zcbaWkw15XqUVaYWqYfHANYPWnkEjdDBCkpByolc/4ir/jt2HiRZNQyi-XGwLrCWSuA/h1/h001.vsZhxEGBoMX-_6fDa4KlPHWWLRfXdPaoELgmiZ2Rt8o)
---
All for trying to protect your voice -- and your vote. This is a Trump-backed scheme to rewrite the rules and take control, not just of Texas, but of Congress. If they get away with it in one state, they'll do it everywhere. [**That 's why we're asking you to step up. Not next month. Not next week. Right now. clean_body: | | Friends, What 's happening in Texas right now should scare the hell out of anyone who cares about democracy. Trump's allies in Texas are forcing through a brutal, corrupt redistricting plan that would hand them almost every congressional seat in the state, even in districts where they lose elections. They're not even pretending to play fair. This isn't about representation. It's about raw power. It's about silencing millions of voters by slicing up their districts until their votes don't count. And because Democrats don 't have the votes to stop it, they made the only move they had left: they walked out. Left the Capitol. Denied the GOP the quorum it needs to force this through. Now, those lawmakers are under active threat from Governor Greg Abbott, who 's made it clear he's willing to punish them for standing up. He's already threatened to treat their absence as a forfeiture of elected office. | All for trying to protect your voice -- and your vote. This is a Trump-backed scheme to rewrite the rules and take control, not just of Texas, but of Congress. If they get away with it in one state, they'll do it everywhere. This isn't left vs. right. It's democracy vs. corruption. And there's no one else coming to save us. In the fight, The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. body:
Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it

| **Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.****** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112732833/561436991/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250804_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDE1OWRkMy02MzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOqN9lGh2oJ8tC2yQYxUa9rx1nkWqeD24l3ss-K2AXE=&emci=594eedeb-5d71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0d159dd3-6371-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112732834/561436992/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250804_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDE1OWRkMy02MzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOqN9lGh2oJ8tC2yQYxUa9rx1nkWqeD24l3ss-K2AXE=&emci=594eedeb-5d71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0d159dd3-6371-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

**[If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112732835/561436993/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250804_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDE1OWRkMy02MzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOqN9lGh2oJ8tC2yQYxUa9rx1nkWqeD24l3ss-K2AXE=&emci=594eedeb-5d71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0d159dd3-6371-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**

clean_body: Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it | Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.** | The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities. It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans. It ensures every American — no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting. And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in fairness. That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally. New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, not turn a profit for the privileged few. Thank you for your support! | | Dear Friend of Liberty,

**You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: **

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/VmgUJLDomj_r8vDD6_y80K0NHNUEIB4oon25jRT5mvHWJvsDRsgT8obGX3DASrVoePcZPcyl1jx-jh1f0AG0eK46EeXjCGVLkh-rQxZJRC8rwFQVeC2XkLBQYuRTd4WxfADxoLeda_JP4EtGLKTeTsA6JmtuGVh4FfkSqx-Cm_g_FxkyDUGoDTj48Ap6uFxO2c06pm-nehhL7JC5C1WEOzrxf6jgP9IBIjXhh8AhwrQLqBxt-6C6MCj-jXseHDbdz6quIl5EK9j0rttpBGKH6xSurLkd_HzaYRhXPfcLYwV8fui8nN4UY7OSsk-pgfqSyHNAkyGTlGLWiduMvb3a0R_WHt8i7pE4sG3cbsPGoe2lAYFdKVj1ZYsf9jevYz55Rfa1HYKk9gTQI0-vapQNo9IDgsOCAfFioEKgurGxD9ZOf23yY1UB7A_ji4hm04-xiiIW6BgOOur5Pr5rhptaDRLEigvHaEJQR3u3K1VJYnxKBia7genL-dwQDysUdEeughNMc45YW7yWSWDYmw2k1VBm2qyXE8jdUUiY7z9CQEYUhXuF1ejZUVoCO9sIKRz1PZZ2Ojm-FF9vsF50rIwuhRk0H3e3RpVuxupV9OCYpPIGtODN557t7DdfNzs_pKeto6DI3CW0B4-K3X3ZAW39ukeRcqKHWHw1zqp0vsOSgvqnKtuSDFvFH1OTx0SWqq7mvaq48RltElwFfrpp_He-CPYoTjt6wcU/3pEuOb9z9O_j7ZClcrvgsdBQKcZ3tVNC/11)

With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.

A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.

Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include...
* Banning ICE agents from city limits

* Establishing city-owned grocery stores

* Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage

* Replacing the police with social workers

**In short, this candidate will bring _real, unapologetic socialism_ to America.**

**Why did this happen? **

For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.

For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.

This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. **So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated!**

In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever.**

By responding to **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism**, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution.

If you agree, please represent your state and take **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism** today.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/WqBAo5xkGoCJtdM2D83WKcGhAU1ke8kw_WdKBCgJTEBUK_UaFjm1_4M7ANF4e0e0gkB-Ouf9oE74qLf2Iklu1RP4RHnVO0UXFGkL3buEvFHxQclhg5A6lSOFk0l-9Aol6SFM9DSntsVcw8PJc9JsPWAUE3HwziKd4GT2Wo3ASlWRdrwIpfmgMPCekuu5yXLB3XVkYoyb3jbOCIVVtjEfBc-nn5S5eO_OQHj4g5Sml-Drglm59EQYXGXfMhecnYvyr8yDPGVWZzi23Ldpn-1WoIPhLE8s8XmrqspR0C8kopuVJgc2PXE3Gos_uR35tkCtjz8Dl-AW8rwg6uv3X3M2FsdXUSBr-gcbAx8CFqKQ-KNeBDki4hHGeTdTqruA33xF7sZMU84SyUBIIU93rI47N7FTgvxzq6pE1yiV3NX172EwnVAfHrDaGpZOMDSyNXBJEU0GPH9EnWhuz50xVlXIreF7PJ4f0gf3FoDKEo2DZwoaluHndKR6iKdGOer2ERTGd-wikPx-ykDgp3q9ElcoL9LuRnHF3uFNfk7i-fRn9gDusf_Cu8RhZmV4A8uQPyHY2bv7EqAxJwguEuOdJeq0Gn4SYN1hvi7PBfrX80Y2KhvnAvVQWezUeRL7TkvNtA_1IajbNywBdXIJL6zrEnE__Ti0E_cBRdcSydBBvjR0QP3NsSYw0PCRXSp4dJJ7EI8gQzmJpay6znIZlVNNB3YeQ201OhEvXCw/Wed42f6ZlR4ZQQw7_lCeC9DbJA0hKhZl/11)

name: Jose Javier Rodriguez
subject: The largest electric utility in the country wants to stick you with a massive rate hike.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
This is outrageous. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112733244/561438976/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_PET_PET_080425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI2N2NiMzgtNjU3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uOQOfB4vxm1tXfnKGGqathAk-m-CllUlU95HKHg0fXk=&emci=7aa7cf8c-756d-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2267cb38-6571-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter — The largest electric utility in the country, Florida Power & Light, is asking state regulators for permission to jack up customer bills by **nearly $10 billion over the next four years.** **$10 billion, Peter.** That would impact more than **12 million** Florida residents and businesses who get power from FPL. Families are already struggling with skyrocketing insurance rates, rising grocery costs, and unaffordable housing. The last thing we need is another massive hit to our monthly budgets from a utility giant that's already making record profits. **[This is exactly the kind of corporate greed I'm running to stop as your next Attorney General. But right now, we need to speak out before regulators rubber-stamp this outrageous request. Will you add your name to our petition demanding that state regulators reject FPL's massive rate hike?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112733256/561438988/354769726?refcode=em_JJR_PET_PET_080425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI2N2NiMzgtNjU3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uOQOfB4vxm1tXfnKGGqathAk-m-CllUlU95HKHg0fXk=&emci=7aa7cf8c-756d-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2267cb38-6571-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32374386)** FPL is claiming they need this money for "growth" and "reliability," but let's be honest about what this really is. It's corporate greed, plain and simple. FPL's executives are getting rich while working families choose between paying their electric bill and putting food on the table. **[We can't let them get away with this. State regulators need to hear from real Floridians — not just FPL's army of lobbyists. Add your name to our petition right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112733261/561438999/354769726?refcode=em_JJR_PET_PET_080425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI2N2NiMzgtNjU3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uOQOfB4vxm1tXfnKGGqathAk-m-CllUlU95HKHg0fXk=&emci=7aa7cf8c-756d-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2267cb38-6571-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32374386)** | **[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112733266/561439004/354769726?refcode=em_JJR_PET_PET_080425&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI2N2NiMzgtNjU3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uOQOfB4vxm1tXfnKGGqathAk-m-CllUlU95HKHg0fXk=&emci=7aa7cf8c-756d-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2267cb38-6571-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32374386) **
---
Thank you for speaking out.
Jose Javier Rodriguez

Friend,

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: We owe our veterans an immeasurable debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112735143/561445251/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjRkZTBiNi02OTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_-EOZyrsASSaOBZrDimNNOUEKV4v6bZm9Ap4rFagik=)
Friend,

Since I was sworn into Congress back in 2023, I’ve taken my duty to Illinois’ 13th District seriously – from working families, to educators, to farmers, and to veterans who need our support when they come home.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112735144/561445252/-81078947?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjRkZTBiNi02OTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_-EOZyrsASSaOBZrDimNNOUEKV4v6bZm9Ap4rFagik=&emci=b34de0b6-6971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bb4de0b6-6971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891387)
_Click**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112735145/561445253/-81078947?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjRkZTBiNi02OTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_-EOZyrsASSaOBZrDimNNOUEKV4v6bZm9Ap4rFagik=&emci=b34de0b6-6971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bb4de0b6-6971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891387)** to read my complete remarks._
I am moved by the stories I hear from veterans who struggle with the return to civilian life. Their strength and pain is unimaginable, and it’s my duty and the duty of my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to support them after they have made such deep sacrifices for us.

As a member of the House Veterans’ Affairs Committee and the Women Veterans Advisory Council, one issue in particular I've heard is how navigating the VA is retraumatizing for veterans, especially those who experienced military sexual trauma.

**I introduced a bipartisan bill to improve training for VA employees who handle those claims, and legislation that would require VA to conduct proactive outreach about mental health services – reducing the burden veterans face to seek out support on their own.**

This work is important. But right now, these invaluable resources that give many veterans their life back are under _direct attack_ by the Trump Administration.

This should not be a partisan issue. But under the Trump White House’s direction, tens of thousands of VA employees are losing their jobs and taking us backwards.

I’m not standing down in this fight. We owe our veterans our deepest gratitude, and it starts by listening to them and changing the system for the better.

Thank you,

Nikki

Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. **JD VANCE sent you a secret message that may take your breathe away.**
**-- -BEGIN MEMO---**

You know what really ticks me off?

Politicians in D.C. never say "**_thank you_**."

They beg for your vote and hard-earned money but once their election is over, they leave you in the **dust**.

**Regular folks like you are the backbone of this country, yet people in Washington seem to _forget_ that.**

I want to put the manners my Mamaw taught me to good use, so here goes:

**THANK YOU for always having President Trump's back.**

**THANK YOU for your unwavering support of MAGA.**

**And THANK YOU for proudly fighting for the greatest country on Earth.**

You are an American grassroots hero, which is why I've nominated you for the **RNC 's LIVING LEGEND** award.

But I noticed you haven't accepted it yet...

This is my small way to say **THANK YOU** , I hope you accept.

Peter, Richard Carlbom, our DFL Chair, is celebrating his birthday today! For years, Richard has worked to elect DFLers up and down the ballot, building the kind of grassroots power it takes to win elections and create real change. From leading the Minnesotans United for All Families campaign for marriage equality, to serving as Deputy Chief of Staff for Governor Walz, and becoming Chair of the DFL, one thing has always been clear: Richard is deeply committed to improving people’s lives. **We know it would mean a lot to Richard to hear from you. That’s why we’re putting together a birthday card filled with messages from the people he fights for every single day. ** [**Will you take a moment to sign Richard’s card and wish him a happy birthday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112735339/561445998/-970771290?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGVkN2EzMy02YjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GnL3-lZG0f_Y09HsGrlMoDQWaimioU61zMkF5vyWDTk=&emci=1084972b-6b71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e4ed7a33-6b71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27213119)

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: A district worth fighting for
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend, Heartland communities like ours have been overlooked and underinvested in for far too long.

But our district is my lifelong home, and I know it deserves better.

There's a reason I still live here, in the same house where I grew up. It's because our district — and our community — are worth fighting for.

I'm working every day to deliver good-paying jobs, lower costs, and transformative investments for Northwest Ohio. Thanks for being with me in that work, friend.

CHIP IN→ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250804_mk_dist_b1] Onward,— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=a4e85710-6c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=a4e85710-6c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b]

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Strategies in the air, by water, and on land

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8c73583774f14705ac2673e3847446dd&_e=OHh5HVAz8pUFN3M1oe5hUTC7FeWc_WAoO3lcJ44_6ogc1Ha3WzhuJMVEWqfFqL4Bd3neMbmRLaeCevHZrfPz2tyor7_frlJpUFn5FT6MfIh2BsK-w4MnK4ysPBF9ovS5st8AXl2itgQVxiRRQ7IMUlwqI-Ovmmg0NNLoahds2KdnwbIcr8nRWeLxK78AVjzE4DLq2O2n379Sx_ZJKy7VQjJriMyHnPl60l--UELUeWYruvYYS87YJHa0atjRzYKuuC1TXxN6UFty-vcHV8fHQdZn0Qmv8VH63J96skVQ5KVt2d3itef-G6weVV--paUkEMC6Xr42KvDBFPVY-M5hfpnP0jjl-roT9_6ZH_3vC2VHVUkGulZmHNJ_dkA_57EGnz8QVJ_ysnrtb_5gvR5K5O9Z9j-Dybupon1t5IkoAOU4oQhfmHbdkcYXXxc4G3TPGfR5uxa4p9dFjR9ab0E8FNUg-T8SMadLOxPJX_2nHpzaloy4nsrEIAiLtQ9cf0jatrPYgHrHGqYDbhlTzZrBizXom-V7XxYz7XXZyQbhJ235n48Rhl70VDKpt4zoOjWPaKbO_r6ixYGUX2uxKk6SpvmzKLyJ0-xYv-cX9QporhG61zzRTjOA2JUvk01A2UGnWtyexjsg1rRkLTnaVuqELi8d2uv6cQI-JdRAS1ND3XmV-xONv-bE_wYrAj5_R1iBBRnvMvUwdgAdpFutU_gWSe7SMNdo4ZzMGqIP6KTeDG9eJoJVBI324NCXc11DsQBG)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8c73583774f14705ac2673e3847446dd&_e=OHh5HVAz8pUFN3M1oe5hUTC7FeWc_WAoO3lcJ44_6ogc1Ha3WzhuJMVEWqfFqL4Bd3neMbmRLaeCevHZrfPz2tyor7_frlJpUFn5FT6MfIh2BsK-w4MnK4ysPBF9ovS5st8AXl2itgQVxiRRQ7IMUlwqI-Ovmmg0NNLoahds2KdnwbIcr8nRWeLxK78AVjzE4DLq2O2n379Sx_ZJKy7VQjJriMyHnPl60l--UELUeWYruvYYS87YJHa0atjRzYKuuC1TXxN6UFty-vcHV8fHQRDOyVWUjfb-RuMbto-j19qP2Q3IdYg_ufOxKMCxuCnWVEsD5PuWAZbW1U_Mz5pMlYMrm0zoVVU4kYuQNSQP0i32DXdV_bzMK2Dgj3O1PBHE7bmfWYRfdmUJcizyncRO1Kj93vTk1WpCHUIxVaSxT-UG20d_CIoRsCNc7HykFtAWdqNmGcZrFCvtTSMjYQZRQAdoXEZ9jxTw54j4gqx8k3CySMLfOyU7nQ6BhdNDXOTBe_k-1FT4xR-LmmTE2ehHrx_OHq2D4FDkznpBuCwBOD3R71fAGoTZkNoK-mN_24IuTKMjagZK8FvBsxjEytWpiikXk18UFB6kU1hoYScjVbRW6lgAmFiLPgXPPnjgq0Z--QghIHRBSUKXjLomhukBcsKeyMS1bYq74RXHWFuE0fmM-6FEKGuQ7NVqtmLCM33WBSwknIdqSslyZUFshpntNu3VTP04ep6gVvF60CNzcva6BccSorYZ1T709phFrZ2D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8c73583774f14705ac2673e3847446dd&_e=OHh5HVAz8pUFN3M1oe5hUTC7FeWc_WAoO3lcJ44_6ogc1Ha3WzhuJMVEWqfFqL4Bd3neMbmRLaeCevHZrfPz2tyor7_frlJpUFn5FT6MfIh2BsK-w4MnK4ysPBF9ovS5st8AXl2itgQVxiRRQ7IMUlwqI-Ovmmg0NNLoahds2KdnwbIcr8nRWeLxK78AVjzE4DLq2O2n379Sx_ZJKy7VQjJriMyHnPl60l--UELUeWYruvYYS87YJHa0atjRzYKuuC1TXxN6UFty-vcHV8fHQceTzvKlXhNnyUT5LdmodkNDPGpgvTAwBN6IN_KTMNIxXH-0XzbV6ovzR1yj_YXPjjEzcSOTUExBCj_ucRwO4PV49ROVZSaRVJfHJJFLUfjbGGtTyzRD8QsmyeKEqRwt64ayxwhyDZlFlLeNZK5-4XcqBkLEHPk-SOEPkEq6WRu8cwDejNHA9y9SF_3cdvN-RaaLzjRsM-xAdZN27Ph07E_SFaA-w7o4Wl96394EdLUWh6qfsfWVkpHlecjq23eu9TKRuixw7hDrE5tiEuvg0jW5oSj6JfMrMt3jgOkI8zN-52WtL5m4_VndhjpvXT1gyyEV93-M24DLY5c6NP2eunpnCYTp3ob6qh5UFzAh5oLvHtvIz-p9SzaZ0KF6-Kbhmog87YBYrIuYZmOgpzbOw6l6pRc7HxCv_X6K9h3cdK14PFs2dLQUGlpcv0pwJLxKlN1JuCQu_jTgwrnbv9QC96bJLr7EYCQ-RfUaLEFwwX50) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Support Texas Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Yesterday, Texas Democrats made the brave decision to leave the state to deny Republicans the quorum they need to ram through their radical redistricting plan.
They are doing this to stop Donald Trump and Greg Abbott’s power grab that would rig the system, steal five Democratic-held Congressional seats, and determine who has the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
Breaking quorum is the most powerful tool these lawmakers have. It means staying out of the state for as long as it takes. It means risking arrest. But they’re doing it anyway – because this is what fighting for our democracy looks like.
**Now,_Greg Abbott is threatening to remove these legislators_ from office.** And Ken Paxton is saying they should be hunted down because they are standing up for the people of Texas.
**The stakes are getting higher by the day. But people across the country are stepping up because we all have to do our part in this fight.**
Our organization, Powered by People, is on the ground right now organizing Texas to stop this power grab. We’re entirely funded by grassroots supporters like you because the only way to beat anti-democratic forces is with people-powered strength.
[**Can you chip in $3 or whatever makes sense to you to help us support these lawmakers and stop this redistricting scheme?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250804-2.RB-IEB&refcode=ema20250804-240276&t=2&akid=240276%2E444211%2EpLlyew)

With gratitude,
Beto

Peter,

We're proud to share that the _Zurawski v Texas_ documentary has received the [**American Bar Association's Silver Gavel Award**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112736303/561448710/-1284881780?sourceid=1150826&utm_campaign=26emcge-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=zurawski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FkMjk5YS02ZDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLd2Z5HyvHVuOieA_f2vG5ULFlGIM4pTvOwBDUUUL0c=&emci=25d95918-086f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23ad299a-6d71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)—a prestigious honor recognizing outstanding work that deepens the public's understanding of the law and legal system.

**Molly Duane** , Senior Staff Attorney at the Center for Reproductive Rights, will be accepting the award on behalf of the film’s creators this weekend at the ABA’s Annual Meeting. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112736305/561448712/606737072?sourceid=1150826&utm_campaign=26emcge-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=zurawski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FkMjk5YS02ZDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLd2Z5HyvHVuOieA_f2vG5ULFlGIM4pTvOwBDUUUL0c=&emci=25d95918-086f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23ad299a-6d71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) From filmmakers **Maisie Crow and Abbie Perrault** , and Executive Producers **Jennifer Lawrence, Hillary Clinton, and Chelsea Clinton** , this powerful film follows a group of courageous women who were denied abortions under Texas's extreme bans and took their fight to court.

[**Starting today, the documentary is available to stream on demand**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112736308/561448714/606737072?sourceid=1150826&utm_campaign=26emcge-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=zurawski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FkMjk5YS02ZDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLd2Z5HyvHVuOieA_f2vG5ULFlGIM4pTvOwBDUUUL0c=&emci=25d95918-086f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23ad299a-6d71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237), and all viewing links can be found on the official _Zurawski v Texas_ website: | [**WATCH NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112736312/561448717/606737072?sourceid=1150826&utm_campaign=26emcge-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=zurawski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FkMjk5YS02ZDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLd2Z5HyvHVuOieA_f2vG5ULFlGIM4pTvOwBDUUUL0c=&emci=25d95918-086f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23ad299a-6d71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "WATCH NOW")

With gratitude,

Center for Reproductive Rights

What I tell you next should enrage you.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206qf9pjl9jzl946zllp5o9pd8z2lyk20jhavmpoainmb3ee8ix13m324081an5vrbictjvfixitixj8c5s&__stmp=t0hjs7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Friend, what I tell you next should enrage you.

A recently declassified report details irrefutable evidence that **President Obama, former Director of the CIA John Brennan, and others fabricated the Russia hoax** , promoting the LIE that Vladimir Putin helped President Trump win the 2016 election.

You read that right, Friend. The Democrats manufactured a complete, alternative reality just to undermine the legitimacy of President Trump.

_**Take a moment and think about all the effects downstream of this betrayal...**_

Now, Tulsi Gabbard is referring former President Obama to the Department of Justice for criminal implications.

THIS is why it is CRITICAL that radical, conniving Democrats, like Obama, do NOT take back any ground we won in 2024.

Turning Point PAC has a plan to build the RED WALL to secure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This is why I need your help to raise $75,000 before the end of the month.

**As part of that plan, we're giving away my book and exclusive President Trump lithographs when you donate before the end of the month.**

The last election was an America First mandate, but we cannot afford to rest on our laurels.

You and I must [ACT NOW to build the RED WALL](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0hjs7&__onlt=h) by focusing our energy on MUST-WIN battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

Otherwise, these bad actors will come back into power and resume their subversion of our American way of life.

They will destroy everything that this country stands for, namely the Constitution and the Bill of Rights.

Friend, we now have proof they tried to undermine President Trump's victory before.

** _What else have the Democrats done to stop us from achieving victory that we don't even know about yet?_**

This is why we are fighting door-by-door, ballot-by-ballot, to win in critical battleground states.

[It's also why I'm asking you to pitch in and help us build the RED WALL by donating today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0hjs7&__onlt=h)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0hjs7&__onlt=h)

Charlie Kirk

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: You don't hear this every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
It's not every day the president of the United States tells you to 'go to hell...'
| | | Chuck Schumer here.

It's not every day the president of the United States tells you to "go to hell," but in this case, from this president, I wear it as a badge of honor.

**In fact, I say right back at ya, buddy.**

I'll explain what happened in just a bit. But first, **if Democrats win back the Senate, Donald Trump will have a LOT worse things to say about us for the rest of his presidency --[so will you pitch in $5 or more to make that a reality?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250804-ChuckSchumer-GoToHellSchumerSigned-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250804-ChuckSchumer-GoToHellSchumerSigned-ETG-sl1&akid=20922%2E9716520%2E6Isuww)**

You see, Trump _desperately_ wanted a deal to speed through more of his nominees. His flawed, compromised, unqualified, downright _**dangerous**_ nominees to run our health care, our schools, or even to get lifetime positions as federal judges.

He didn't get a deal. He's pretty mad about it, too. **Good.**

My counter-offer felt pretty reasonable, all things considered: If the president starts nominating competent, qualified people to fill these roles instead of extremist ideologues -- and starts obeying the law instead of flouting it -- Democrats will give their advice and consent.

**Instead, Trump now wants to change the rules and further _break the Senate_ to force his extremist nominees through.**

If Republicans go along with it, then as one famous Trump appointee memorably put it, what goes around comes around -- and I will make _certain_ this comes back around on _them_ when Democrats win back our majority. You can mark my words on that.

**Ultimately, however, there's only one way to END Trump's unchecked power and rein in his out-of-control administration -- and that's to take away his Republican Senate majority.**

**[That is the fight before us now, and that's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. Will you chip in $5 or whatever amount is right for you to help flip the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250804-ChuckSchumer-GoToHellSchumerSigned-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250804-ChuckSchumer-GoToHellSchumerSigned-ETG-sl1&akid=20922%2E9716520%2E6Isuww)**

We had a taste of victory and Trump's frustration this week -- but only a taste.

Flipping the Senate is how we'll make his frustration _permanent._

Thanks for stepping up,
-Chuck

clean_body: It's not every day the president of the United States tells you to 'go to hell...' | | | Chuck Schumer here. It's not every day the president of the United States tells you to "go to hell," but in this case, from this president, I wear it as a badge of honor. In fact, I say right back at ya, buddy. I'll explain what happened in just a bit. But first, if Democrats win back the Senate, Donald Trump will have a LOT worse things to say about us for the rest of his presidency -- You see, Trump desperately wanted a deal to speed through more of his nominees. His flawed, compromised, unqualified, downright dangerous nominees to run our health care, our schools, or even to get lifetime positions as federal judges. He didn't get a deal. He's pretty mad about it, too. Good. My counter-offer felt pretty reasonable, all things considered: If the president starts nominating competent, qualified people to fill these roles instead of extremist ideologues -- and starts obeying the law instead of flouting it -- Democrats will give their advice and consent. Instead, Trump now wants to change the rules and further break the Senate to force his extremist nominees through. If Republicans go along with it, then as one famous Trump appointee memorably put it, what goes around comes around -- and I will make certain this comes back around on them when Democrats win back our majority. You can mark my words on that. Ultimately, however, there's only one way to END Trump's unchecked power and rein in his out-of-control administration -- and that's to take away his Republican Senate majority. We had a taste of victory and Trump's frustration this week -- but only a taste. Flipping the Senate is how we'll make his frustration permanent. Thanks for stepping up, -Chuck | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Johnny O
subject: Trump is tanking the economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

Average Americans like us already know that prices on gas, groceries, rent and childcare are only going up.
But a new jobs report underscores just how bad the economy is [https://www.cnbc.com/2025/08/04/contentious-july-jobs-report-confirms-the-us-economy-is-slowing-sharply.html] under President Trump and Congressional conservatives who promised to get our fiscal house in order. Unemployment is up, inflation is up and morale is low.
Trump didn’t like the numbers – so he’s firing the guy who compiles the country’s labor statistics. That’s what dictators do.
The American people deserve leaders who will work to fix the economy, not ones who throw tantrums when numbers don’t go their way.
It’s been awhile since I asked you to chip in . I hope I can count on your support to help restore government to leaders who value facts, people and results. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

clean_body: [] Average Americans like us already know that prices on gas, groceries, rent and childcare are only going up. But a new jobs report underscores just how bad the economy is [] under President Trump and Congressional conservatives who promised to get our fiscal house in order. Unemployment is up, inflation is up and morale is low. Trump didn’t like the numbers – so he’s firing the guy who compiles the country’s labor statistics. That’s what dictators do. The American people deserve leaders who will work to fix the economy, not ones who throw tantrums when numbers don’t go their way. It’s been awhile since I asked you to chip in . I hope I can count on your support to help restore government to leaders who value facts, people and results. [] CONTRIBUTE [] [] [] Paid for by Johnny O for Congress Johnny O for Congress 711 W. 40th Street, Ste 330 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: A historic vote in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
For the first time in American history, a strong majority of Democratic Senators voted to block military aid for Israel.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1746%2E791427%2EwvSDsY)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-gaza/?source=em250804-1-90&akid=1746%2E791427%2EwvSDsY)
Something big happened in the Senate last week.
For the first time in American history, **a strong majority of Democratic Senators voted to block military aid to Israel.**
Friend, this didn’t happen because politicians suddenly changed their minds. This happened because they are feeling the pressure of the tireless advocacy of this movement and everyone who has shown support for ending the genocide in Gaza.
In fact, a jaw-dropping new Gallup poll shows that **just 8% of Democratic voters and only 25% of independents approve of Israel’s actions in Gaza.**
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-gaza/?source=em250804-1-90&akid=1746%2E791427%2EwvSDsY)
Only a small minority — 32% of all Americans — still back Israel’s military actions. And there are more signs all around that the tide is turning.
Israel has been forced to begin surging humanitarian aid into the Gaza Strip.
Whistleblowers are speaking out in the national media about the brutality of the IDF.
European countries have announced their intentions to recognize a Palestinian state against the wishes of Netanyahu.
Now, it is our job to continue to keep this momentum pushing forward until we end all US involvement in this genocide, reach a permanent ceasefire, end the Israeli occupation, and ensure self-determination for the Palestinian people.
Ilhan Omar is asking for your help today in doing just that.
**[Please: Sign Ilhan’s petition calling on Congress to end America’s financial support for the genocide and reach a permanent ceasefire in Gaza. Adding your name is a simple but powerful act of solidarity at a time when every ounce we can give is necessary.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-gaza/?source=em250804-1-90&akid=1746%2E791427%2EwvSDsY)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-gaza/?source=em250804-1-90&akid=1746%2E791427%2EwvSDsY)**
The American people aren’t heartless, and they will not stand for images of starvation, death, and destruction that go against our shared humanity. We hope you will add your name today and continue to stand alongside the Palestinian people.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1746%2E791427%2EwvSDsY)**. name: Jared Hudson
subject: Focused on the Mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
I'm not a typical candidate

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hudsonforalabama/focused-on-the-mission?e=1ade0133c0)
---
[|
---](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=8c70aa3c36&e=1ade0133c0)
| | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend,
I’m not a typical candidate, but I think we all know where typical candidates get us.
When I was nineteen years old, I went on a mission trip to Africa. While I was there, I saw a man beating an elderly woman. I started to run over to make him stop, but I was told I wasn’t allowed to intervene since it was not what we were there to do. Never again did I want to be in a position where I could not protect someone who needed it. That’s why I became a SEAL, a law enforcement officer, and founded a nonprofit to rescue women and children from trafficking and exploitation.
Now, I’m running for the United States Senate to continue serving the only way I know how – by being directly in the fight. Like a machine gun in combat, the position of Senator is a force multiplier. It can be used for selfish reasons or wielded to make a positive difference in Americans’ lives.
[Yellowhammer News - Jared Hudson on running for U.S. Senate: ‘I want to be a force multiplier for good’](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=d53cc51d6a&e=1ade0133c0)
Like we did in the SEAL teams, I am relentlessly focused on the mission in front of me. That means we are storming the campaign trail. Last week, I had the opportunity to participate in a town hall hosted by Moms for Liberty, Movement Church, and the New Federalist Alliance to discuss my vision for Alabama. My message was simple: I’m going to take Alabamians issues to D.C. and not to bring the D.C. issues home to Alabama.
[Alabama Politics - Take Back Alabama Town Hall Draws Packed Crowd and Powerful Message in Madison](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=fd03080b14&e=1ade0133c0)
I also had the opportunity recently to speak with Brenda Ladun on ABC 33/40 about the stakes in this election. It is time to send a new generation of conservative warriors to fight for Alabama, put America First, and stand alongside President Trump in order to Make America Great Again.
---
[|
---](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=2fcef88383&e=1ade0133c0)
| | | | | If you’re like me and believe We The People are in charge – not Swampy politicians and Deep State bureaucrats – then [please join the team.](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=eb27e82065&e=1ade0133c0)
God bless,
**Jared Hudson**
Former Navy SEALU.S. Senate Candidate
---
| [SEND A WARRIOR TO WASHINGTON](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=3de50adbdb&e=1ade0133c0)
---
|
---

name: John Fetterman
subject: rural hospitals closing. medicaid slashed. we need to talk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey Derek, John here.
Ever since Trump + Republicans signed their reckless budget into law, folks in PA have had real reason to worry.
Just look at the numbers:
* **$1 trillion** slashed from Medicaid
* **300,000** Pennsylvanians – kids, seniors, families – at risk of losing health insurance
* **5 out of the 17** rural hospitals in PA could close
* **12 more** rural hospitals could follow within a few years

**3.4 million** Pennsylvanians – *_nearly a quarter of our state*_ – live in rural areas. These hospitals are lifelines. But they’re barely hanging on and already having to make tough budget decisions and cut services just to stay open.
Some are shutting down labor and delivery altogether. The way things are heading, a pregnant woman in Northeast PA could have to drive **over an hour** just to reach a maternity ward.
And the VA? Same story.
* Tens of thousands of jobs at risk
* Stretching staff thin
* Making veterans wait longer for care

It’s all part of Trump and Republicans' strategy to chip away at the systems meant to support working families, veterans, seniors, and rural communities.
It's not reform – it’s sabotage.
Republicans are gutting Medicaid, killing the VA, and letting rural hospitals die. All to make room for red tape, out-of-pocket costs, and private insurance profits.
**Pennsylvania families lose care. Big companies cash in.**
Are you as concerned as I am? I want to hear what you think.
👉 **[Will you please take 60 seconds to fill out my health care survey?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51506?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk197-su-fl&t=1&akid=10235%2E434096%2EWEagz4)**
Thanks for taking the time,
John ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk197-su-fl-footer&t=2&refcode2=10235_434096_WEagz4&akid=10235%2E434096%2EWEagz4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

subject: Judicial Watch: Federal Courts in California and Illinois Advance Lawsuits to Clean Up Dirty Voter Rolls
body:
Judicial Watch announced that federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled this week that Judicial Watch lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them to clean up their voter rolls.

### [Watchdog Sues State Department to Force Release of Docs on Van Hollen El Salvador Junket to Aid MS-13er ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75752&L=35770&F=H&&hash=aef78d2e1376b831f68e15702f94ca68459fc5b2265de729c6b5fe16e2ff6468) The Washington Stand Judicial Watch is asking a federal court to order the U.S. Department of State to turn over all official documents concerning Democratic Senator Chris Van Hollen’s (Md.) recent trip to El Salvador to aid deported illegal immigrant and accused MS-13 gang member and human trafficker Kilmar Abrego Garcia.

In a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit filed in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia, the nonprofit government watchdog told the court that on April 22, 2025, it filed a request with the State Department for “any and all records concerning, regarding, or relating to the April 2025 visit to El Salvador by Senator Chris Van Hollen. This request includes, but is not limited to, all related agendas, briefing materials, and records of communications.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75752&L=35770&F=H&&hash=aef78d2e1376b831f68e15702f94ca68459fc5b2265de729c6b5fe16e2ff6468)

For more than a decade, Mr. Mamdani has been attacking the Jewish state.

His college journalism, obtained by Judicial Watch, reveals a record of revolutionary fervor, anti-Israel and anti-White.

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled this week that Judicial Watch lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them to clean up their voter rolls. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 4, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled this week that Judicial Watch lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them to clean up their voter rolls. Judicial Watch lawsuits alleged that both California and Illinois violated the National Voter Registration Act, which requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it and the U.S. Department of Justice reached a settlement in which the government agreed to pay $10,000 for attorneys’ fees and other costs associated with Judicial Watch’s successful lawsuit that forced release of the audio tapes of President Biden’s interview with Special Counsel Robert Hur (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:24 CV-700-TJK)). ---|--- | | | | | “These documents uncovered by Judicial Watch show that the Biden administration covered up intelligence concerns about Tim Walz’s connections to China. This is a major scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. State Department for all records regarding Sen. Chris Van Hollen’s (D-MD) April visit to El Salvador, where he met with deported illegal alien and accused MS-13 gang member Kilmar Abrego Garcia (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State (No. 1:25-cv-02273)). ---|--- | | | Red Rocks News Concerns about the city of Sedona’s installation of 12 automatic license plate readers throughout the city has caught the attention of Judicial Watch, a nationwide conservative nonpartisan nonprofit that files Freedom of Information Act and public records lawsuits to investigate claims of misconduct by governments and officials. Judicial Watch Southwest Projects Coordinator Mark Spencer said his organization was independently contacted by numerous Sedona residents after the NEWS published the article “Sedona to residents: We’re tracking you” and the editorial “City of Sedona’s spy cameras are a threat to our privacy and rights” on June 20. The Washington Stand Judicial Watch is asking a federal court to order the U.S. Department of State to turn over all official documents concerning Democratic Senator Chris Van Hollen’s (Md.) recent trip to El Salvador to aid deported illegal immigrant and accused MS-13 gang member and human trafficker Kilmar Abrego Garcia. In a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit filed in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia, the nonprofit government watchdog told the court that on April 22, 2025, it filed a request with the State Department for “any and all records concerning, regarding, or relating to the April 2025 visit to El Salvador by Senator Chris Van Hollen. This request includes, but is not limited to, all related agendas, briefing materials, and records of communications.” Washington Times The heat keeps growing on New York City socialist mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani for his refusal to condemn the slogan “Globalize the Intifada,” but his position is nothing new. For more than a decade, Mr. Mamdani has been attacking the Jewish state. His college journalism, obtained by Judicial Watch, reveals a record of revolutionary fervor, anti-Israel and anti-White. In 2014, as a senior at Bowdoin College, Mr. Mamdani wrote in his college newspaper, The Bowdoin Orient, that “the struggle for rights is global,” and he condemned the “Israeli colonial occupation of Palestine.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Team Hirono
subject: For future generations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#

Peter, From gutting the Department of Education to creating the first-ever national school voucher program, Donald Trump and Republicans have launched a blatant assault on public education. But Mazie? **She’s doing everything in her power to secure the future of all our children. ** She recently held a forum with educators and education experts to call out the Trump administration’s attacks on our students, teachers, and public education. She’s fighting back against the GOP’s national school voucher scam, which diverts billions of dollars away from public schools and hands it to wealthy families and private schools. And when the Trump administration withheld almost $7 billion for public schools and adult literacy programs, she joined her Democratic colleagues in demanding the immediate release of those funds. Republican attacks on public education are attacks on the future of our country, and Mazie is determined to continue fighting for our students to make sure they can receive a high-quality education that will set them up for success. **[Mazie needs you in her corner to help her keep up this fight, Peter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112738290/561455811/-1251412049?refcode=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDRjYzhkZC03NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUgSDAhq-Va98vF0hlJwT59X7w42kX2m3sQMQV4aDgc=&emci=4aef0bfb-5f71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535) Hello, Peter, **Running for office is a humbling experience.** In the last week, the number of people who have reached out, donated, or shared news of our campaign to support us has exceeded all my hopes. _Thank you for being in this fight with me._ I’ve been reaching out a lot this week to request donations. But I have a simpler request today, one that I hope won’t take too much of your time. **[I am asking for your endorsement, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112738292/561455812/-1251412049?refcode=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDRjYzhkZC03NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUgSDAhq-Va98vF0hlJwT59X7w42kX2m3sQMQV4aDgc=&emci=4aef0bfb-5f71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)** By endorsing our campaign, you will help show that we have the support, momentum, and energy to win. In return, I can give you no greater pledge than this: **I will always do everything in my power to improve the lives of North Carolinians.** As we embark on the most competitive Senate race of 2026, I’m reminded that nothing I’ve ever done has been done alone. We can only win this race _together._ **[I hope to have you with me through the long, hard fight ahead. If you’re in, endorse our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112738295/561455814/-1251412049?refcode=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDRjYzhkZC03NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUgSDAhq-Va98vF0hlJwT59X7w42kX2m3sQMQV4aDgc=&emci=4aef0bfb-5f71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)** | [ENDORSE ROY COOPER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112738297/561455817/-1251412049?refcode=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDRjYzhkZC03NDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUgSDAhq-Va98vF0hlJwT59X7w42kX2m3sQMQV4aDgc=&emci=4aef0bfb-5f71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f44cc8dd-7471-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)

name: Stand with Texas via Our Revolution
subject: Stand with Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

This is urgent: Texas Republicans are pushing forward with an outrageous
redistricting plan designed to push progressives out of power and steal
the game.

They're coming after progressive champions like Greg Casar and Jasmine
Crockett – trying to erase their districts and locking us out for DECADES.
But a group of Texas Democrats just fled the state to stop the vote,
risking everything to stop Governor Abbott’s brazen power grab.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33526?source=email-20250804&t=1011&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Headline: Abbott threatens to oust Democrats who fled Texas over
redistricting

They're risking their jobs, their savings, and even arrest. But this isn't
just a Texas fight. This is about the future of our democracy – and we ALL
need to add our voices to stand with them.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33526?source=email-20250804&t=1012&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Will you add your name to stand with Texas Democrats resisting this
dangerous power grab – and show other Democrats across the country that
the grassroots stands with leaders willing to take a brave stand to save
our democracy?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33526?source=email-20250804&t=1013&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]ADD YOUR NAME

Donald Trump is banking on a dangerous scheme to hold on to power:
aggressive Republican redistricting. Terrified of losing the midterms,
he’s demanding the GOP redraw Congressional maps in Texas, Ohio, and
Missouri to cheat their way to victory.

Last week, Republicans in Texas pushed their redistricting scheme through
a sham process to give themselves five additional seats in the U.S. House
next year. The final vote is scheduled for TODAY, but it cannot proceed if
Democrats deny a quorum – which is why key Democrats fled the state.

Our Revolution endorsed progressive Rep. James Talarico is leading the
charge – reminding us that the only way to beat authoritarians is to
refuse to play by their rigged rules.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33526?source=email-20250804&t=1014&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Headline: Texas legislator James Talarico on Democratic walkout: It's
time to fight back

THIS is why Our Revolution exists – to elect true progressives like James,
and to hold *all* Democrats accountable by demanding they stand up when
our democracy is on the line.

This is about more than Texas. If Republicans can silence progressive
voices here, they’ll come for us everywhere. We need to show we’re ready
to fight – not just with words, but with action, organizing, and showing
up for each other.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33526?source=email-20250804&t=1015&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]We need a flood of solidarity right now. Every signature sends a
message to Democrats in Texas – and across the country – that we’ve got
their backs and expect action. Will you add your name to stand with Texas
Democrats risking it all to defend democracy NOW?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33526?source=email-20250804&t=1016&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250804.1Vwgc-&t=1007&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250804.hVPo-H&t=1008&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250804.KsHqec&t=1009&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250804.64Syvz&t=1010&akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9124%2E5885482%2ExuXkms

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: David Hogg
subject: Stand with Texas Dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is what fighting back looks like.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250804-1&t=1&akid=2477%2E587540%2EsD5y_X)
Peter, David Hogg here.
Sometimes, fighting for democracy means walking out.
That’s exactly what Texas Democrats did — breaking quorum and leaving the state to stop Republicans’ latest power grab: a redistricting scheme that would lock in GOP control, silence communities of color, and erase Democratic voters’ voices.
Let’s be clear: **This isn’t politics as usual. It’s Republicans rigging the system to hold onto power — no matter who they have to disenfranchise to do it.**
And these Texas Democrats? They risked _everything_ to stop it.
They left their homes and families. They knew they could be arrested. They knew Republican Governor Greg Abbott would threaten to remove them from office.
But they did it anyway.
Because when democracy is under attack, we don’t play along. We fight back.
Right now, the Texas House Democratic Campaign Committee and Leaders We Deserve are working to defend these lawmakers and elect even more like them.
**[Will you split $5 between Leaders We Deserve and Texas HDCC to stand with these lawmakers and elect more bold leaders who refuse to back down?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250804_1_txhdcc?refcode=em20250804-2477&amount=5&refcode2=2477_587540_sD5y_X&akid=2477%2E587540%2EsD5y_X)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250804_1_txhdcc?amount=5&refcode=em20250804-2477&refcode2=2477_587540_sD5y_X&akid=2477%2E587540%2EsD5y_X)**
Texas may be where they’re test-piloting this — but we know it won’t end there.
If we don’t show up now, we’re just inviting the next wave of attacks. But if we stand together, we send a message to every extremist trying to rig our elections:
**_You’ll have to go through all of us._**
Let’s show them exactly what that looks like.
Thank you,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250804-1&t=2&refcode2=2477_587540_sD5y_X&akid=2477%2E587540%2EsD5y_X)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2477%2E587540%2EsD5y_X)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2477%2E587540%2EsD5y_X)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

subject: Trump’s tariffs = $14,000 added costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112738706/561457517/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250804_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM5NTNmOC03NTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8PR-JvilrlX0eCILKhEf4-hjHEtRCLK0ry-txUnMBs=&emci=b13f89e7-4771-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ac953f8-7571-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=252045)

Hi friend**,** Thinking about building a new home in the next few years? You’ll need to budget an extra $14,000 — all because of Donald Trump’s tariffs on Canadian lumber and steel. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112738708/561457521/-1710431385?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250804_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM5NTNmOC03NTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8PR-JvilrlX0eCILKhEf4-hjHEtRCLK0ry-txUnMBs=) That’s not just a number. That’s the real, measurable impact of Trump’s reckless trade policies. He promised to lower costs. But the truth is, families are paying more — for housing, for materials, for essentials — while the wealthy get a pass. I believe we need to make life more affordable for working families, not more profitable for the wealthy few. That means investing in housing, bringing down the cost of building materials, and putting _people_ — not special interests — first. **[We can’t let Trump and his allies keep rewriting the rules to benefit the wealthy while working people pay more. "That was weak!" DeSantis mocked the disrupter.

### **Deep State** _**Fires A Warning Shot**_**At Your Vote** _**And**_**Your Future**
It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to _**put Trump behind bars**_.
To _**bankrupt him**_ through legal fees.
And to _**even assassinate him**_ ... twice!
But President Trump has prevailed each and every time. And despite having overcome these hits, one after another, the battle may still be far from over.
President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to _**"demolish the deep state, "**_ and claims this to be his _**" final battle"**_**** against these shadowy figures.
But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun.
Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always.
So, _**how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People**_ while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America?
_**[Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again?](https://substack.com/redirect/5e6e1e9b-d887-4a79-a475-1a6dcbfac6a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
