name: Team DASS
subject: Maine Sec. of State: “Go jump in the Gulf of Maine”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739003/561458495/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2M5NTNmOC03NTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjxT06PXHVfHSOgdfJ4kepxU5rC7NlC8-RBwEybpt8w=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Shenna Bellows tells Trump’s DOJ to “Go jump in the Gulf of Maine.”** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739004/561458496/1071238056?refcode=em-8.4.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2M5NTNmOC03NTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjxT06PXHVfHSOgdfJ4kepxU5rC7NlC8-RBwEybpt8w=)
* * *
We’re not going to sugarcoat it, friend: **Trump’s DOJ is launching a full-blown assault on state election systems** \-- demanding access to voter rolls, targeting Democratic-led states, and trying to intimidate the very people who run our elections. **But Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows isn’t backing down.** When Trump’s DOJ demanded access to Maine’s secure voter data, her response was crystal clear: **“Go jump in the Gulf of Maine.”** This is exactly the kind of courage we need right now. And it’s exactly why DASS exists. We work every day to elect and defend Democratic Secretaries of State who will stand up to Trump’s authoritarian playbook -- just like Shenna has time and again. But this kind of work takes serious resources. Legal defenses. Public communications. On-the-ground organizing. And more. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Easy to see how they are suppressing voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team: Texas's new gerrymandered maps are so bad, it's easy to see why lawmakers from the Texas House of Representatives left the state to deny suppressive lawmakers the quorum ( the number of legislators required present in person to pass legislation ) they need in order to push these terrible new districts through.
You can see by the spiral around each city below -- Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio -- how vengeful partisans in Texas are trying to spread out voters and dilute groups who generally vote against them. Nothing about the way these are drawn includes fair representation.
Proposed Houston Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/HoustonRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed Dallas Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DallasRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed San Antonio Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SanAntonioRedistrict2025.jpg]
For background: The opponents of voting rights who run Texas have opened a special "emergency session" of the state legislature to tackle another round of partisan redistricting, after having recruited the top national conservative map-drawer and a leading Washington, D.C.-based anti-voting group to ram through a new gerrymander that aims to expand the U.S. House majority.
These new maps aim to dilute the voting power of the state’s Black and brown voters, looking to follow Trump's orders to create five new MAGA-aligned congressional seats in Texas.
Voter suppression anywhere changes the balance of Congress and hurts everyone, everywhere. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080425_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080425_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080425_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080425_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080425_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080425_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080425_2&amount=35]
This is all part of a sweeping national strategy that uses map-drawing to boost one party’s power at the expense of non-white voters and is now playing out at the local level.
How do we know? The D.C.-based attorney who oversaw much of these redistricting fights for a conservative law firm just took over as the top anti-voting lawyer at the MAGA version of the Justice Department.
The involvement from the start of national-level anti-voting operatives highlights the striking sophistication and coordination of this multi-pronged campaign to suppress our democracy.
This isn't some secret cabal trying to steal our power. This is happening in plain sight , with little media attention, directed from the Oval Office and being run from a party headquarters. Protecting our right to vote means stopping them.
Opponents of voting rights will stop at nothing in their pursuit of power and control. Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to protect voting rights and fair representation >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080425_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080425_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080425_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=EJmCWgU1MEn4KsFLHp2ypBg6TF6HQYoTWwaHVJXN5cdhkukNHbGLK9kCkZ1la6kp4VdNn7zfI%2BpSGY6LZ9T6fryZ4xqp6QHKm8TFqLEqESkL7WRSEZe%2BqGR8z3yuutV0T%2BgCBtMnPD4goa%2FGqP0oMWkR%2FpPrRW46FewUMNasNYBCDUYKb2DkrADDra13XF7NWD1XD1kfYSUf2niD5Y6ZanWVBG87NiLFawcNTgYxqVi8XG%2FCrCpXJRPqe%2Fo%2F48biwzAlA6j%2BdasTqCDXRNwftzupPAt%2BUlAGFha9Vx19zREkwK70Kygak9c4Xs4S%2BcBVOq7zrlS52M%2FJzpzXU781hWLDQuL15zk4anXzNqVk0XygzNuirWPSh3kMC7smzvXZ30h6BlRruCRbGQKBHYS%2BKDc5PxG11%2F9dxhv9QLrXQOk%3D .

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: Highest funded federal law enforcement agency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739173/561459125/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250804_PT_IceVisibility_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3ODg4ZC03NjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zP34m2Myn2_NZP6N_fekzL7DrwhagEkmLgj5JssBHic=&emci=e96dfa86-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=98e7888d-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739175/561459127/-185539769?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250804_PT_IceVisibility_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3ODg4ZC03NjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zP34m2Myn2_NZP6N_fekzL7DrwhagEkmLgj5JssBHic=&emci=e96dfa86-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=98e7888d-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098) Folks – **ICE is now the highest-funded federal law enforcement agency — surpassing even the FBI and DEA.**

The so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” hands ICE a staggering **$75 billion** , including $45 billion for more detention beds and $30 billion to hire 10,000 new agents and expand operations.

_This is simply unacceptable._ ICE is using masked agents wearing plainclothes to intimidate our communities and carry out backroom raids, and now they’re being rewarded with even more funding to terrorize people with.

[**Can you sign our petition today demanding transparency and due process from ICE? We need 1,000 signatures by the end of the week to send a clear message: no agency should be above the law or operate in the shadows.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739177/561459129/-185539769?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250804_PT_IceVisibility_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3ODg4ZC03NjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zP34m2Myn2_NZP6N_fekzL7DrwhagEkmLgj5JssBHic=&emci=e96dfa86-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=98e7888d-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098) | | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739179/561459131/-185539769?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250804_PT_IceVisibility_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGU3ODg4ZC03NjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zP34m2Myn2_NZP6N_fekzL7DrwhagEkmLgj5JssBHic=&emci=e96dfa86-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=98e7888d-7671-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30096098)
---
By promoting and enabling masked agents, unmarked actors, and raids with no warrants, this administration is eroding the trust and accountability our federal law agencies depend on.

**This is why I introduced the ICE Visibility Act of 2025:** because no federal agency should be allowed to operate in the shadows, and no family should live in fear of unmarked, masked agents.

The so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” hands ICE a staggering $75 billion , including $45 billion for more detention beds and $30 billion to hire 10,000 new agents and expand operations. This is simply unacceptable. ICE is using masked agents wearing plainclothes to intimidate our communities and carry out backroom raids, and now they’re being rewarded with even more funding to terrorize people with. | | By promoting and enabling masked agents, unmarked actors, and raids with no warrants, this administration is eroding the trust and accountability our federal law agencies depend on. name: Katie Porter
subject: “She’s a school teacher. What does she know about running anything?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39976%2E3422442%2EQGNND6)
Here’s what my billionaire opponent just said about me, Peter:
**“She’s a school teacher. What does she know about running anything?”**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250804_1_ak?refcode=em20250804-39976&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39976_3422442_QGNND6&akid=39976%2E3422442%2EQGNND6)
I’m not insulted that the guy attacked me–after cutting a $10 million check to his own campaign no less!
**But it really bothers me to hear yet another politician belittle the work teachers all across California do.**
From running a classroom and after-school activities, to running parent-teacher conferences and PTA meetings, **teachers know a hell of a lot more about what’s going on with California families than this guy does.**
Our next governor should be someone who understands the challenges families face and is ready to take them on.
**I’ve taken on powerful interests throughout my career in public service.** I took on the Big Banks in the wake of the mortgage foreclosure crisis and held the Trump Administration accountable as a Member of Congress.
Our next Governor has to take on our affordability crisis and make it easier for California teachers, _and everyone_ , to live here. From home prices to groceries, everything here is too expensive and I feel it too.
**My opponent may think “a school teacher” isn’t up for the job–but we know that’s _exactly_ the kind of leader California needs.**
**But to win against someone who can pour tens of millions into his campaign, I’m going to need your help.**
**[Can you donate $5 to our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250804_1_ak?refcode=em20250804-39976&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39976_3422442_QGNND6&akid=39976%2E3422442%2EQGNND6)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250804-39976&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39976_3422442_QGNND6&akid=39976%2E3422442%2EQGNND6)**

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Back to School
body:
This month matters for students and for our democracy.

| |
---
Friend, August recess is here, but that doesn’t mean the work stops. While Republicans are using this time to cash in checks and avoid accountability, I’m using every day of recess to meet directly with constituents across NJ-09. This is back-to-school season, one of the most important moments in our kids’ lives. But Republicans voted to gut public education, putting our children’s futures at risk. All so they can give another tax break to billionaires. I believe every student deserves a safe, well-funded, and inspiring school. I believe every parent deserves a representative who fights for them, not for partisan games. That’s what I’m doing this August, and I need your help to keep going strong. **[Will you donate today to help us protect public education and hold this critical swing seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739237/561459446/-200729754?refcode=250804_np_b2s_l1&ms=250804_np_b2s&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZmMjNiZjYtNzY3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eysV3MO-Um_b4I0DVyk63PSUofVlTrVpm7-QsBdnvJo=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739244/561459453/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250804_np_b2s&ms=250804_np_b2s&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZmMjNiZjYtNzY3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eysV3MO-Um_b4I0DVyk63PSUofVlTrVpm7-QsBdnvJo=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112739245/561459454/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250804_np_b2s&ms=250804_np_b2s&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZmMjNiZjYtNzY3MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eysV3MO-Um_b4I0DVyk63PSUofVlTrVpm7-QsBdnvJo=)

This is our chance to right the wrongs of the past few years.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the previous administration used the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dared to stand up for our constitutional liberties. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue.

Your responses will help Hillsdale improve its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including teaching citizens about the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the **National Survey on the Department of Justice** by using the link below: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/AbrqyU7YbTidOJqC3UlaXxmtWMR_s-7ITEEh2cujDVHB6RsIZ89RF0gxY6Tqj4LKRGo2aruq3ehdZJg2KRuRZwDyQu5-G6kt9zSB9pQOuSIh0SjvQ3-VIpKVDbRC1iiSPp8uXgrnBqZCBZgpw9xESvHvpqWnKajx0aLukLUvIS105xjjXf5dNU0N0BTwRflSkBW9p6lWyE18Apf54SgSWlfZ1y-cGFvAfmCjrUbGUUQRszu6uY_nP4h4px4YqxX4UMfJiR8a7flK_K2ILDsozWeC6j1qm7HqTn9zqA4oicNStDN0KCGASvTM1OxQJgEfa3J3zk2phz29XL0zjamV4rvJ5u-nGFv7BBRDOlaaz9-1MlcylPZkgvRxQLwTZ7BPF8wH_DTCg8dYhNf0sB-SmqSnnGWblh_e_uBJbz32J8h_RyfXb1EqXtqQ8TfuVH7DSb8aXkTQz2u9Ruv2eVJh41X6P9W-rW1c7uuH3Nm-_jP7cRHN29uEgo4MkkJ5qLd2ieFftfdooz7ORddUQMGvhk5z_cMICmf5vOxXd7SedO_4FSIEXItpIYjmtm_RN8VQsrFakk6gOqkDeQmtjnV1zL9CK29FbekXlouAOkx-l65AlH1gzD8FK1KJx69kLj1AKYTIZgm8_n8uoncb7vs3uG9594U-Asjh2yUYPjlVFgLjdksfhYDFL7ZvzS56akArczy2Ny907_LazJiHVJh1/CHcpppBF7Iph9M8_5Dpo37EniTaDr3oZ/11)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** , and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet, the ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people. Over the last few years, we have experienced a constant attack on our rights--on the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, on due process, on gun ownership, and more. **Today, we are returning to what Abraham Lincoln in his Gettysburg Address called a "government of the people, by the people, for the people."** **That means we have an opportunity to make sure that the weaponization of government _never_ happens again in this country.** Hillsdale College is a leader in this fight--we are **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the **truth** about America's great heritage of liberty. We are working to expand our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
****

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.7 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
****

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
****

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've experienced over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So, please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept **even one penny** of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/A3tRSST3Dp4ZcxSOQ6M6kopg_HLPCiNRj1oNKl5Xynh6vKdKTCZ9Cp7VY5h2BPU5Lc5ynQLEv3aiR4TIxd9pj_JRf9qYXQLahpbsvVGDglMXZHQ253r1jyXFOql9OImwFrRKZ6QJGJv4ecRMeyww7Ho9GQF1fFdRFSSZho2W-f82KspRsz_9Y0ZeB29rKyCmeFRLthE8oFlEHbHvCv1E2gQLqUx8tOSaA43LEk8_rultfUVKIf6fzK_lusbf10qhw8ErFEhZNh0h6nBMR5YGa84cNpwOnOiVwPBuRTgUNDfsGXdskgqQUN_gg04T0agnbOPWKrblXK3e666LE7fyauxr-lxKTEYblggpW5X6a-s0ofEUt5Rw2hPQWm_Rl1iY5XYauktEviEhHMzF08KOjfrZKKwNoq7_hZb4MMvw3wnd7ZxovthSSl4n7QfJKCp336O_I1d1Ejt9FaNhpYC5h3veAnY4GIa5WTV05V55gqucI78WMdBTzuie8lt5Hh1f14vJgzOypTRoMOanJzsMwRVTJDS89rTuO2noAR6m0MAZR-eOsn770PwPkjPEl0iYwy3Db3itRkUXdFALyzdcU_0CJ54LSto-Qdq3SufcyabLfVX-9AMHIaK8nYkpJQZJp5-w-oZ4nj1bJh3f_QZQchv41FtTbNUDr7j0mfbeTVzR-BIYJzrzGa_EECpklGIul5q4-kQo2ot-2VmZ2fSb/0y3GRy3wMa_rHv5XZOFO_tUWUl60ADUB/11)** Thank you for your time and attention. name: Team AOC
subject: Republican power grab in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Support Texas House Democrats who just broke quorum.
#
This is urgent:
**Yesterday, Texas House Democrats broke quorum to stop Republicans from passing their new proposed congressional map.**
Their new, gerrymandered map was designed to give five blue seats in Texas — which are currently held by Democrats — to Republicans. It’s a blatant power grab from Donald Trump and Gov. Greg Abbott and an attempt to disenfranchise voters.

These Texas Democrats took an extraordinary step to ensure that Texas Republicans don’t have the power to rig our elections.
So we’re working with Powered by People — Beto O’Rourke’s Texas-rooted organization — to raise funds today to support these lawmakers directly as Gov. Abbott is now threatening to remove them from office.1
**Because this is exactly the kind of political courage** it’s going to take to stand up for our democracy.
[ Will you split a contribution of $2 — $1 for each of our teams — between Powered by People and our campaign today? Let’s show the TX House Democrats that we’ve got their backs as they face extreme pressure.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250804-tx.NurAiq&refcode=em20250804-9474-P_FND_SPL_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_)
**[Contribute $2](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250804-tx.NurAiq&refcode=em20250804-9474-P_FND_SPL_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_)**
Thank you for taking action today,
Team AOC
1 - [**Washington Post:** Texas governor threatens to seek removal of Democrats who fled state, escalating tensions](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/33518?t=21&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250804-tx?refcode=em20250804-9474-P_FND_SPL_OPP&t=22&refcode2=9474_2526796_dvj2m_&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250804-9474-P_FND_SPL_OPP&t=23&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=9474%2E2526796%2Edvj2m_)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Texas Democrats put everything on the line to block the GOP’s power grab.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112739733/561461195/1328794144?refcode=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQ0MjM4LTc5NzEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XH1TZAliPJIYDiH5xfnW8aJFG3VX70Ki8bKRs59KhRQ=&emci=39abc9f8-6171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

**Breaking via _The New York Times:_ Texas Democrats Leave State to Block G.O.P. From Redrawing Political Map** **[This is what standing up to Donald Trump looks like. Will you sign our thank you card before the end of today to show these brave Democrats we have their backs?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112739734/561461196/1109633930?refcode=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQ0MjM4LTc5NzEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XH1TZAliPJIYDiH5xfnW8aJFG3VX70Ki8bKRs59KhRQ=&emci=39abc9f8-6171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD MY NAME →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112739735/561461197/1109633930?refcode=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQ0MjM4LTc5NzEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XH1TZAliPJIYDiH5xfnW8aJFG3VX70Ki8bKRs59KhRQ=&emci=39abc9f8-6171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

* * *
Over 50 Texas Democratic lawmakers made the courageous decision to leave their state rather than let Republicans ram through an aggressively gerrymandered map.
Donald Trump personally demanded that Texas Republicans gerrymander **five** Democratic congressional districts to flip them red ahead of the 2026 midterms. And Texas Republicans were all too happy to comply, rushing the rigged maps through two committees over the weekend in a blatant power grab.
But our fellow Democrats are standing strong and refusing to let the GOP deny communities of color fair representation and block progress on critical issues from the climate crisis to voting rights.
**Their absence means Republicans can't reach the two-thirds majority needed to conduct business. It's a high-stakes gamble that could cost them their seats: Governor Greg Abbott is vowing to remove these lawmakers from office if they don’t return today.**
This is what courage looks like when democracy is on the line. While Republicans bow down to Trump and try to gerrymander their way to permanent power, Democrats chose to fight back.
**[We want to show Texas Democrats that the entire country is watching, and we have their backs. Will you sign our thank you card to the Texas Democratic lawmakers who are risking everything to stop Trump's power grab?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112739737/561461199/1109633930?refcode=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQ0MjM4LTc5NzEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XH1TZAliPJIYDiH5xfnW8aJFG3VX70Ki8bKRs59KhRQ=&emci=39abc9f8-6171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)**
[**SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112739739/561461201/1109633930?refcode=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjOGQ0MjM4LTc5NzEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XH1TZAliPJIYDiH5xfnW8aJFG3VX70Ki8bKRs59KhRQ=&emci=39abc9f8-6171-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=cc8d4238-7971-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Texas Democrats put everything on the line to block the GOP’s power grab. | Breaking via The New York Times: Texas Democrats Leave State to Block G.O.P. From Redrawing Political Map | Over 50 Texas Democratic lawmakers made the courageous decision to leave their state rather than let Republicans ram through an aggressively gerrymandered map. Donald Trump personally demanded that Texas Republicans gerrymander five Democratic congressional districts to flip them red ahead of the 2026 midterms. And Texas Republicans were all too happy to comply, rushing the rigged maps through two committees over the weekend in a blatant power grab. But our fellow Democrats are standing strong and refusing to let the GOP deny communities of color fair representation and block progress on critical issues from the climate crisis to voting rights. Their absence means Republicans can't reach the two-thirds majority needed to conduct business. It's a high-stakes gamble that could cost them their seats: Governor Greg Abbott is vowing to remove these lawmakers from office if they don’t return today. This is what courage looks like when democracy is on the line. While Republicans bow down to Trump and try to gerrymander their way to permanent power, Democrats chose to fight back. In solidarity, JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Team Pramila
subject: This weekend was jam-packed with events!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This past weekend was jam-packed with rallies, canvasses, and GOTV events for local progressive candidates.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250804-5306-footer&t=1&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)
Peter, this past weekend was jam-packed with rallies, canvasses, and GOTV events for local progressive candidates across Seattle and King County.
With **Washington’s primary election coming up _tomorrow_** , there’s no better way to resist Trump’s authoritarian agenda than by electing candidates at every level who will fight to uplift working people and defend our democracy.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250804-1?refcode=em20250804-5306&refcode2=5306_420207_xsXlNt&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)
First up was our rally for **State Representative Edwin Obras** in Burien, who’s running for re-election in the **33rd Legislative District**.
During his time in the legislature Edwin has passed legislation to protect employees who often work in isolated areas from sexual harassment or assault, strengthen rideshare drivers’ rights, and enhance background checks for employees working with children, seniors, and those in transitional living. He’s been a real champion for working people, and we need to make sure he’s re-elected!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250804-1?refcode=em20250804-5306&refcode2=5306_420207_xsXlNt&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)
Next up was our canvassing event for **Girmay Zahilay** , current Chair of the King County Council who’s now running for **King County Executive!**
During his time on the Council, Girmay has championed affordability and public safety, including introducing and passing legislation to raise the minimum wage. As Executive he wants to increase investments in affordable housing, behavioral health, environmental protection, and public transit. We’re proud to support his campaign!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250804-1?refcode=em20250804-5306&refcode2=5306_420207_xsXlNt&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)
And last but certainly not least was our canvass for **Dionne Foster** , an organizer with deep roots in our local community who’s running for **Seattle City Council District 9.**
She’s built her career on making sure that everyone has a fair shot in life, no matter where they come from. On the City Council she’ll fight for affordable housing, climate resilience, and dignity and fair wages for every worker. That’s exactly the kind of leadership we need in Seattle!
**Pramila’s proud to support progressive leadership at every level.[If you want to support the work she’s doing to build our movement, please consider pitching in $3 or anything you can today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250804-1?refcode=em20250804-5306&amount=3&refcode2=5306_420207_xsXlNt&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250804-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250804-5306&refcode2=5306_420207_xsXlNt&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)**
And if you’re in Washington, make sure to drop your ballot in a drop box or mailbox by 8 p.m. tomorrow! [**Click here to find a drop box location near you.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/48287?t=2&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250804-5306-footer&t=3&refcode2=5306_420207_xsXlNt&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=4&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=5306%2E420207%2ExsXlNt)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: Sign Keith’s birthday card! 🎉

body:
It’s Keith’s birthday, Peter!

Keith has done so much for our state and our country. We want to show our appreciation tonight by presenting him with a birthday card signed by supporters like you.

Will you add your name to Keith’s birthday card right now to thank him and help make this birthday a special one?

Sign the Card: https://secure.ngpvan.com/ncO3LWJNM0GURy69gklY6Q2

We have Keith’s undying commitment as the People’s Lawyer to thank for striking down so many of Trump’s most severe attacks on our rights. From protecting funding for critical government services to stopping violations of our right to privacy and beyond, Keith has never let up in holding the Trump administration accountable and defending the Constitution, and for that we owe him a debt of gratitude.

Help us collect signatures to show Keith how much we appreciate his leadership.

Sign the Card: https://secure.ngpvan.com/ncO3LWJNM0GURy69gklY6Q2

Thank you,

Team Keith

Attorney General Keith Ellison is the People’s Lawyer, fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

For six decades, Medicare and Medicaid have provided critical healthcare and support, ensuring that those with disabilities have access to necessary treatments, therapies, and medications. Without these programs, countless individuals would face unimaginable hardships, forced to choose between basic necessities and their health. Yet, today, these vital lifelines are under threat from harmful budget cuts and political neglect. **The impact would be catastrophic—medical treatments delayed or denied, essential therapies unavailable, and the dignity of those who rely on these services stripped away.** _At Able Dems, our mission is to support Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will fight for the programs that we rely on to live full lives._ **[We cannot afford to stand by and watch as these critical programs are dismantled. Add your name to demand that Congress INVEST in Medicare and Medicaid, NOT CUT THEM!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-0VOg_xsfYfsz7KoZc5RWF7NRWbp177IK_B19ke-6EjFVS_E_QhnwJ9R4T6QaXndjJjsnLN3ASDo0MvofTKnidDPURaDL6g4N3UKmxf5BWrOcdHWTQHnxBgxILq0wlk_--0L3BpM3bv6Du8GFa8ibDtpZ4WXVGfUrMC8ae5JANCPRngqrcxt7qdUvCEd-zlib0rsl66p_MTnHln9vUjHKgivXNFbiwu9PUeH9F6l63lDPtOfs5GkVu2pvIDMx6TmGS6SpoThh8nh3w8PUY2BuwIZVrs1ZhftmNevW1L_g3Fyr44xzS0EeZODpgh0Ic8kveCQBkO-DHa7iZ3k9FrsenH6ELmCUuIYii-1Yz3SzjNp4nT79uIlaH6b2Ru8f9fgtPhjJthy0nGKfA2IA2co0gK5PFJ-A5Ue-kBmCAtwHrjg1iqzJebMgKFr5lm1k8m9YFkFoOeKaElE5gy4hVzRWASE2kJfixt2r-efI8fZqpFokL3TG2btYCl639_enBmi4bkGk5FUhR3f2j02fh3GygRWtXzOCOLm6UKNteFZ90wgs1jHX5GA4xFHRHBuKpHoJ9BLgRqf0iyEjIhwmCPISa/4ir/-O5uaeTURVunjMo55GEAzg/h2/h001._ECQ0dAppkA2las3Kix4zYPHUbQW5B6a4Tnn5Rwj0kY)** **** | [Sign On](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-0VOg_xsfYfsz7KoZc5RWF7NRWbp177IK_B19ke-6EjFVS_E_QhnwJ9R4T6QaXndjJjsnLN3ASDo0MvofTKnidDPURaDL6g4N3UKmxf5BWrOcdHWTQHnxBgxILq0wlk_--0L3BpM3bv6Du8GFa8ibDtpZ4WXVGfUrMC8ae5JANCPRngqrcxt7qdUvCEd-zlib0rsl66p_MTnHln9vUjHKgivXNFbiwu9PUeH9F6l63lDPtOfs5GkVu2pvIDMx6TmGS6SpoThh8nh3w8PUY2BuwIZVrs1ZhftmNevW1L_g3F8_8TD724KKUqF6I6bXn-qW3Tq6iAhe7aTyPWSaCWOsu0HnGZ-Q40mblQ5HPWFnBr3a3nl8ZD8b-KUjAI-lvu2LMnBg3Ye1kE_IkI74vI-bW_FE_g8XbQsOFHNsZ4QBpSpHPwWp2CKjY4m1cbO4A8qX_UFs5CGCY65bSnBN0EO9tT3qo48TlaPi2NwCqEuMCQb4UO99_vgP5DI6XgsOZDD-BtyvQqqAz-_4npxuWYMxf3eZpOscutc0LcigIBNEMgX0kFHRwcmTiVh4pDV0PYY3v5MG2qXDFuEUhf9kUdG4T/4ir/-O5uaeTURVunjMo55GEAzg/h3/h001.dE28lu1gGic_I8HuVmQJ2tXutpbQE3VHbzFjlEKCIZo)

****
These programs are not just government initiatives; they are lifelines for millions of Americans, including over 12 million individuals with disabilities who depend on them for essential healthcare services.
Statistics reveal the alarming truth: nearly 40% of all Medicaid beneficiaries are individuals with disabilities. Cuts to these programs would decimate access to vital care, pushing millions into a state of vulnerability and suffering.
**Now is the time to act! This July 30th, the 60th anniversary of Medicare and Medicaid, we find ourselves in a moment of dire urgency. We must urge Congress to invest in and protect them for the generations to come.**
**[Join Able Dems and sign the petition calling for immediate action to safeguard and enhance Medicare and Medicaid.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-0VOg_xsfYfsz7KoZc5RWF7NRWbp177IK_B19ke-6EjFVS_E_QhnwJ9R4T6QaXndjJjsnLN3ASDo0MvofTKnidDPURaDL6g4N3UKmxf5BWrOcdHWTQHnxBgxILq0wlk_--0L3BpM3bv6Du8GFa8ibDtpZ4WXVGfUrMC8ae5JANCPRngqrcxt7qdUvCEd-zlib0rsl66p_MTnHln9vUjHKgivXNFbiwu9PUeH9F6l63lDPtOfs5GkVu2pvIDMx6TmGS6SpoThh8nh3w8PUY2BuwIZVrs1ZhftmNevW1L_g3Fws0Jb2hHfpB99BeBqht83u0HTUJ2Z2HMn772q30vKf3f5kQywVe0Z5FRixaQW1VnRHhSqqhF83ZhNWnYqNW-dJ0XpC2ZYKzFF2OO8NZ1yGGfErMCdBequDK8l56MrJH7NmI8Wujon-QLlapl2Oy1yOhc7AoSwIrT8WcWq0D8Uwk49hrgRayofHbOnaYGZ4TOowzJWenOL4hMaQ00Z5R0kHx9I6C8N475hmnAOxYtCCu1HgjIZjGRpvdsy37DykOYq34UjKKOiIlssnX1_zNzmWjLbJ-I4eaEtGgj7x0kJq3/4ir/-O5uaeTURVunjMo55GEAzg/h4/h001.rID4yT--0_pvpH6jzLBuly8l3UIjSUogPJG3RAQFbds)**

Peter, We won’t lie: We’re terrified by what’s going on in Georgia and across the country under the Republican regime. In just the first six months of this administration, we’ve witnessed unprecedented attacks on our democracy. That’s why Rev. Raphael Warnock is championing the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA) to protect voters’ rights and safeguard our democracy. But we need to show Rev. Raphael Warnock our **_overwhelming support_** as he fights to advance this critical bill. [Will you help us reach 5,000 signatures by midnight to show Rev. name: Heather Williams (via DLCC.org)
subject: My thoughts on Texas →
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
The DLCC is calling on Democrats to pursue mid-cycle redistricting opportunities to fight back against extreme GOP gerrymandering. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Last week, Texas state Republicans proposed new gerrymandered congressional maps that could add five GOP seats and hang onto Republicans’ majority in the U.S. House through 2028. **MAGA Republicans have made it clear that they will use their majorities in our statehouses to keep themselves in power.** In order to achieve redistricting parity and create an advantage for Democrats to protect democracy moving forward, Democrats must win back key state legislatures and increase our party’s majorities in states that require a two-thirds majority to pass new maps. That’s why I’m calling on Democrats to use _all_ state legislative power available to pursue mid-cycle redistricting opportunities – and we must focus our resources on winning battleground chambers and expanding our majorities to put our party back on offense. **We will _NOT_ sit back and watch as Republicans cheat the system. _Every_ option must be on the table. ** [Will you join the DLCC’s fight by making an urgent $7 donation to help win battleground chambers and give state Democrats their strongest chance in the redistricting fight ahead? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdgMwEgg_hyTxiyPlAvwmN-S9Benmr6nXlGNotKgKGmxjpBU9NaqTV4fe6iIdzFjhhznfwxuSVNSjjjkDugu6CxR5Y_QRyNd3N5nME3L2TTVJRZWE11uDmjlh_ufcxKd9pC2uqaPyo7keHKzOd6CUZeBbT7XRq3WXXSySJjv73EYZEDbfRLi2sxotYy1CyAh39inzeOUnLqoSD5EPmG5raOMOW2FfLkREpmCUrUzAJrZoIsQ_VDRdtrsd7WvyzwbM51vHAdfDKINb22d1O_J8tU_XzpavcXhdwufNc8pdtdL0WdOWc0xmq2IIioqgZYgwUK_EMOwfUr4cQLuRpNm2TPPpWlhW3Oalm_jTxQJDXtXH7FZUUtoT_BqL1YWeBPpwPL80doHtQXrdk5osKZ3892wa-MBYcuWdnZLhzehM2ago/4ir/GTOvL0zRRy2MJz9vZTExVQ/h0/h001.vEN47Ciy4NBXLqL4A2U7NCpwrjtmTeghFDKG1Bdisyo) The make-up of our state legislatures will shape the future of our country – and we must make sure that Democrats are well-positioned to defend our democracy against the ever-rising threat of MAGA extremism.
* State legislatures play a critical role in the redistricting process, **shaping over 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 state legislative seats.**
* The fight to win and protect Democratic majorities in America’s statehouses and stop Republicans’ national gerrymandering agenda is happening now: **the DLCC has already defended 5 chamber majorities this year.**
* **Republicans currently hold 57 chamber majorities while Democrats hold 39.** If Democrats prioritize defending and expanding our majorities this year and next year, we can tilt the playing field against the GOP.

We know what we must do to protect our democracy. It’s time to meet this moment with the urgency it demands. Are you up to the task? **[Donate to elect state Dems →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdgMwEgg_hyTxiyPlAvwmN-S9Benmr6nXlGNotKgKGmxjpBU9NaqTV4fe6iIdzFjhhznfwxuSVNSjjjkDugu6CxR5Y_QRyNd3N5nME3L2TTVJRZWE11uDmjlh_ufcxKd9pC2uqaPyo7keHKzOd6CUZeCymqxWrNgR2D8SrwPaMVCsKyYFRu3pzYqCENcKPLFk6Imcdd9tVW-zaKHU8t9q_K6y6fqMC7a6pwUM2SvegfYq06JaFceIh9x-qEbqcnXKJIV0xOXed7W-_4DlALVyO8d9d01mWDOTaPSopq9uoTr5P4OIfzOqHF2o9zZI-IcT_281ne6yMS8hX88LERANVpF-CDyUUhvkNUfmkzyQLYvuJCLPMZ_RiJZqRWXroGG3edvrVUIxlALydV01Qwi8Aw1YYW5grvSLokACgvLWscn1/4ir/GTOvL0zRRy2MJz9vZTExVQ/h1/h001.xsfjKbo4pCAfXcBEbIglbDtRgC0UWQ4a2e8cAWbiUqw)** Together, Heather [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdgMwEgg_hyTxiyPlAvwmN-S9Benmr6nXlGNotKgKGmxjpBU9NaqTV4fe6iIdzFjhhznfwxuSVNSjjjkDugu6CxR5Y_QRyNd3N5nME3L2TTVJRZWE11uDmjlh_ufcxKd9pJztrtLko1Q1z6vLi5GIAJMXBxxsPwwfRhjO2htDHgrCqLlAhxinyZ8lqMfmk87LHqrQeQsXrXQEUDFUgpd6bKrYZ-glCZ7UyWrSiAQUzzGJVZduIsVEXex0cOdkIG52Kk5nmI7yVYwPFX8cJJ1wvTtG5EvPRcYiqePI1jBuDUPvP5e8sHTcBzubZHNNAS0qcBz_ZcBe-2oCe0pfh-_jzK5WjBFDODMnVmQohoqWdKJ3E6Sw8zeHFF7b7oXH8gy_2bY0gtVgReGTYNpmVmezEt0/4ir/GTOvL0zRRy2MJz9vZTExVQ/h2/h001.yJEBqqAm2iOy7Dov8jYyYsh8V8NxojKIkvHHYqo1KtI) Heather Williams

clean_body: The DLCC is calling on Democrats to pursue mid-cycle redistricting opportunities to fight back against extreme GOP gerrymandering. | | | | | ---|--- Last week, Texas state Republicans proposed new gerrymandered congressional maps that could add five GOP seats and hang onto Republicans’ majority in the U.S. House through 2028. MAGA Republicans have made it clear that they will use their majorities in our statehouses to keep themselves in power. In order to achieve redistricting parity and create an advantage for Democrats to protect democracy moving forward, Democrats must win back key state legislatures and increase our party’s majorities in states that require a two-thirds majority to pass new maps. That’s why I’m calling on Democrats to use all state legislative power available to pursue mid-cycle redistricting opportunities – and we must focus our resources on winning battleground chambers and expanding our majorities to put our party back on offense. We will NOT sit back and watch as Republicans cheat the system. Every option must be on the table. The make-up of our state legislatures will shape the future of our country – and we must make sure that Democrats are well-positioned to defend our democracy against the ever-rising threat of MAGA extremism. State legislatures play a critical role in the redistricting process, shaping over 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 state legislative seats. The fight to win and protect Democratic majorities in America’s statehouses and stop Republicans’ national gerrymandering agenda is happening now: the DLCC has already defended 5 chamber majorities this year. Republicans currently hold 57 chamber majorities while Democrats hold 39. If Democrats prioritize defending and expanding our majorities this year and next year, we can tilt the playing field against the GOP. We know what we must do to protect our democracy. It’s time to meet this moment with the urgency it demands. Are you up to the task? body:
The Israeli genocide in Gaza continues to grow more horrifying with every passing day--yet the global grassroots movement to end it has victories worth celebrating and building upon

# [Return of the Jedi](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=170124126&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI0MTI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzNDM3NjYsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkzNTc2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.R5t45oAgN1Ir1uREK54H0ognXO2VSicBbruqS0n5xkI)
### The Israeli genocide in Gaza continues to grow more horrifying with every passing day--yet the global grassroots movement to end it has victories worth celebrating and building upon
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

I'm writing today to celebrate an important victory for the grassroots movement challenging the genocide in Gaza. Amid other glimmers of hope emerging as the Israeli starvation campaign continues to horrify the world, it offers an indication of growing support for peace and human rights in a critical sector poised to force human rights on Washington, despite the corruption of the two corporate political parties and their consensus favoring genocide.
### **New voices joining the struggle**
In the last few days, voices clamoring for an end to the genocide include not only [United Nations officials](https://substack.com/redirect/93d3742a-56d0-4ba3-9b59-565d1b5f57c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shaming world leaders for their willful ignorance of previous warnings, but also [hundreds of former Israeli security officials](https://substack.com/redirect/77cc24d9-1ba0-435d-b164-fe82c438e890?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Their voices join those of millions around the world who have spoken out in [innumerable ways](https://substack.com/redirect/763f014b-59b7-45e9-b5d6-afef17060e5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to defend human rights and the right to exist. Just this weekend, hundreds of thousands of grassroots activists raised their voices in Sydney, Australia, demonstrating [global resistance](https://substack.com/redirect/d1c829dc-61a3-43ff-8029-ba66baad3a28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the escalating state violence, murder en masse, and mayhem to which Israel has remained committed for years under the leadership of Benjamin Netanyahu.
Voices standing in solidarity with Gaza have increasingly extended beyond the grassroots, including government officials in nearly 150 different countries comprising [three-quarters of the United Nations](https://substack.com/redirect/4fcbc278-f27c-47bc-af93-590c70468f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Ireland called for a Palestinian state [over 40 years ago](https://substack.com/redirect/ae4e8de6-5415-4432-87ee-d49a2410719b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and recently [joined 25 other countries](https://substack.com/redirect/c84c750a-df70-456f-affd-44cd898362de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (including Britain, France, Canada, Australia, and Japan) in exhorting an end to the genocide and promising that they "are prepared to take further action to support an immediate ceasefire and a political pathway to security and peace for Israelis, Palestinians and the entire region."
_Help inform --and perhaps inspire--your friends by sharing this post!_
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=170124126&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI0MTI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzNDM3NjYsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkzNTc2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.R5t45oAgN1Ir1uREK54H0ognXO2VSicBbruqS0n5xkI)
Between international grassroots mobilization, and the expanding array of officials and former officials voicing their concerns, it appears the Israeli assault on Gaza and international human rights principles might have finally earned Israel [the opprobrium it deserves](https://substack.com/@tritaparsi/note/c-142037107?r=97w99&utm_medium=ios&utm_source=notes-share-action).
That earned enmity culminated over the weekend in the [arrest of Israeli soldiers in Belgium](https://substack.com/redirect/4dada586-6625-4564-a3cb-9f6b6af54654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on war crimes charges. If there is any justice in the world, it will be followed by more arrests of figures [including senior officials](https://substack.com/redirect/b3220e37-a3d3-45fe-8ff6-c9c432e122ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) most responsible for the international human rights abuses of Israeli forces.
### **A hero returns**
I've written about Chris Smalls at least twice, including once last week after [he was detained and assaulted](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d43511-7e61-42dc-b64d-2dc641d2d584?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Israeli authorities when trying to deliver humanitarian aid to Gaza alongside 21 other international activists aboard the ship _Handala_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86a882bf-c212-4c39-94a3-7f168a55c960?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last weekend, [Chris returned home](https://substack.com/redirect/f6f003dd-71fe-412e-a3fa-71267de1d14e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He was greeted by supporters at JFK airport in New York City, where [he promised](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f1d85d-c1da-4682-aaae-ed465b4b4fa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "We're gonna send another flotilla. Another one after that. And we're never gonna quit and give up."
It's worth noting that U.S. State Department officials [ignored pleas](https://substack.com/redirect/78bce64b-b5ed-4571-88de-17f980c7d604?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from his family and supporters to intervene, effectively abandoning Chris to his fate. His release and return home were not victories for the United States or its government, but it was a tremendous victory for We, the People of a country run amok.
Chris had previously exhorted the labor movement to show solidarity with Gaza and Palestine, reminding labor leaders and the rank & file alike that "[an injury to one is an injury to all](https://substack.com/redirect/0877f906-cb13-46d5-a38c-f2867eb845f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Coming from someone with his [prolific history](https://substack.com/redirect/abafeb72-787f-4fdb-a801-0ce7a283f0ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of challenging notoriously abusive titans of industry and emerging victorious, his call for solidarity--and subsequent return after enduring state violence--could invite further concerns from any number of figures in organized labor. Because labor is so remarkably influential when mobilized, the engagement of that sector could dramatically change the balance of interests considered by (ultimately self-interested) world leaders, including our own.
Joseph Campbell wrote at some length about the [capacity of heroes to inspire](https://substack.com/redirect/d81dc8ba-c78e-4525-b2d5-369d071c611c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as well as [common elements of their paths](https://substack.com/redirect/f144b20e-47dc-4754-9b27-5a3e46573e9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the realization of their power. Most heroes remain rooted in the realm of myth, but others--like Chris, or whoever is holding down the next vigil for Gaza in your community--walk among us today.
### **What 's at stake?**
History offers [many](https://substack.com/redirect/4ed6cff6-0737-45b0-b1a1-eebbd56cb399?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [examples](https://substack.com/redirect/f1440b7c-e4a9-4230-9b6c-d8e09bf662e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of labor mobilizations [challenging](https://substack.com/redirect/397631b6-c0d2-40a3-adfa-d06416962c8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the decisions of elected officials and business leaders. I've long dreamed of a general strike, and [advocated](https://substack.com/redirect/e30db0a2-f508-4ad4-a3b8-c48e3ce2383c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for one in many forums. Even short of that seemingly mythical possibility, mobilization by organized labor within any number of sectors, particularly including shipping and transportation, could grind the economy to a halt.
_Learned anything from this post? Don 't stop now! Subscriptions are free, while paid subscriptions support and help expand my work._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JCuLo3KsWOM_hVf0QcJ5Up90AVeD0E6Ht-ffQUNu6bE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170124126)
While our nation's leaders remain [committed to assaulting human rights](https://substack.com/redirect/0f097254-c335-4cc8-82a6-02803f58835e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the one thing they do seem to still care about is (at least [perceptions](https://substack.com/redirect/eb539cbe-72ce-4509-9b18-b39535e429f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of) economic performance.
More than once this spring, President Trump [announced policies only to reverse course](https://substack.com/redirect/6422eecd-6231-4ba1-a697-5e043a049b05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after financial markets confirmed the concerns of global capital. The pattern grew so routine that critics described it via acronym: TACO (Trump Always Chickens Out).
On Friday, he prompted [rare ](https://substack.com/redirect/a273792f-1b24-46bd-8d8f-201ff4f0f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[bipartisan](https://substack.com/redirect/a273792f-1b24-46bd-8d8f-201ff4f0f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ outrage](https://substack.com/redirect/a273792f-1b24-46bd-8d8f-201ff4f0f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by firing Erika McEntarfer, the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Elected officials even within his own party--who have repeatedly [contorted themselves to avoid criticizing him](https://substack.com/redirect/adc2511b-1f37-4646-a2ae-2e8e8d6e67c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--raised concerns. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) summed up the underlying issue: "You can't really make the numbers different or better by firing the people doing the counting."
Nothing, even politically damaging economic statistics, would force the president's hand more strongly than [strikes impeding critical industries](https://substack.com/redirect/e50178e8-0cce-44f3-b5fe-6682901db1d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **Has anyone learned anything?**
The casualties of the Israeli genocide in Gaza stretch beyond hundreds of thousands of lives, the hopes of parents, and the futures of children selectively murdered or [maimed](https://substack.com/redirect/37184e29-7774-47dc-b4b3-8c7d04e30a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by American weapons in the hands of unaccountable war criminals.
The genocide in Gaza definitively disproved any pretense of human progress. Many students of history falsely imagine a narrative of inevitable progress over time, but the regression of international human rights currently spearheaded by Israel and the United States reveals that any illusion of progress is either historically circumstantial, imaginary, or both.
The genocide in Gaza also revealed the true nature of the Internet, which was [promised](https://substack.com/redirect/89e65eb4-f72d-4ebb-a806-baa864f738b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to us as a way to enable global connections and enable accountability that would otherwise have been missing. [In fact](https://substack.com/redirect/84e43b2a-7d32-49e0-a8c8-7803a4a6d95b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), major technology platforms have spent years relentlessly [censoring](https://substack.com/redirect/9da2263a-3f66-482a-9530-6931e279d085?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) users to silence and obscure speech aimed to defend human rights and expose official state crimes for which [Israeli officials are wanted around the world](https://substack.com/redirect/b3220e37-a3d3-45fe-8ff6-c9c432e122ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In addition, the Israeli genocide in Gaza exposed the fraud of Zionism and its [co-optation of the international Jewish community](https://substack.com/redirect/8d755616-9764-4fe1-a836-aea7cfda6a93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). We are witnessing human rights abuses at a scale, and with an impunity, unseen since the Holocaust. By some measures, the Israeli genocide in Gaza has proven even more successful than the German attempt in Europe that appears to have inspired it.
On the one hand, far more Jews died in the death chambers of Nazi Germany than Palestinians have under Israeli & American bombs. But the community of Jews was able to persist and find a future, whereas the Palestinian [civilization in Gaza has been effectively destroyed](https://substack.com/redirect/fd0ea1cc-847c-49b8-9de9-6371538e664e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=170124126&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI0MTI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzNDM3NjYsImV4cCI6MTc1NjkzNTc2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.R5t45oAgN1Ir1uREK54H0ognXO2VSicBbruqS0n5xkI)
Finally, the genocide in Gaza seems to have finally forced the rest of the world to [recognize](https://substack.com/redirect/13482a3d-8267-4360-93dc-d64bb5dcfe87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the United States no longer supports the human rights we once pioneered. One may plausibly wonder why, after the brutality evident from [Vietnam](https://substack.com/redirect/35f426c7-bdd7-4632-b7e7-e3058d209f75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the 1970s to [Iraq](https://substack.com/redirect/e8b525dd-0468-4625-9e7f-84700780238d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the 2000s, it took the devastation of Gaza in the 2020s to expose that reality to so many international observers.
However [late to the proverbial party](https://substack.com/redirect/60f5e5ad-ec1c-42f7-9433-fd581c127558?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the arrival of the international community--if not mobilization by organized labor within the U.S.--might yet force the hand of Washington & Tel Aviv.
_Paid subscribers can access an additional section responding to the compelling philosophy of an influential German philosopher killed by the Nazis. His writing explains a force in the world even greater than evil that I hope to continue confronting in my writing..._

# [Return of the Jedi](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=170124126&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI0MTI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ3NTM0MTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NzM0NTQxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fa7DcmAZP0qGOB0mYEl6av4mfhiZBkfcjIqoGUBemT0)
### The Israeli genocide in Gaza continues to grow more horrifying with every passing day--yet the global grassroots movement to end it has victories worth celebrating and building upon
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Aug 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=170124126&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI0MTI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDc1MzQxMCwiZXhwIjoxNzU3MzQ1NDEwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kZ7ZRkt47u_zMyilgsQcp7bxzX0wK_ZMrMLOyCiO-gE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
