I'm writing today to celebrate an important victory for the grassroots movement challenging the genocide in Gaza. Amid other glimmers of hope emerging as the Israeli starvation campaign continues to horrify the world, it offers an indication of growing support for peace and human rights in a critical sector poised to force human rights on Washington, despite the corruption of the two corporate political parties and their consensus favoring genocide.
### **New voices joining the struggle**
In the last few days, voices clamoring for an end to the genocide include not only [United Nations officials](https://substack.com/redirect/93d3742a-56d0-4ba3-9b59-565d1b5f57c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shaming world leaders for their willful ignorance of previous warnings, but also [hundreds of former Israeli security officials](https://substack.com/redirect/77cc24d9-1ba0-435d-b164-fe82c438e890?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Their voices join those of millions around the world who have spoken out in [innumerable ways](https://substack.com/redirect/763f014b-59b7-45e9-b5d6-afef17060e5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to defend human rights and the right to exist. Just this weekend, hundreds of thousands of grassroots activists raised their voices in Sydney, Australia, demonstrating [global resistance](https://substack.com/redirect/d1c829dc-61a3-43ff-8029-ba66baad3a28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the escalating state violence, murder en masse, and mayhem to which Israel has remained committed for years under the leadership of Benjamin Netanyahu.
Voices standing in solidarity with Gaza have increasingly extended beyond the grassroots, including government officials in nearly 150 different countries comprising [three-quarters of the United Nations](https://substack.com/redirect/4fcbc278-f27c-47bc-af93-590c70468f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Ireland called for a Palestinian state [over 40 years ago](https://substack.com/redirect/ae4e8de6-5415-4432-87ee-d49a2410719b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and recently [joined 25 other countries](https://substack.com/redirect/c84c750a-df70-456f-affd-44cd898362de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (including Britain, France, Canada, Australia, and Japan) in exhorting an end to the genocide and promising that they "are prepared to take further action to support an immediate ceasefire and a political pathway to security and peace for Israelis, Palestinians and the entire region."
_Help inform --and perhaps inspire--your friends by sharing this post!_
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=170124126&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI0MTI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ3NTM0MTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NzM0NTQxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fa7DcmAZP0qGOB0mYEl6av4mfhiZBkfcjIqoGUBemT0)
Between international grassroots mobilization, and the expanding array of officials and former officials voicing their concerns, it appears the Israeli assault on Gaza and international human rights principles might have finally earned Israel [the opprobrium it deserves](https://substack.com/@tritaparsi/note/c-142037107?r=97w99&utm_medium=ios&utm_source=notes-share-action).
That earned enmity culminated over the weekend in the [arrest of Israeli soldiers in Belgium](https://substack.com/redirect/4dada586-6625-4564-a3cb-9f6b6af54654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on war crimes charges. If there is any justice in the world, it will be followed by more arrests of figures [including senior officials](https://substack.com/redirect/b3220e37-a3d3-45fe-8ff6-c9c432e122ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) most responsible for the international human rights abuses of Israeli forces.
### **A hero returns**
I've written about Chris Smalls at least twice, including once last week after [he was detained and assaulted](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d43511-7e61-42dc-b64d-2dc641d2d584?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Israeli authorities when trying to deliver humanitarian aid to Gaza alongside 21 other international activists aboard the ship _Handala_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86a882bf-c212-4c39-94a3-7f168a55c960?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last weekend, [Chris returned home](https://substack.com/redirect/f6f003dd-71fe-412e-a3fa-71267de1d14e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He was greeted by supporters at JFK airport in New York City, where [he promised](https://substack.com/redirect/e8f1d85d-c1da-4682-aaae-ed465b4b4fa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "We're gonna send another flotilla. Another one after that. And we're never gonna quit and give up."
It's worth noting that U.S. State Department officials [ignored pleas](https://substack.com/redirect/78bce64b-b5ed-4571-88de-17f980c7d604?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from his family and supporters to intervene, effectively abandoning Chris to his fate. His release and return home were not victories for the United States or its government, but it was a tremendous victory for We, the People of a country run amok.
Chris had previously exhorted the labor movement to show solidarity with Gaza and Palestine, reminding labor leaders and the rank & file alike that "[an injury to one is an injury to all](https://substack.com/redirect/0877f906-cb13-46d5-a38c-f2867eb845f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Coming from someone with his [prolific history](https://substack.com/redirect/abafeb72-787f-4fdb-a801-0ce7a283f0ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of challenging notoriously abusive titans of industry and emerging victorious, his call for solidarity--and subsequent return after enduring state violence--could invite further concerns from any number of figures in organized labor. Because labor is so remarkably influential when mobilized, the engagement of that sector could dramatically change the balance of interests considered by (ultimately self-interested) world leaders, including our own.
Joseph Campbell wrote at some length about the [capacity of heroes to inspire](https://substack.com/redirect/d81dc8ba-c78e-4525-b2d5-369d071c611c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as well as [common elements of their paths](https://substack.com/redirect/f144b20e-47dc-4754-9b27-5a3e46573e9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the realization of their power. Most heroes remain rooted in the realm of myth, but others--like Chris, or whoever is holding down the next vigil for Gaza in your community--walk among us today.
### **What 's at stake?**
History offers [many](https://substack.com/redirect/4ed6cff6-0737-45b0-b1a1-eebbd56cb399?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [examples](https://substack.com/redirect/f1440b7c-e4a9-4230-9b6c-d8e09bf662e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of labor mobilizations [challenging](https://substack.com/redirect/397631b6-c0d2-40a3-adfa-d06416962c8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the decisions of elected officials and business leaders. I've long dreamed of a general strike, and [advocated](https://substack.com/redirect/e30db0a2-f508-4ad4-a3b8-c48e3ce2383c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for one in many forums. Even short of that seemingly mythical possibility, mobilization by organized labor within any number of sectors, particularly including shipping and transportation, could grind the economy to a halt.
_Learned anything from this post? Don 't stop now! Subscriptions are free, while paid subscriptions support and help expand my work._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..obWG8iK5eG95EepfvMj3KzCvIykZJwkaUYlVuc_LzrI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170124126)
While our nation's leaders remain [committed to assaulting human rights](https://substack.com/redirect/0f097254-c335-4cc8-82a6-02803f58835e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the one thing they do seem to still care about is (at least [perceptions](https://substack.com/redirect/eb539cbe-72ce-4509-9b18-b39535e429f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of) economic performance.
More than once this spring, President Trump [announced policies only to reverse course](https://substack.com/redirect/6422eecd-6231-4ba1-a697-5e043a049b05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after financial markets confirmed the concerns of global capital. The pattern grew so routine that critics described it via acronym: TACO (Trump Always Chickens Out).
On Friday, he prompted [rare ](https://substack.com/redirect/a273792f-1b24-46bd-8d8f-201ff4f0f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[bipartisan](https://substack.com/redirect/a273792f-1b24-46bd-8d8f-201ff4f0f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ outrage](https://substack.com/redirect/a273792f-1b24-46bd-8d8f-201ff4f0f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by firing Erika McEntarfer, the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Elected officials even within his own party--who have repeatedly [contorted themselves to avoid criticizing him](https://substack.com/redirect/adc2511b-1f37-4646-a2ae-2e8e8d6e67c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--raised concerns. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) summed up the underlying issue: "You can't really make the numbers different or better by firing the people doing the counting."
Nothing, even politically damaging economic statistics, would force the president's hand more strongly than [strikes impeding critical industries](https://substack.com/redirect/e50178e8-0cce-44f3-b5fe-6682901db1d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **Has anyone learned anything?**
The casualties of the Israeli genocide in Gaza stretch beyond hundreds of thousands of lives, the hopes of parents, and the futures of children selectively murdered or [maimed](https://substack.com/redirect/37184e29-7774-47dc-b4b3-8c7d04e30a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by American weapons in the hands of unaccountable war criminals.
The genocide in Gaza definitively disproved any pretense of human progress. Many students of history falsely imagine a narrative of inevitable progress over time, but the regression of international human rights currently spearheaded by Israel and the United States reveals that any illusion of progress is either historically circumstantial, imaginary, or both.
The genocide in Gaza also revealed the true nature of the Internet, which was [promised](https://substack.com/redirect/89e65eb4-f72d-4ebb-a806-baa864f738b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to us as a way to enable global connections and enable accountability that would otherwise have been missing. [In fact](https://substack.com/redirect/84e43b2a-7d32-49e0-a8c8-7803a4a6d95b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), major technology platforms have spent years relentlessly [censoring](https://substack.com/redirect/9da2263a-3f66-482a-9530-6931e279d085?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) users to silence and obscure speech aimed to defend human rights and expose official state crimes for which [Israeli officials are wanted around the world](https://substack.com/redirect/b3220e37-a3d3-45fe-8ff6-c9c432e122ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In addition, the Israeli genocide in Gaza exposed the fraud of Zionism and its [co-optation of the international Jewish community](https://substack.com/redirect/8d755616-9764-4fe1-a836-aea7cfda6a93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). We are witnessing human rights abuses at a scale, and with an impunity, unseen since the Holocaust. By some measures, the Israeli genocide in Gaza has proven even more successful than the German attempt in Europe that appears to have inspired it.
On the one hand, far more Jews died in the death chambers of Nazi Germany than Palestinians have under Israeli & American bombs. But the community of Jews was able to persist and find a future, whereas the Palestinian [civilization in Gaza has been effectively destroyed](https://substack.com/redirect/fd0ea1cc-847c-49b8-9de9-6371538e664e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=170124126&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI0MTI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ3NTM0MTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NzM0NTQxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fa7DcmAZP0qGOB0mYEl6av4mfhiZBkfcjIqoGUBemT0)
Finally, the genocide in Gaza seems to have finally forced the rest of the world to [recognize](https://substack.com/redirect/13482a3d-8267-4360-93dc-d64bb5dcfe87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the United States no longer supports the human rights we once pioneered. One may plausibly wonder why, after the brutality evident from [Vietnam](https://substack.com/redirect/35f426c7-bdd7-4632-b7e7-e3058d209f75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the 1970s to [Iraq](https://substack.com/redirect/e8b525dd-0468-4625-9e7f-84700780238d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the 2000s, it took the devastation of Gaza in the 2020s to expose that reality to so many international observers.
However [late to the proverbial party](https://substack.com/redirect/60f5e5ad-ec1c-42f7-9433-fd581c127558?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the arrival of the international community--if not mobilization by organized labor within the U.S.--might yet force the hand of Washington & Tel Aviv.
_Paid subscribers can access an additional section responding to the compelling philosophy of an influential German philosopher killed by the Nazis. His writing explains a force in the world even greater than evil that I hope to continue confronting in my writing._
### Some thoughts worth grappling with
I read an [insightful post on a philosophy blog](https://substack.com/redirect/3058ddca-f12e-4612-b2b9-33802aab3ff9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) exploring the writing of Dietrich Bonhoeffer, a German theologian and dissident who was imprisoned and executed for joining a plot to assassinate Hitler.
Bonhoeffer explored the nature of evil. He came to the conclusion that, as dangerous as it is, there is a yet more dangerous phenomenon in the world:
> We often equate evil with malice - a conscious desire to inflict harm. But Bonhoeffer argued that stupidity is a far more potent and dangerous foe. Why? Because evil, at least, understands itself. It knows what it's doing. Stupidity, on the other hand, is often blind, self-satisfied, and utterly impervious to reason. It's not about a lack of intelligence; it's a moral failing.
> **The Anatomy of Stupidity**
> Bonhoeffer wasn't referring to a simple lack of intellect. Instead, he saw stupidity as a psychological and moral condition. Here's how he broke it down:
> * A Surrender of Independence: The core of stupidity is a voluntary abdication of one's own critical thinking, a willingness to surrender one's inner freedom.
> * Group Conformity: This surrender is often driven by a desire to belong, to conform to a group, ideology, or leader.
> * Resistance to Facts: The stupid person actively resists facts and arguments that contradict their pre-conceived notions. They are immune to reason.
>

> This self-imposed blindness makes the stupid person a perfect instrument for those in power. They are easily manipulated, happy to follow orders without question, and completely unaware of the harm they are causing.
Bonhoeffer's analysis challenges the extent to which people are intellectually capable of understanding new ideas and changing their views in response to observed events. It reinforces [theories of intransigence rooted in cognitive dissonance](https://substack.com/redirect/6fb16792-7d03-49fb-afd1-4a3e7fbf282f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the seemingly emotionally driven rejection of facts by people more committed to their worldviews than reality.
Whether rational argument can prove sufficient to change the minds of masses, I maintain some hope and conviction that they can sway the minds of at least open minded individuals. As long as any hope remains of illuminating hearts and minds that remain in the dark, I will continue to shine whatever light I can with my words.

Some thoughts worth grappling with I read an exploring the writing of Dietrich Bonhoeffer, a German theologian and dissident who was imprisoned and executed for joining a plot to assassinate Hitler. Bonhoeffer explored the nature of evil. He came to the conclusion that, as dangerous as it is, there is a yet more dangerous phenomenon in the world: We often equate evil with malice - a conscious desire to inflict harm. But Bonhoeffer argued that stupidity is a far more potent and dangerous foe. Why? Because evil, at least, understands itself. It knows what it's doing. Stupidity, on the other hand, is often blind, self-satisfied, and utterly impervious to reason. It's not about a lack of intelligence; it's a moral failing. The Anatomy of Stupidity Bonhoeffer wasn't referring to a simple lack of intellect. Instead, he saw stupidity as a psychological and moral condition. Here's how he broke it down: A Surrender of Independence: The core of stupidity is a voluntary abdication of one's own critical thinking, a willingness to surrender one's inner freedom. Group Conformity: This surrender is often driven by a desire to belong, to conform to a group, ideology, or leader. * Resistance to Facts: The stupid person actively resists facts and arguments that contradict their pre-conceived notions. They are immune to reason. This self-imposed blindness makes the stupid person a perfect instrument for those in power. They are easily manipulated, happy to follow orders without question, and completely unaware of the harm they are causing. Bonhoeffer's analysis challenges the extent to which people are intellectually capable of understanding new ideas and changing their views in response to observed events. It reinforces , and the seemingly emotionally driven rejection of facts by people more committed to their worldviews than reality. Whether rational argument can prove sufficient to change the minds of masses, I maintain some hope and conviction that they can sway the minds of at least open minded individuals. As long as any hope remains of illuminating hearts and minds that remain in the dark, I will continue to shine whatever light I can with my words. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Shahid Buttar South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150 ? ?

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112740411/561463784/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250804_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzkxOWU2Yi03YzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QL66DZ0CGWOLBpySKNqBhKo0OlL9yfP6K51PM7Yk3xg=)

Hey Peter — I hope you and your loved ones are holding up okay. Congress is in recess, and I couldn’t be more grateful to be back home in Vermont to spend some time with my family, meet with folks across the state, and yes, hang out with some baby cows. We could all use some healing. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112740412/561463785/-841940282?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250804_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzkxOWU2Yi03YzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QL66DZ0CGWOLBpySKNqBhKo0OlL9yfP6K51PM7Yk3xg=&emci=c0bbb064-7c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83919e6b-7c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272) It’s been a tough few months. It’s hard to find much to celebrate or feel optimistic about when Republicans are slashing Medicaid, picking community members off the streets, and doing everything they can to make billionaires richer while kicking working people in the teeth. I'm doing everything I can to stand up to the Trump administration and their Republican enablers. But I also want to empower folks like you to use your voices and demand better. **[That’s why I want to know: How are you doing? What’s on your mind? Person to person, I’d really like to hear from you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112740413/561463786/-841940282?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250804_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzkxOWU2Yi03YzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QL66DZ0CGWOLBpySKNqBhKo0OlL9yfP6K51PM7Yk3xg=&emci=c0bbb064-7c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83919e6b-7c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)** | [SHARE MY THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112740414/561463787/-841940282?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250804_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzkxOWU2Yi03YzcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QL66DZ0CGWOLBpySKNqBhKo0OlL9yfP6K51PM7Yk3xg=&emci=c0bbb064-7c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83919e6b-7c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)
---
I know so many people who are feeling deflated, worried, angry, or, honestly, just overwhelmed.
Republicans know it, and to be honest, that’s the point.
“Flood the zone” isn’t just a phrase; it’s a strategy. If the GOP keeps us off balance and disconnected, we’re more likely to check out, give up, or tune out.**But we cannot let that happen.**
Peter, I hope you’re taking care of yourself and doing what you need to do to stay sane right now.
And when you’re ready to jump back in the fight, pick that one thing you really care about and lock in. I’ll do everything I can in Washington to support you.
— Becca

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.
---

Hey Peter, yesterday we wrapped up our Accountability Summer Tour across Arizona — **but that doesn’t mean our work is over.** Over the last week, I was joined by leaders like Sen. Mark Kelly, Sen. Chris Murphy, Rep. Greg Stanton, Rep. Jasmine Crockett, Rep. Melanie Stansbury, former Navajo Nation President Jonathan Nez, and so many more state and local leaders and community members to spread the word about the devastating impact of the GOP budget. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112740598/561464504/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250804_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWQyY2ZhYS03ZDcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elmJf-EAyjoK3jEH3JfC6QoSQdJ5ZTAE5MD16cvRC7I=) Arizona’s entire Republican House delegation voted in FAVOR of a budget that rips people off of Medicaid and hands tax breaks to wealthy billionaires. We heard from Arizonans from all backgrounds about how betrayed they feel by their GOP representatives. People are rightly scared of what will happen if they lose their health care, food assistance, or other support systems that help working people make ends meet. **[We can put power back in the hands of working people, and that starts with electing leaders who put people over politics and refuse to cater to billionaires. ### This Is How We Win or Lose Our Democracy, Time to Choose
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/94ceb143-7afe-43fe-96c7-8ef3fab472be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
No more Marquess of Queensberry Rules. No more badminton where Republicans use baseball bats. No more laying back, waiting for voters to come to us, assuming this must be **that** scandal that undoes Trump. No more defending institutions that don't work, haven't worked, won't work, FFS (there's a word for that: conservative).
I'll apologize ahead of time because there'll be some language, as I'm all out of f*ks after years of Gingrich, Bush, McConnell, an Opus Dei SCOTUS stacked with perverts, some due to stolen seats. ENOUGH.
So let's start with this: good for Democrats in the Texas state legislature who stood up, walked out, left the state and dared to say **enough to Greg Abbott**. [They've had it with this canker sore with a chip on his shoulder. This vicious, corrupt cockchafer ](https://substack.com/redirect/9240f0f9-ec59-4955-bf2b-cea4cd61654c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)who seemingly spends each year deciding if he'd rather let constituents freeze or drown due to campaign donations and a maladjusted, mephitic, MAGA soul.
This year, while tongue-surfing Trump's colon, he said "yes Mr. President [of course I'll break democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/58599928-d2f6-46d8-80ce-0a63b3bc4ee8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (and perhaps the law) to help you gain at least 5 seats in mid-decade redistricting. Just as [Trump's Uncle Joe five-year plan causes man-made economic catastrophe](https://substack.com/redirect/9ce8c486-e8da-42da-a0ee-82f79a8ca966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
As the name Trump--notwithstanding Pam Bondi's best efforts to obstruct justice--[hopscotches around Epstein's files](https://substack.com/redirect/78921d8d-0d8d-4de6-b223-87ac0cf75556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) like Kid Rock in _The Great American Race..For Methamphetamine Hydrochloride. A_ nd as Don-Don possesses the cognitive capacity of an unladen swallow (African or European?) with Greg Abbott's affinity for personally head-butting oak trees.
Trump's little tool, Abbott, can help Trump ignore the Constitution and will of the people to hold onto Congress. As all Americans with half-firing neurons votes have re-learned to hate Trump\ and prepare to vote to put him in the inescapable phantom zone known as Eric's gums.
**But the Democrats, in a bold move and one that needs to be the norm during this fascist attack on democracy, have left the state to deny Abbott a quorum, he has responded with a threat to** _**remove**_**these Democrats from office.**
What say you, he doesn't have the right to do that?!
Why of course he doesn't. He's using a "legal opinion" from none other than Ken Paxton, an Attorney General who reminds you MAGAs a cult as he's gotten reelected again and again with **this** record:
* Indicted on state securities fraud charges, investigated for 9 years, paid 300K in restitution, had to attend ethics training & community service--the f-ing TX AG!
* In Oct of 2020, several high level assistants accused him of "bribery and abuse of office." In May 2023, _the TX House --controlled by Republicans impeached him, but the Senate, under pressure from allies like...Trump, let him off._
* Paxton carried on an extra-marital affair. He had his office hire her. They shared an Uber account to meet. His wife just divorced him on "Biblical grounds."
* Filed a lawsuit based to try and undermine the results of the 2020 election. Election expert Rick Hasen referred to it as ""the dumbest case I've ever seen filed on an emergency basis at the Supreme Court"
* Top Paxton officials advisors were sued for sexual harrassment, verbal abuse

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c20d266f-1bee-4f8d-ad7a-a47f080c0122?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* Charges against him have included: targeting charities to help friends, directed his office to violate the law on public information requests, "improperly firing whistleblowers," accepting bribes, making false statements to the state securities board, obstructing justice to benefit from a donor's lawsuit...

I could go on. **The man rivals Trump for lifetime sleaze and criminal.** Accepting his opinion on law is like accepting Chachi's views on acting or Ghislaine Maxwell's thoughts on childcare. It'd be a joke if the GOP itself weren't a criminal enterprise and [we weren't in this authoritarian moment fighting MAGA hoards like this](https://substack.com/redirect/1bc56f2e-f446-4702-9a48-65e1e88cb0a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/833b80f5-a8cc-40e6-9335-2e83bb922c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So here's what I say to those Texas Democrats: **stay away as long as you need to --then** **show up when the time is right --and make Abbott remove you. Arrest you.**
Walk into the chamber. With constituents in tow, so they witness it, and more cameras cover it. Buy a billboard outside the statehouse summarizing Ken Paxton.
Put your body in the machine. Force the issue. Non-violently, boldly, defiantly --like civil rights warriors before you. Dare this TACO-Trumpian, chicken sh*t to follow through on his threats.
Bring some big Texas names with you. Beto. Jasmine. How about Dan Rather (if he's in the condition to do it)? **They 'll need not assault you, but our entire democracy in front of the world.**
MAKE THEM. [They're used to being tough guys with immigrants when they think nobody is watching](https://substack.com/redirect/b0d5ef6a-d4ef-4b99-934f-45f27e584007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This will be different.
And to Democrats from New York to Illinois, California and Maryland. Michigan, Pennsylvania and Minnesota, too, if you can use the Governor's mansion, a one chamber majority and slight minority status in the other (in MN a tie) to get this over the finish line.
Get in their faces. Make recalcitrant Republicans chug Trump like arsenic if they wanna defend...**that**. Get some inspiration here:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0b502c33-c3ca-4d63-8d21-7bccda2b7ef6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And don't wait for them. **It 's time we stop reacting and start acting**. **Take the damn seats. Take them all. And apply this same principle to everything --from legislative maneuvers to movement organizing in the streets. **
`Folks, The Number of New Paid Subscribers has Dramatically Slowed this Past Week. Without Them, We Can't Continue to Expand The Soundcheck Fund--Just as Trump Kills the Corporation for Public Broadcasting. Please Consider a Paid Subscription to Support the Growth of Independent Media`
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.mBsGDW_SAG55TQFCKbYQ-GR_hIZecWnX4AaoiNp-4Z4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170109193)
As my pal Cheri Jacobus recommended, set up an opposition press conference every GD day in DC to preempt and respond. Do the same when the Supreme Court is in session and in state capitols/cities around the country--where local news _needs_ content.
How about A REAL shadow cabinet that responds regularly before dunderheads like Pete Hegseth get their head outta a bottle of Jim Beam and some new Fox producer at 11am in the morning?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc33b540-4482-4b4c-81f8-0ae535b691e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's the truth: If we keep playing defense and defending failed institutions, **voters will keep choosing the loudest voices promising to burn it all down.**
FDR didn't defend failure--he reformed what could be fixed, tore down the garbage that didn't work and most importantly created entirely new institutions. If fact, a new system, one that took responsibility to for the economic well-being of all Americans, while calling out the billionaires of their day (millionaires) and most selfish among us.
FDR wasn't playing. He made that clear. You may have seen this famous phrase of his:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dbe05ffa-fa13-4788-ab40-3bc7056765ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
God what I'd give to hear a Democrat say that today. This is the fight voters want to see. Give it to them, show you get where the populist anger is coming from, [as they've been betrayed by elites again and again](https://substack.com/redirect/1d728482-4fd8-46be-9e1a-38fc2a2ac37b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Propose a "tax the living sh*t out of billionaires" bill. Make the top rate absolutely confiscatory--and in the same way the top rate only hit John D.Rockefeller during our last gilded age, **have this top rate only hit Musk, Bezos and Zuckerberg**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/757f02ed-5c88-47b0-8dfb-b8037f825e2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You have nothing to lose and everything to gain. Still place higher rates on the rest of the obscenely rich, _but save a special one for those Three Stooges_. Talk about this proposal all the time and make Republicans defend these creepy, Epstein-enabling, incel-adjacent, pontoon-addicted goons.
**Or, be careful, watch populist anger destroy the party and worse, our country.**
This isn't just about legislation. It's about our lives. Our democracy. It's about whether Epstein investigations will happen. It's about gerrymandering, aka Republican cheating. It's about SCOTUS blight and corrupt, corporate media.. It's about **whether we remain a democracy** **or become a cautionary tale.**
**[The system is broken, as Kamala recently said](https://substack.com/redirect/872c6625-16dd-4f3b-a9ff-e97a1b5b0dd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Un-break it.**
Get in the streets. Call them what they are: **corrupt, criminal, incompetent.** Message constantly. Push every boundary. Exploit every loophole. Make the courts stop us--just like Republicans are doing every damn day.
**Follow the old saying: you 'd rather say you're sorry than ask for permission.**
**Support independent media that actually gives a damn about democracy.**[ Support Blue Amp. Support our ](https://substack.com/redirect/14674c1b-4bf0-46e4-9e01-1d4efc1cbcd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Soundcheck fund to help boost an ecosystem of independent media by getting a paid subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/14674c1b-4bf0-46e4-9e01-1d4efc1cbcd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[!](https://substack.com/redirect/14674c1b-4bf0-46e4-9e01-1d4efc1cbcd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Because if we lose the truth, we lose the fight.
> _"Crush your enemies. See them driven before you. "_
> --**Conan the Barbarian** (played by Schwarzenegger, enemy of actual Nazis)
It's time for us to be the barbarian at the gate.

As Trump fires and investigates the truth tellers, we again remind you this [is why we created ](https://substack.com/redirect/e7867281-58b6-4015-a742-e3a03b5c49f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Blue Amp's Soundcheck Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/e7867281-58b6-4015-a742-e3a03b5c49f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--to build a people-powered, independent media army that answers to you, not monopolies or Trump suck-ups.

Please Consider a Paid Subscription to Support the Growth of Independent Media` As my pal Cheri Jacobus recommended, set up an opposition press conference every GD day in DC to preempt and respond. Do the same when the Supreme Court is in session and in state capitols/cities around the country--where local news needs content. How about A REAL shadow cabinet that responds regularly before dunderheads like Pete Hegseth get their head outta a bottle of Jim Beam and some new Fox producer at 11am in the morning? | | ---|---|--- Here's the truth: If we keep playing defense and defending failed institutions, voters will keep choosing the loudest voices promising to burn it all down. FDR didn't defend failure--he reformed what could be fixed, tore down the garbage that didn't work and most importantly created entirely new institutions. If fact, a new system, one that took responsibility to for the economic well-being of all Americans, while calling out the billionaires of their day (millionaires) and most selfish among us. FDR wasn't playing. He made that clear. You may have seen this famous phrase of his: | | ---|---|--- God what I'd give to hear a Democrat say that today. This is the fight voters want to see. Give it to them, show you get where the populist anger is coming from, . Propose a "tax the living sht out of billionaires" bill. Make the top rate absolutely confiscatory--and in the same way the top rate only hit John D.Rockefeller during our last gilded age, have this top rate only hit Musk, Bezos and Zuckerberg. | | ---|---|--- You have nothing to lose and everything to gain. Still place higher rates on the rest of the obscenely rich, but save a special one for those Three Stooges. Talk about this proposal all the time and make Republicans defend these creepy, Epstein-enabling, incel-adjacent, pontoon-addicted goons. Or, be careful, watch populist anger destroy the party and worse, our country. This isn't just about legislation. It's about our lives. Our democracy. It's about whether Epstein investigations will happen. It's about gerrymandering, aka Republican cheating. It's about SCOTUS blight and corrupt, corporate media.. It's about whether we remain a democracy or become a cautionary tale. . Un-break it. Get in the streets. Call them what they are: corrupt, criminal, incompetent. Message constantly. Push every boundary. Exploit every loophole. Make the courts stop us--just like Republicans are doing every damn day. Follow the old saying: you 'd rather say you're sorry than ask for permission. Support independent media that actually gives a damn about democracy. Because if we lose the truth, we lose the fight. "Crush your enemies. See them driven before you. " --Conan the Barbarian (played by Schwarzenegger, enemy of actual Nazis) It's time for us to be the barbarian at the gate. As Trump fires and investigates the truth tellers, we again remind you this build a people-powered, independent media army that answers to you, not monopolies or Trump suck-ups. 👉🏽 If you believe in democracy... 👉🏽 If you believe the truth still matters... 👉🏽 If you don't want every news source to be bought by billionaires... Thanks for all you do to fight for independent media and democracy.You are why we're here - Cliff You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

body:

Hi there, Peter

At 4:00p (CST) on Sunday Afternoon, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections.

After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up 5 more congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprung into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way.

These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their family (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district funded by Governor Greg Abbott. **If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help.**

Pennsylvania Democrats want to show these fighters that we have their back! [If you make a contribution to this email, it will be split between the Pennsylvania and Texas Democratic Parties in order to help the Texas Democrats fund this very expensive fight for all of our sake.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112740754/561464925/-1812449698?amount=$10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250804_FR_TXDemssplit_0_3MO_TeamPADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGM2ZjEyZi03ZTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLeAOVwFYrXSvENznzgYYp-EVIu_gp8isMtU1vKt3go=) | | [Rush a Donation to Support Texas Democrats!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112740755/561464926/-1812449698?amount=$10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250804_FR_TXDemssplit_0_3MO_TeamPADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGM2ZjEyZi03ZTcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLeAOVwFYrXSvENznzgYYp-EVIu_gp8isMtU1vKt3go=)

clean_body: | | Hi there, Peter At 4:00p (CST) on Sunday Afternoon, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections. After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up 5 more congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprung into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way. These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their family (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district funded by Governor Greg Abbott. If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help. Pennsylvania Democrats want to show these fighters that we have their back! = | | = This is the fight to save democracy that Democrats have been warning about for ten years. It’s going to take all of us to ensure that this bold attempt to steal this republic does not go unchallenged. In solidarity, Pennsylvania Democrats = | Follow us on , , and **! name: Bryan
subject: August 4 Campaign Update
body:
Here Is An Update From Our Campaign

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=0900c883cc&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **August 4, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | | Last week, I held a listening session in Elkhorn. It was a great event attended by hundreds of families.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=4a7eaaa0fe&e=e907534017)
| Unfortunately a few dozen protestors attempted to cause disruptions during the event, [**including**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=b26f2dade2&e=e907534017) :

* Booing**** the Pledge of Allegiance

* Booing our work to secure the border

* Booing calls for Hamas to surrender and release hostages

Despite this, it was great to talk with Wisconsin families about the issues that matter most including:
✅ Tax relief to make life more affordable for working families and seniors✅ Securing the border to make our communities safer✅ Reducing government spending✅ Eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse in government programs like Medicaid
For more on our listening session you can watch the MacIver Institute’s coverage [**here**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=e5709e3068&e=e907534017)**** or listen to Dan O’Donnell’s recap of the event [**here**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d057439b5c&e=e907534017).

---
| **Bringing the YRNC to Milwaukee**
This week, I helped [**announce**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f6165a744e&e=e907534017)**** that the 2027 Young Republican National Convention (YRNC) will be held in Milwaukee.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=56e7031425&e=e907534017)
| After the success of the 2024 Republican National Convention (RNC), Wisconsin will once again host thousands of Republicans from around the country.
This opportunity will help focus Republican resources on Wisconsin ahead of a competitive 2028 election.
Additionally, the 2024 RNC saw a significant impact on communities across Southeast Wisconsin including:

* More than [**$5 million**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5fc243cb89&e=e907534017) donated to various charities and civic organizations
* [**$320 million**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8267b95693&e=e907534017) economic impact for Southeast Wisconsin
* Support for more than [**3,400**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=be43778a16&e=e907534017) full and part-time jobs connected to the convention

---
|
# Answering Your Questions
---
| The Left and corporate legacy media continue to mislead Amercians.
I make it a priority to set the record straight and speak to you about the work I'm doing to move our country forward.
Last week, I joined a number of shows including [**Vicki McKenna**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=1e61e6d7ec&e=e907534017)**** on 1130 WISN.
I talked about how we can push back against the tactics of the radical left. I also shared more about how I'm working to help Wisconsin families. including:
* Standing for American values
* Securing our border
* Eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse
* Unleashing American energy

You can listen to our discussion [**here.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=94ed065128&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c0022e4c5c&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=e907534017&u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=3ab5333c0c)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=3ab5333c0c) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=3ab5333c0c)
---
|

name: Lorenzo Rios
subject: From picking peaches to Combat Deployments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lorenzo Rios for Congress
body:
My name is Lorenzo Rios.
My parents were migrant farm workers from Mexico. I grew up picking peaches, apples, and pears in the fields alongside my parents. [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Z-gtLhrNGBsDGdIbsm6shMf7Hh9QFMrm1q2JbZb6eMrrvJz2fEyVR3m3zpnLQ5xX_Lbel6Xj1DEZVgyKtQIHTHbVPjNDgmC4rHKQnja2VLuKcCxMMz1f6DGyaMK7heF7bUAr4YUA1l2HebOI2bSViZO6-u8U3ALU2PkqZR6V_rORj0TJ4P_t4AfYN9rlT3dj0w9AhVBOa86IHu1AAj75GaTFsUpSZ3CCTm9K-pvlv5qfty7Gglu8D9B0oK11eYWJxpsxF4HmyDj3QoAi3oSDpIgWPT2YADXWmXnC2YrWU7RLE-e1C2ll1A4edalpCqOqvrn5Ru8l8VDGbQqt0L5sLfnqj7kv2JEhNUY5x300O6kvWYWhWtzXHhD8CzWFeOnB7B0JpRZvJHPXFKvt-k7yLUqLZkg8rMrjyvyzQkmcX0twHI_EQrYdQ0vts4J1qhjWvfGWgOswaiPI9zZCRHM2OYva1itvomu3jpv21W0LjwIA9FM4c30eMKk8Gp_chtkZK8a5XpCn6GVemeVuEuTZfdAGpLvRtACImHeamNO2X-z4ovXWVJw430tMP8cdVoodzMWpdEbhN8mvZsQTfahykPisqhivarS-Jymgoh2EHzBQASoQ6IxnchFYWAiWJ5ube3nrJupWK6DVsBy2NJpOohnZVnJbJL1Fdj8T_cvSQ8zPDMND6fpQy1iirA60PQbGDwwMY5_qWjbDiTQbhhAJXyU5ZgG1M7S9teU96zt5OaJafxhdpsYwhkVT4QEqWxithLWTRWe5DKlO3kZfhkC2uz0R_8Pu37bxnQW7EJasmXXc696JXZTx0XM-AlksoC-Y0BllEhp_uILSYr1EOisJNKwNgMa6IgMBARy7VszuQbDJk552gJVSngoKgFB9lKJlXPlH-EWKXSXU/8nKPl0NNCtq0tQPMLVIw4wJ-tga9Vlqd/11) My family at one of the farms they worked on. The days were long and extremely hot, but we worked hard because we knew that this was our chance to make it in America.
That same boy who was in the fields with his parents went on to have 23 years of combined service in the Marine Corps and Army, put himself through college, and taught at West Point.
I was honored to serve my country for those 23 years because this country gave so much to me. [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/kIKOKUuGLPWjFryP4RUmeRN9lTpB4YvKgzwtqR9Wc4ScORrvZGjbw1mus43z9Hlr0cgN8owz2q3XsinkaC2xZ35WM6XC8oo3XcoEobDFoYYLY0ZAQt3JsyjLyWa51iEiAWhCe-vJPrZY0j9rPbHj_Zrlmb0JVzw6n8cPwdZoNDBDPuEf0f2QIMudvu2j5zldcIUSlnHIbaXbDIzuy8INEfIYt7b7IFAb7V6CByLYN-nG3UgcUXvta23t58ls5MjN4vCmB-Sw_akNt3L3wQDyYEp1alkkxUI-HapBJ6XlKes7-w5wASaWL3cJcieh-PHb7q_Jrd0MpovRYvv4eLS-Um10Abua2qtPf27sM7uEjkceD7lilSJHbQzcR6NTxHkX4WdVQSYxBGc1ZEzrryf3g_Kl73l6Vm8ZFcwnJ1G6QJmohC_jHSUsQRuDZd5bEPfCX0boxg75pvX5wJ2nn709HV0vm19ghRLReDm-k3s6WcPi5rFYKnd5GEYPOCUw22kxjQPodqLqjXtGrtcyP9h_wgrYCqIrjofddChLoU8snuL6Jjr-MuTflTaYPeKvIcET25FLMudeeoqtfKnDM_oIXvpAyAV6Ib9LkH4OxPIsGYDY7Z5nt5jfZSCw-NmvAF7RHbSakRW_L7EMqnBT2cjaRPzCQvSrep9vGRF-RL7q8zKMYP52xiiu5ygV7KsdID25azxSjYxA3uZ5iYP3JT4jAAJv44OTHHLqqzWTeoa1TcCPniC7qy6LwSqWH_b3NyRd5UdKvcbUHtHb3hUaNSP4FHwau1s-_BfXvUtwc0xqpXKPJ85s-krup6HnwoHyi-UYeeT6kbTfdjizg4loKNKOhCdrxZSGsJtM1XYSOv8Pql3I1AfLg0BGl8ALqZMT6A-cih77kHXDJQ63/frC5QV_azWuaY6OmW-uvc6XjznGuTLmi/11) The United States gave me opportunities that the little boy in the fields never could have dreamed of.
I'm in your inbox today to tell you my story, but also to ask a favor. I JUST announced that I'm running for Congress to make sure future generations have all the same opportunities that I had. But I can't do this alone.

clean_body: My name is Lorenzo Rios. My parents were migrant farm workers from Mexico. I grew up picking peaches, apples, and pears in the fields alongside my parents. My family at one of the farms they worked on. The days were long and extremely hot, but we worked hard because we knew that this was our chance to make it in America. That same boy who was in the fields with his parents went on to have 23 years of combined service in the Marine Corps and Army, put himself through college, and taught at West Point. I was honored to serve my country for those 23 years because this country gave so much to me. The United States gave me opportunities that the little boy in the fields never could have dreamed of. I'm in your inbox today to tell you my story, but also to ask a favor. I JUST announced that I'm running for Congress to make sure future generations have all the same opportunities that I had. But I can't do this alone. To show we mean business, we have to raise $50,000, which means that NO donation is too small. Even just $10 or $20 is going to be make-or-break to hit our Launch Goal! I'm so grateful for whatever you can donate. And if you can't afford to give right now, please just keep me and my team in your prayers. Thank you! Lorenzo Rios Marine, Army Veteran, and Father | | | | | Paid for by Lorenzo Rios for Congress Use of Lorenzo Rios' military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch. PO Box 8142 Fresno, CA 93747 |

Republicans efforts to redistrict in Texas has exposed a voting rights act violation. The Trump Department of Justice has discovered that certain districts in Texas were drawn up to create a racial drawn district under an outdated law. This has helped Democrats to gerrymander districts in their favor and the Supreme Court will weigh in on a similar case in Louisiana that is also in violation of the Voting Rights Act. Democrats have used this to create the effect that elected officials need to look like the people they represent to represent them accurately. The DOJ is cleaning out voter rolls, purging duplicates and non citizens. After 44 years the DOJ has removed race-based hiring practices within the federal government, applicants will be judged on merit and competence standards, allowing the federal government to hire the top talent in our nation.

* * *
Hi there — it's President Obama's birthday today!
We want to wish him a very happy birthday, **especially as Donald Trump continues to attack his good name and legacy. **
President Obama's legacy and impact on politicians of color cannot be understated, folks. Just like Lisa, Obama is a trailblazer. He passed the Affordable Care Act, helped fight for marriage equality, and protected our climate.
He should serve as an inspiration to us all. But MAGA-extremists are trying to attack his character and dismantle everything he did for our country.
_That's why today we want to do something special for him._

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Help us fight for Texas!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Texas Governor Greg Abbott is exploiting a natural disaster to help Donald Trump rig the next election, and he's threatening to arrest any Democrat who stands in his way.
After catastrophic floods swept through parts of Texas last month, killing over 100 people -- floods that happened on Abbott's watch due to years of neglect and failure to invest in infrastructure -- Abbott didn't step up to take responsibility.
Instead, he launched $750,000 in attack ads. Not to help flood victims, but to lie to voters about his scheme with Donald Trump to steal 5 Democratic-held Congressional seats.
And Abbott is not stopping there. He's also threatening to have these lawmakers arrested, removed from office, and replaced with Republican puppets who will ram through Trump's rigged map and start a gerrymandering arms race in states across the country.
That's why GOTV PAC is planning to launch rapid-response phone banks across Texas to reach voters directly, tell them the truth, and urge them to call their state representatives and say: NO to gerrymandering.
But, Peter, we need you. These phone banks need to launch immediately, and we need $15,000 to staff them in the coming days fully. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08042025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Greg Abbott is trying to turn a tragedy into political gold for Donald Trump. Please help us stop him.
-GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08042025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: some bad news, some good news:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
It’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112741439/561467318/1435897075?refcode=email_080425_badnews-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMzllNi03ZjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Ku8YZKMDDF_IqrAh6IypM_njWZ7psXRRyRNne9PpYs=&emci=627ad47d-f66e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=239e39e6-7f71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) I have to share some bad news with you: **the Senate map this cycle is brutal, and Democrats have no path to retaking the Senate majority in 2026 without defending seats like Colorado’s.** Just let that sink in for a moment, folks. **If we lose this seat, there goes our best chance of rebuilding our Democratic Senate majority to halt Trump and Republicans’ extreme agenda and continue making progress for working people** — like expanding access to health care, keeping jobs here in America, tackling the sky-high cost of living, _and more._ Now here’s the good news. **I’ve got one heck of a card up my sleeve: this incredible grassroots team.** Look, National Republicans have been eyeing this seat ever since we won in 2020 and flipped Colorado blue. But this seat has a history of flipping back and forth, so we can’t afford to get complacent and let the GOP tighten its grip on Congress. **Folks, that means it’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026.[If you’re up for that fight, please, take a moment to chip in a couple bucks to my campaign and help us prepare for the long road ahead. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112741440/561467319/1506335976?refcode=email_080425_badnews-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMzllNi03ZjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Ku8YZKMDDF_IqrAh6IypM_njWZ7psXRRyRNne9PpYs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112741441/561467320/1506335976?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_080425_badnews-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzllMzllNi03ZjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Ku8YZKMDDF_IqrAh6IypM_njWZ7psXRRyRNne9PpYs=)

clean_body: It’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026. I have to share some bad news with you: the Senate map this cycle is brutal, and Democrats have no path to retaking the Senate majority in 2026 without defending seats like Colorado’s. Just let that sink in for a moment, folks. If we lose this seat, there goes our best chance of rebuilding our Democratic Senate majority to halt Trump and Republicans’ extreme agenda and continue making progress for working people — like expanding access to health care, keeping jobs here in America, tackling the sky-high cost of living, and more. Now here’s the good news. I’ve got one heck of a card up my sleeve: this incredible grassroots team. Look, National Republicans have been eyeing this seat ever since we won in 2020 and flipped Colorado blue. But this seat has a history of flipping back and forth, so we can’t afford to get complacent and let the GOP tighten its grip on Congress. Folks, that means it’s going to take all of us working together to keep this seat blue and help Democrats take back the Senate in 2026.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks for everything, it means a lot to me. Let’s win this thing, John | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 300007 Denver, CO 80203 United States

name: Gregory Wrightstone CO2 Coalition
subject: Get the truth about climate science
body:
META TAG (title): TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend, I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. The so-called "settled science" of climate change is a giant propaganda campaign –– one the Green Lobby uses to scare you and take your hard-earned tax dollars. Friend, I want to personally invite you to subscribe to the CO2 Coalition’s informative weekly newsletter to get the facts about the REAL science behind climate change. Get the Latest Climate Science News NowAre deserts expanding? Are there more hurricanes today? Have droughts become more frequent? These are the questions our experts explore in their hard-hitting news and analysis, Friend –– and their findings will likely make you question everything you’ve been told about the so-called “settled science.” The truth is, true scientific inquiry shows different results than the doom-and-gloom scenarios pushed by the Climate Cult and their allies in the mainstream media, the education establishment, and the Green Lobby! In fact, the CO2 Coalition’s scientific analysis, independent research, and in-depth, state-by-state studies consistently reveal something the Climate Cult doesn't want you to know: ecosystems are thriving, not dying –– and we've got the hard data to prove it. That's why I'm urging you, Friend, to subscribe to our weekly newsletter today and discover the truth about climate science –– and expose the lies being pushed by climate alarmists. Get Reliable Climate Science News Now Since 2015, the CO2 Coalition –– a group of 180+ respected U.S. scientists and researchers, along with a Nobel-Prize-winning physicist on our board –– has brought truth directly to the American people. Our team of leading scientists and researchers has been featured in major media outlets. We've testified before Congress, armed with the facts that debunk the Climate Cult's false narratives. And we've reached over 200,000+ Americans with our educational campaigns. In short, the CO2 Coalition is the "tip of the spear" in the battle between scientific truth and politically-motivated science fiction! If you want to learn more Climate Facts and debunk Climate Fiction, please sign up for CO2 Coalition’s weekly newsletter today. Get the Latest Climate Science News Now Thank you for joining the CO2 Coalition in our crucial education and outreach efforts. Together, we're building a movement of informed citizens who understand the real science behind climate change –– not the politicized version pushed by special interests in the Green Lobby. Gregory WrightstoneExecutive DirectorCO2 Coalition Subscribe to the CO2 Coalition's Weekly Newsletter2677 Prosperity Avenue, Suite 300 Fairfax, VA 22031

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

**• A U.S. Marshal?** Detained.

**• A doctored photo?** Used to justify political targeting.

**• Members of Congress?** Arrested or detained for speaking out.

**• ICE agents?** Masked and operating in secret, with no accountability. This isn’t a government agency — it’s a MAGA goon squad with federal funding. Rep. subject: Help us reach 1 million deportations
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10169073/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRFZCRVJ4bURqYQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDQ/LbmNsZEFCdTRxdg/qP2hpZHM9bmNZbHFTbUVqSW5LNERscw/gaJEzYg/ses2660dc82)
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | My Fellow American, If you’re a Patriot who knows that we MUST accelerate the pace of deportations, **[I need you to sign your NumbersUSA “Deport 1 Million” petition right away.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** We are launching a nationwide petition drive built around 3 simple steps to reach 1 million deportations by year-end:
---
1. **Ban** all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens
2. **Shut off** income for illegal aliens through “E-Verify”
3. **Unleash** ICE to the full extent of the law

---
[ **SIGN YOUR PETITION** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
President Trump has closed the Southern Border, but we still have most of the 8 million Biden Border Crashers (and at least 15-17 MILLION illegal aliens total)...costing taxpayers an estimated $150 BILLION dollars a year. Our hospitals are overcrowded, our public services are overextended, and millions of Americans have been replaced by illegal workers. We literally cannot afford to delay. My team at **NumbersUSA** has 29 years of experience and success in harnessing the power of grassroots armies of American Patriots to defeat the open-borders activists. So if you’re frustrated by the well-funded and organized protests slowing down deportations...if you’re worried about all the illegals still here...and if you want to make a difference right now... [**The best thing you can do is sign your petition today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **SIGN YOUR PETITION** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Thank you, and God Bless you!
---
| | **Roy Beck**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Founder **NumbersUSA**
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | P.S. Click the button below to access your **Deport 1 Million** Petition. I need you to sign and submit it to **NumbersUSA** right away, along with your best donation. And with a donation of $27 or more, you will join the 8 million members who already call **NumbersUSA** home.
---
[ **SIGN YOUR PETITION** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | |
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence.
---
[**NumbersUSA.com**](NumbersUSA.com)

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Your copy of Milton Friedman's free eBook, Why Government is the Problem
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[Hoover Institution]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c350ec366ded44a3ab37db60fb705e92-fb9f3e6bc44e4b4c9f33a726f6919033/63]

Dear Friend,

Do you feel like the policy solutions offered by the government often
create more problems than they solve?

>From education to healthcare and beyond, it's clear that good
intentions don't always lead to good outcomes.

[Hoover Why Government Is the Problem eBook 2022]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c350ec366ded44a3ab37db60fb705e92-fb9f3e6bc44e4b4c9f33a726f6919033/63]

That’s why I'm excited to share a free digital copy of Milton
Friedman's thought-provoking eBook, "Why Government Is the Problem."

In this insightful read, Friedman dives deep into:

* Unveiling how government interventions can worsen the social and
economic problems they’re trying to fix.
* Revealing the influence of special interests in policymaking,
often at the expense of everyday citizens.
* Explaining why limiting government involvement might be the key to
solving our most pressing challenges.

It's a must-read for anyone curious about the impact of government
actions on our society. Originally written in 1993, Friedman's
analysis remains as relevant today as ever.

Are you ready to explore a new perspective? Click here to get your
free copy
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/c350ec366ded44a3ab37db60fb705e92-fb9f3e6bc44e4b4c9f33a726f6919033/63]
of "Why Government Is the Problem" now.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives,
the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing
ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and
democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s
work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom,
democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Team Schrier
subject: Trump just announced ANOTHER round of sweeping tariffs with our closest trading partners.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
"leadership" [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112741947/561468845/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmMyZTU2Ny04MjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mjmsj-hpzQlnp3ahgcLoslaYnyL8k-01zZgYLIf7po4=&emci=319ad278-5c71-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=66c2e567-8271-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Donald Trump just announced another round of sweeping tariffs, and once again, he's targeting some of our closest trading partners, including a 35% tariff on Canada.

Canada is one of our biggest and most reliable trading partners in the U.S., and especially for Washington State. Every year, Washington exports billions of dollars worth of goods to Canada—everything from apples to aerospace parts.

That trade supports our local businesses, our economy, and thousands of jobs right here at home. But Trump's new wave of reckless tariffs put all of that at risk, _and do you know who's going to pay the price?:_
* **Washington businesses** that can’t sell their products across the border
* **Washington families** who will face higher prices as companies pass along the extra costs
* **Washington workers** whose jobs are on the line as companies struggle to stay afloat

These policies don’t help our economy, **_they threaten it._**

Peter, Kim has always opposed these kinds of dangerous political tariffs—not because it’s the easy thing to do, but because it’s the right thing to do for Washington.

But standing up to Trump and his self-serving administration requires more than just one voice in Congress, it requires flipping the House. We can’t afford two more years of Trump's political theater and House Republicans rubber-stamping everything he wants.

[**That's why holding WA-08 and ensuring Kim and other for-the-people Democrats stay in Congress are some of the most critical steps to winning back the majority. If you're ready to show the Trump administration that Americans have had enough of his foolishness, chip in $5 today to help Kim defend this seat and fight for smart, fair trade that actually works for clean_body: "leadership" Peter, Donald Trump just announced another round of sweeping tariffs, and once again, he's targeting some of our closest trading partners, including a 35% tariff on Canada. Canada is one of our biggest and most reliable trading partners in the U.S., and especially for Washington State. Every year, Washington exports billions of dollars worth of goods to Canada—everything from apples to aerospace parts. That trade supports our local businesses, our economy, and thousands of jobs right here at home. But Trump's new wave of reckless tariffs put all of that at risk, and do you know who's going to pay the price?: Washington businesses that can’t sell their products across the border Washington families who will face higher prices as companies pass along the extra costs Washington workers whose jobs are on the line as companies struggle to stay afloat These policies don’t help our economy, they threaten it. Peter, Kim has always opposed these kinds of dangerous political tariffs—not because it’s the easy thing to do, but because it’s the right thing to do for Washington. But standing up to Trump and his self-serving administration requires more than just one voice in Congress, it requires flipping the House. We can’t afford two more years of Trump's political theater and House Republicans rubber-stamping everything he wants. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. It's Beto O'Rourke here. Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.** And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders. They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for. Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote. And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders. They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for. Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up the fight. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Powered by People and Off the Sidelines immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s make sure they know we’ve got their backs—and that they’re not in this fight alone. With gratitude, Beto © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Mandela Barnes via The Long Run
subject: Fighting back against Greg Abbott’s power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Right now, Texas House Democrats are leading the charge against this election theft.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5583%2E196590%2ERZOX-6). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4304?t=2&akid=5583%2E196590%2ERZOX-6)
---
| It's Mandela Barnes. Here’s what’s happening in Texas right now:

After 130 people died in floods that overwhelmed Central Texas, Greg Abbott called a special session. But rather than focus on flood relief, _**he buried flood measures under his redistricting scheme to steal Congressional seats for Trump.**_

For years, local officials have pleaded with Greg Abbott to focus on flood infrastructure and warning systems. Instead, he’s ignored their appeals and focused on helping the Republican Party stay in power. This is the dangerous game that Republicans in Texas are playing: _**they ignore cries for help, cut programs, and use disasters as a means to grab power.**_

**While Texas families are still searching for their loved ones, Greg Abbott and Donald Trump are plotting to steal as many as five Congressional seats from under sitting members. This is an attempt to disenfranchise our democracy, and Texas Democrats won’t let them get away with it.**

Right now, Texas House Democrats are leading the charge against this election theft. They’re using every tool that they have to fight back—including breaking quorum—to force Greg Abbott to focus on flood relief rather than breaking our democracy. We must stand with them to hold the line.

[_**Will you split a $25 contribution with the Texas House Democratic Campaign Committee and The Long Run? We only have two weeks until the special legislative session is over. Your donation makes a difference at this critical moment.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4292?t=3&akid=5583%2E196590%2ERZOX-6)

### 7.5 Million for Signs and some look like they were stickered over
| | [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81) and [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)
---
| Aug 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)| | [](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=170129005&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI5MDA1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDM0ODA2NiwiZXhwIjoxNzU2OTQwMDY2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.za0uWuSNu_mcPstF1ZqyMdZubN7592C0ZBS-Mewh4MM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=170129005&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI5MDA1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzNDgwNjYsImV4cCI6MTc1Njk0MDA2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uMkK73CJQj-tnlAg74zdfhMIz2WJiftKEbEtUT83tB4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
