---
| | [](https://substack..5iaDh6y5S2ciVTG6CjAMt79Ghrj2dqfkli86fsyfhkc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/ct-dot-not-going-your-way-on-route?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As you have been on the Merritt the past week, the Exits signs are a mess. Going North some have been replaced and Going South have not been changed yet - it will take 4-5 weeks for the new signs and the unbagging.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..Vx3jWX-dg7Y3mDVESK8I-G3EuJ96gUoAMc0C14Mt6eo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170129005)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=170129005&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI5MDA1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzNDgwNjYsImV4cCI6MTc1Njk0MDA2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uMkK73CJQj-tnlAg74zdfhMIz2WJiftKEbEtUT83tB4)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8172532a-a9a5-4645-baab-319b05640aee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Southbound Exit 36 With Bagged New sign behind
**More about CTDOT Project No. 0083-0271**
It was awarded to Ducci Electrical Contractors of Farmington (at least some state contractor benefitted) at a cost of $7,482,000.00 on July 26, 2024, and is scheduled to be completed September 11, 2026 (really hope it was a typo and its September 2025 for some sign changes).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5517881a-533e-467f-8482-a2d3105b7ca2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
SEE [Sign Support Replacements on Route 15 in various town in Connecticut](https://substack.com/redirect/3ce8899d-2939-4538-90b4-a4c8342980bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**YES - $7.4 Million for signs - and it looks like some signs were just stickered over.**
These exit changes were prompted by federal government requirements for mileage-based exit numbering system to continue to get federal funding for the highways.
This is already happening with the CT DOT throughout the state with Route 2, Route 8, Interstate 384, Route 9, Interstate 691 and Interstate 395 with other renumbering happening throughout the state.
This was announced January 2024 with design plans for the project are expected to be completed in the spring of 2024 with construction that was supposed to start in the fall of 2024.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=170129005&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMTI5MDA1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQzNDgwNjYsImV4cCI6MTc1Njk0MDA2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uMkK73CJQj-tnlAg74zdfhMIz2WJiftKEbEtUT83tB4)
[Pledge your support](https://substack..Vx3jWX-dg7Y3mDVESK8I-G3EuJ96gUoAMc0C14Mt6eo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170129005)
**Just a year behind schedule for signage that does not help rush-hour traffic.**
**Who Pays?**
The CT DOT states " The exit numbers will be revised as a component of corridor sign replacement projects. These projects are typically paid for by a mixture of State and Federal funds. The renumbering component of the project makes up about 2-5% of the total project construction cost." SEE [Exit Renumbering](https://substack.com/redirect/4e2cd233-c3e1-4597-a5f3-9ff5c7697735?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What are the benefits?**
\- Uniformity across the country and meet the Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices (MUTCD)
\- Easier to calculate distances and aid emergency response based on exit alignment with mile markers
\- This last one from the CT DOT is **Easier to add future exits without renumbering entire corridor**
WHAT IS NEXT?
**Are there going to be new exits built and if so, where? -Food For Thought in the wake of urban redevelopment and the push for 15 minute cities.**
Enjoy the confusion the next month as this project is unbagged.

Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 [Subscribe to Jonathan](https://substack.com/redirect/2aee38f6-558c-4a6d-ad7c-0c01fbd95922?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

subject: Tell Congress: Affirm the right to birthright citizenship
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Supreme Court cracked the door open for Trump—and he’s barrelling right in. | |
---
Peter, **When birthright citizenship came before the Supreme Court, the MAGA justices punted.** Rather than ruling on the actual right to birthright citizenship, they stripped the ability of lower courts to block Trump from taking it away. Their logic was complete nonsense, but it cracked the door open for Trump to barrel right through and rip away birthright citizenship. **Now, Trump has released his plan to do just that—and it’s even worse than we thought:** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJnuXoieTmwfkxDj_77X5VQzj7EI9YPAeI76GCMSq83_GgxGru_UyxhyVbqXHTTrd8KDHhWQL-NkpN3az_3p3vjbObFUHUKBxeJhXJHrc7dDy22z_bW3r6T-n7X7NyEZ7UaNQUnYyVBUPjCev55sPJTTq4mH-iU9VC2M8kn7Vz-z3SAc3n5ACRDCKZNnhOdaVO1NmSTauCYw_lGI5k5d6SFsfR35qaEnC5Cpjd72srvF_yBFUdjDHZWidMTicUoTIlUrSeBJAUwQS9XXEFJSuUs3Ak1TeUJrBdSzghUVZRVXRCz_IjDWER0EWFj_RoHV5Qwi8Xs5x1hYN8V6V5S4Yl4ihlMkUKmvto3cx5ScY-XRv4j9zHCwGJbX5T9dDY-3F2Uk_F2QoA4bEU5mHo3U2mxUk3YhaOeiyD9lsbAszX8R8/4ir/BvoUqdBASqq3OfqKy2HK1w/h0/h001.RHl2FfPNweY2hzLhd4_rFVnwhwKJH4NWOb_PK5Ov7gk) Trump’s plan is to target newborn babies—demanding their parents’ paperwork in the hospital. The baby will now inherit their mom and dad’s legal status. If you’ve ever been part of a hospital birth, you know how chaotic the day can be. **Forcing immigrant parents to produce their documentation in that moment will create logistical nightmares for both parents and hospitals.** Congress has the power to step in and stop this plan from happening. The Supreme Court refused to stop Trump, so we have to get loud and put full pressure on our representatives and senators. [**Add your name today! name: =?utf-8?b?QmV0byBP4oCZUm91cmtl?=
subject: Texas Democrats did something bold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It’s Beto O’Rourke here.
Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.
But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.**
And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders.
They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for.
Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up the fight.
[**Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can to Powered by People and Sarah McBride to support these brave lawmakers?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-pxp-em-mcbride-20250804-1?refcode=em20250804-2241&amount=5&refcode2=2241_21716_bGstud&akid=2241%2E21716%2EbGstud)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-pxp-em-mcbride-20250804-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250804-2241&refcode2=2241_21716_bGstud&akid=2241%2E21716%2EbGstud)**
Let’s make sure they know we’ve got their backs—and that they’re not in this fight alone.
With gratitude,
Beto

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Donald Trump’s rant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Republicans love to talk about "facts over feelings"

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---
I was on CNBC this morning talking about how costs have skyrocketed since Trump took office. It’s a pretty simple fact. They have. That seemed to have struck a chord for Trump. He took to Truth Social to rant about what I had to say — posting not once, not twice, but three times about it — and insisting that he has lowered costs. For someone who started a social media company called “Truth” Social, Trump seems to be pretty allergic to it. But, whether he likes it or not, here’s the truth: Trump ran for office saying he'd lower costs on Day One. Fast forward to today, and the cost of groceries is up. The cost of housing is up. The cost of health care is up. Inflation is up. And where is Donald Trump? He's passing a signature bill to throw 17 million people off their health care so he can do tax cuts for billionaires. He’s posting about me instead of doing anything about the affordability crisis. [**I’m going to keep calling out Trump’s broken promises and fight for policies that will actually lower costs for American families. If you support this fight, then please chip in today to fund our grassroots-powered movement.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=8&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---

---
Republicans love to talk about “facts over feelings”, but then they tantrum every time they hear a fact they don’t like. And Trump takes it to an extreme: Deleting climate change reports.
Detaining students for writing op-eds.
Defunding or suing broadcasters and talk show hosts. Trump’s latest anti-truth rampage came last week, when he fired the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) after they released jobs data that he didn’t like. This is very dangerous. The BLS is a fact-finding agency that reports about market conditions and the labor force. That’s pretty important, especially when the president has been hurtling our economy into a recession since he took office. But after BLS published disappointing job numbers on Friday, Trump called the report “rigged”, claimed the numbers were politically motivated, and fired the BLS commissioner. Trump thinks that if the head of the BLS or if I share something factual about his economy, he can just attack the messenger and the truth will go away. He thinks he can bend reality and tell a different story that everyone will just believe. Sorry Donald, but that’s not happening. [**I’ll never stop speaking truth to power, no matter how many deranged Truths the president wants to post about me. Trump thinks he can run the country like a wannabe dictator, but I won’t back down. Say you’re with me in this fight by making a donation of any amount today.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=14&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3072?t=12&akid=2610%2E4032634%2ENI2EJu)
---

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: Don’t let Republicans rig the 2026 election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hi there, Peter,
At 4:00 p.m. (CST) on Sunday Afternoon, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections.
After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up five more Congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprung into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way.
These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their families (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district funded by Governor Greg Abbott. If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help.
We want to show these fighters that we have their back! If you make a contribution to this email, it will be split between my campaign and the Texas Democratic Parties in order to help the Texas Democrats fund this very expensive fight for all of our sake. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_txdems?refcode=x_250804_txdemocrats_spl_txdems_act]
Rush a Donation to Support Texas Democrats! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_txdems?refcode=x_250804_txdemocrats_spl_txdems_act]
This is the fight to save democracy that Democrats have been warning about for ten years. It’s going to take all of us to ensure that this bold attempt to steal our republic does not go unchallenged.
In solidarity,
Maxine

Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

name: Benson HQ
subject: Did you see this headline?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
If we want to defeat them, we need your help:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=581%2E181023%2Et7s5i7)
Did you see this headline?
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250804_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=581%2E181023%2Et7s5i7)
Third-party candidate Mike Duggan brought in a huge fundraising haul — full of cash from GOP donors and corporate PACs trying to tip the scales in this race.
National Republicans and corporate PACs are backing Mike Duggan — because they know he'll represent their interests, not the best interests of everyday Michiganders. If they back his campaign, they hope that he takes away votes from Democrats like Jocelyn, leaving room for a Republican candidate to win.

name: Travis Tazelaar, VoteVets
subject: $200 mill on a gold ballroom while Vets lose their health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump can afford to blow $200 million on a golden ballroom at the White House but he can’t afford to help Veterans, the elderly, sick and hungry kids.
#
Peter, Travis here.
You ever see something that instantly gets under your skin?
I’ll admit, it’s happening to me a lot more than usual this year. And yesterday, something happened that really, really set me off.
Trump announced he’s putting in a $200 million gilded ballroom at the White House. Yeah, they’re blowing $200 million on a big room for people to come and bow before Trump.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250804-1-120&t=1&akid=34499%2E3013755%2EAsC_nP)
That’s after Trump already paved over Jackie Kennedy’s Rose Garden. After he extorted Qatar for a $400 million jet, which is gonna cost $1 billion to get up to code, that he’s going to take personal possession of after he leaves office. After he threw himself a birthday parade at the cost of $45 million at _minimum._ After he’s taken something like 100 trips to his own golf courses on taxpayer dime — way more already than at this point in his first term.
Napkin math, that’s probably pushing $2 billion right there. And we’re not even getting into his crypto schemes and the global “deals” funnelling billions of dollars into his bank account.
You already know what’s happening back in the real world. The VA’s lost thousands of doctors, nurses, researchers, therapists, and caregivers. He’s selling off public lands to the highest bidder. He’s kicking literally hundreds of millions of people off their health care when they’re already struggling to get by. People can’t afford basic necessities because of his tariffs.
Trump can afford to blow $200 million on a golden ballroom at the White House but he can’t afford to help Veterans, the elderly, sick and hungry kids.
This is Marie Antoinette on steroids.
But that’s why I’m proud I get to work at VoteVets. It’s my job to find and build networks of support for thousands of Veterans around the country who decided to take a really tough step into public service. The only way we get to the other side of this is if people like them continue stepping up to put the country before themselves.
It’s not easy. It takes tons of work, and time away from your family and friends. You don’t get days off. It shouldn’t be this tough, but that’s the world we live in right now.
I’m proud of all of them. And I’m just so grateful I get to help them out.
The reality though, is that this work isn’t cheap. And sometimes it requires us making tough asks of the people who support us. Today is one of those days.
[**So, I’m humbly asking you: Can you make a donation to VoteVets today and help us lay the groundwork for taking back the House and the Senate next year? It’s our only shot at stopping Trump, and we’ve got to start now if we’re gonna have any chance.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250804-1-120&t=2&akid=34499%2E3013755%2EAsC_nP)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.s0DXWu&refcode=em250804-1-120&t=21&akid=34499%2E3013755%2EAsC_nP)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.c9qBG4&refcode=em250804-1-120&t=22&akid=34499%2E3013755%2EAsC_nP)**

name: EMILYs List
subject: Re: Texas Democrats
body:
These women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112743852/561475493/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE809_20250804_TexasDems_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDhlYWVhNS04YjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3FSPPSkqo2rCl2zbsUN5wo5nHyYUyFHkycyKGhSH0Ec=) Hi Peter,

This weekend, more than 50 Texas legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women — did something extraordinary: they _left the state_ , risking arrest under Attorney General Ken Paxton's penalties, to break quorum and delay the passage of a devastating and blatantly undemocratic GOP gerrymandering bill. | [DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112743853/561475494/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE809_20250804_TexasDems_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDhlYWVhNS04YjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3FSPPSkqo2rCl2zbsUN5wo5nHyYUyFHkycyKGhSH0Ec=)
---
The GOP's gerrymandering assaults every community in the state. It would make 30 of Texas' 38 congressional districts _safe Republican seats_ , **netting Republicans five more seats in the U.S. House** , despite more than 42% of Texans voting for Kamala Harris last year.

This bill is disenfranchisement, plain and simple. Trump is pushing Republican Gov. Greg Abbott to pass it because he knows how unpopular their party's governance is — and he knows the only way Republicans will hold the U.S. House in 2026 is by rigging maps, suppressing votes, and _stealing_ seats.

Now, these courageous Texas women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. We're _immensely_ proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders. They are proof that we're not powerless: even in red states, Democrats can do their part to stop the Trump takeover.

These women are why we do the work we do.
****[**This fight is far from over, Peter. We are hard at work to help elect more leaders who will show up for their constituents, resist fascism, and defend democracy when it matters most. You can support our work with a donation now:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112743854/561475495/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE809_20250804_TexasDems_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDhlYWVhNS04YjcxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3FSPPSkqo2rCl2zbsUN5wo5nHyYUyFHkycyKGhSH0Ec=)****

clean_body: These women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. | = Hi Peter, This weekend, more than 50 Texas legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women — did something extraordinary: they left the state , risking arrest under Attorney General Ken Paxton's penalties, to break quorum and delay the passage of a devastating and blatantly undemocratic GOP gerrymandering bill. | = The GOP's gerrymandering assaults every community in the state. It would make 30 of Texas' 38 congressional districts safe Republican seats , netting Republicans five more seats in the U.S. House , despite more than 42% of Texans voting for Kamala Harris last year. This bill is disenfranchisement, plain and simple. Trump is pushing Republican Gov. Greg Abbott to pass it because he knows how unpopular their party's governance is — and he knows the only way Republicans will hold the U.S. House in 2026 is by rigging maps, suppressing votes, and stealing seats. Now, these courageous Texas women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. We're immensely proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders. They are proof that we're not powerless: even in red states, Democrats can do their part to stop the Trump takeover. These women are why we do the work we do. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. clean_body: Peter, The socialist Democrats are on the march, and they'll stop at nothing to take back the Senate and stop us from pushing through President Trump's America First agenda. Don't get me wrong, if the radical Left takes control of the Senate, it will be disastrous for our country. They'll open our borders, pack the Supreme Court, and ram through one dangerous policy after another--putting our freedom, security, and American values at risk. We can't let that happen. Thank you, Senator John Thune | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Tell House Democrats: Reject the AIPAC trip to Israel!
disclaimer_text:
paid
for by AIPAC
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

According to CNN, the annual AIPAC-sponsored trip to Israel for House
Democratic freshmen is scheduled for this week — in the middle of a
genocide and rising famine.

The anti-Palestinian lobby group sends Congress members – particularly
freshmen – on these propaganda trips every year to ensure their allegiance
for years to come. Christian nationalist and Republican Speaker of the
House Mike Johnson is already in Israel, making the rounds.

This year’s cohort of Democrats is expected to meet with Israeli Prime
Minister and war criminal Benjamin Netanyahu, while the Israeli government
continues to wage a genocide.

50 miles away from Palestinians facing forced starvation, members of the
U.S. Congress will be rubbing elbows with the government orchestrating the
famine. It is absolutely shameful and despicable.

A vast majority of voters on BOTH sides of the aisle oppose Israel’s
violence and mass starvation of Palestinians: the Democratic Party should
be listening to the people and uniting to stop Netanyahu’s war crimes by
blocking new weapons sales to Israel, NOT taking a free trip there paid
for by AIPAC.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250804-aipac-trip/?source=em20250804-36903&akid=36903%2E1203867%2EZPxeAQ ]If you agree, sign our petition urging House Democrats to reject this
AIPAC trip to Israel now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250804-aipac-trip/?source=em20250804-36903&akid=36903%2E1203867%2EZPxeAQ ]Add Your Name

We can’t let members of Congress go on acting like business as usual when
millions in Gaza are at risk of starvation at the hands of the same
Israeli government they’re so eager to meet with.

Any member of Congress going on this trip is complicit in this genocide.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, According to CNN, the annual AIPAC-sponsored trip to Israel for House Democratic freshmen is scheduled for this week — in the middle of a genocide and rising famine. The anti-Palestinian lobby group sends Congress members – particularly freshmen – on these propaganda trips every year to ensure their allegiance for years to come. Christian nationalist and Republican Speaker of the House Mike Johnson is already in Israel, making the rounds. This year’s cohort of Democrats is expected to meet with Israeli Prime Minister and war criminal Benjamin Netanyahu, while the Israeli government continues to wage a genocide. 50 miles away from Palestinians facing forced starvation, members of the U.S. Congress will be rubbing elbows with the government orchestrating the famine. It is absolutely shameful and despicable. A vast majority of voters on BOTH sides of the aisle oppose Israel’s violence and mass starvation of Palestinians: the Democratic Party should be listening to the people and uniting to stop Netanyahu’s war crimes by blocking new weapons sales to Israel, NOT taking a free trip there paid for by AIPAC. [ ]If you agree, sign our petition urging House Democrats to reject this AIPAC trip to Israel now! [ ]Add Your Name We can’t let members of Congress go on acting like business as usual when millions in Gaza are at risk of starvation at the hands of the same Israeli government they’re so eager to meet with. Any member of Congress going on this trip is complicit in this genocide. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Folks, I wanted to make sure you saw this:
The Republican Attorneys General Association spent a whopping TWO MILLION DOLLARS to elevate my MAGA opponent, Jason Miyares.
Make no mistake — MAGA donors are investing in Miyares because they know he will carry out Trump's far-right agenda at the expense of Virginians.
We have to show Miyares, Trump, and their allies that we won't back down from this fight. Team, rush $25 to my campaign today. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=25]
----- Forwarded Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?]
Team,
I need you to understand what just happened.
The Republican Attorneys General Association — RAGA — just dumped TWO MILLION DOLLARS into Virginia to prop up Jason Miyares.
Let me be crystal clear: This is more money than any GOP committee has spent on ANY statewide race in Virginia this year.
They're not doing this because they're confident. They're doing this because they're terrified .
Here's why: I'm running to be Virginia's next Attorney General, and unlike Miyares — who has pledged his loyalty to Trump at the expense of our families — I'll actually stand up for Virginians.
If you're ready to fight back against this $2 million MAGA money bomb, rush $25 to my campaign right now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=25]
RUSH $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=25]
Look, before I decided to run for Attorney General, I spent my career as a public servant and lawyer fighting for justice for our communities. I've taken on corruption. I've fought for working families. I've stood up to powerful interests who thought they were above the law.
I know what it looks like when the powerful try to buy their way out of accountability.
That's exactly what's happening here.
These MAGA donors are dumping truckloads of money into this race because they know Jason Miyares will be a reliable foot soldier for Donald Trump's agenda.
While Trump weaponizes the Justice Department against his enemies, while he pardons violent criminals who attacked our democracy, while he shreds the rule of law — Miyares isn’t just staying silent – he’s enabling Trump every step of the way.
But here's the thing: We've beaten these odds before.
Here's our path to victory: We're going to out-organize them in every corner of Virginia. We're going to knock on more doors, make more calls, and mobilize more voters than they think possible. But to fight back against $2 million in new attacks, I need your help right now. Can you rush $25 — or whatever you can afford — to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=250]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?]
Donald Trump is using the full weight of the federal government to hurt states like Virginia. He's already firing federal workers, threatening to withhold disaster aid, and attacking reproductive rights.
Virginia needs an Attorney General who will stand up to these attacks. Not roll over for them.
But first, we have to win this race.
RAGA's $2 million is just the beginning. They'll spend whatever it takes to keep their MAGA loyalist in Richmond.
And you — right now — get to decide whether we fight back or let them buy this election. I know which side I'm on. Please join me.
— Jay Jones
P.S. — They think $2 million can silence our movement. Let's show them how wrong they are. Here’s the link to make a donation: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_raga_em_q32025?amount=25]

name: Team DNC
subject: This is how we'll spend your $3 donation →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, We’re sure you get many emails from campaigns and organizations asking for your support. And we’re sure you’ve also thought, _“If I pitch in today, where does my contribution actually go?”_ **We’re here to clear that up.** When you donate to the DNC, here’s what your $3 helps fund →
* **Organizing:** We’ve launched our “Organizing Summer” initiative, and are spending the summer mobilizing volunteers across the country. _Your $3 can help us increase our reach by hosting more events, activating more volunteers, and reaching voters in _every_ corner of the country._
* **State Party Investments:** We’ve committed to investing $1 million in Democratic state parties each month — and on top of that, we’ve made an initial $1.5 million investment in Virginia to help elect more Democrats in November. _Your $3 can help us make sure a state like yours has the resources to support Democrats running for school board, city council, and beyond._
* **Holding Trump Accountable:** So far this year, we’ve taken Trump to court several times, and we still have an ongoing case against the Trump administration and its attacks on free and fair elections. _Lawsuits are expensive, but absolutely necessary to hold Trump accountable and protect our democracy — and your $3 donation might go towards helping fund this work._

**Here’s the reality: With so much going on, $3 might not feel like it can make a huge impact, but when we combine your $3 with $3 contributions from Democrats all over the country, it adds up quickly and makes a huge difference.** [**If the DNC’s work to organize everywhere and stop Trump is worth $3 to you, that’s the contribution we’re hoping you’ll make to the DNC today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250804_4170_fr&refcode2=4170_22930333_PfXo2j&akid=4170%2E22930333%2EPfXo2j) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250804_4170_fr&refcode2=4170_22930333_PfXo2j&akid=4170%2E22930333%2EPfXo2j)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250804_4170_fr&refcode2=4170_22930333_PfXo2j&akid=4170%2E22930333%2EPfXo2j)**

name: Rob Bonta
subject: $168 billion restored to CA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250804&t=1001&akid=1906%2E1088799%2E4UhznD ]Rob Bonta

I’ve told you
about the lawsuits I’ve filed against Trump — 37 in just 28
weeks.

The impact they’ve had is enormous: to the tune of more than $168 billion
of federal funding restored to California.

To put it simply, for every $1 we’ve been given for this work, we’ve
returned $33,600 for the state.

Within his first week in office, Trump went after a full third of
California’s budget. Within 24 hours, we were in court and stopped him in
his tracks.

We saved money that goes to school programs for our kids, research for our
future, medical care for our sick, and infrastructure that keeps our cars
driving and planes in the air.

When Trump’s first big attempt to claw back funding failed, he started
flooding the zone with targeted attacks. We’ve been ready to strike back
at every turn. We protected more than $11 billion in federal grant
funding, stopped the dismantling of federal agencies like AmeriCorps and
HHS, and defended constitutional rights like birthright citizenship and
the right to vote.

Trump and his allies have been playing a dangerous game of wack-a-mole
with critical state funding, leading an onslaught of near-constant
attempts to cut off services and programs tens of millions of people rely
on.

But this is not a game.

When this administration targets California’s funding, they’re putting
people’s education, health, livelihoods, and even their lives at risk.

That’s why every single time the President breaks the law, I will take him
to court.

We’re six months in — and we have more than 40 months to go.
So this is just the beginning.

I will remain unapologetic in my commitment to holding Trump accountable
and defending the rights and freedoms of Californians, but I do need your
help to keep up this fight.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250804?refcode=em20250804-1906&refcode2=1906_1088799_4UhznD&akid=1906%2E1088799%2E4UhznD ]I’m on the ballot for re-election next year — and I can’t win without
your support. Will you pitch in any amount to my campaign today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250804?refcode=em20250804-1906&amount=5&refcode2=1906_1088799_4UhznD&akid=1906%2E1088799%2E4UhznD ]Donate $5 »

I will continue to fight at every turn. Thanks for standing with me.

In solidarity,
Rob

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1009?t=1002&akid=1906%2E1088799%2E4UhznD ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=1906%2E1088799%2E4UhznD
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=1906%2E1088799%2E4UhznD

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026

1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
